name: Heather G.
subject: Weird request...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
We need all the help we can get!
| Hi friend, it’s Heather from the Voter Protection Project. I have a weird favor to ask of you:

[Will you chip in 4 quarters — _just $1_ — to our grassroots powered movement to take back the House, flip the Senate, and stop Trump in 2026? $1 will allow you to claim your Democratic Supporter Membership card & fight back against MAGA. Chip in $1 today »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94660?t=6&akid=21460%2E878179%2ERN7HhE) | [CLAIM YOUR MEMBERSHIP: CHIP IN $1 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94660?t=7&akid=21460%2E878179%2ERN7HhE)
---
We wouldn’t normally ask for just $1, but donations are __plunging,__ and we want to make sure that loyal Democrats like you haven’t thrown in the towel in the race to flip the House and end Trump’s MAGA trifecta.

**Democratic Supporter Memberships give us the fuel we need to ensure we can limit the damage Donald Trump gets away with** — _it’s that simple!_

[With Trump ramping up his billionaire-funded war chest, we need all the help we can get. Will you chip in just $1 to claim your 2025 Democratic Supporter Membership card so we can flip critical swing seats, take back the House, and end Trump’s trifecta? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94660?t=8&akid=21460%2E878179%2ERN7HhE)
[CLAIM YOUR MEMBERSHIP: CHIP IN $1 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94660?t=9&akid=21460%2E878179%2ERN7HhE)
---
Thank you SO much,

Heather G.
Executive Director
The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21460%2E878179%2ERN7HhE). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21460%2E878179%2ERN7HhE).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21460%2E878179%2ERN7HhE) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=21460%2E878179%2ERN7HhE). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=21460%2E878179%2ERN7HhE)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=21460%2E878179%2ERN7HhE)

name: The Democrats
subject: An explanation:
body:
---
Derek, Today, we are going to ask you to [**split a $20 contribution between the Virginia Democratic Party’s Coordinated Campaign and the DNC**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-vadcc-split?amount=20&refcode=em_20251011_4820_fr&refcode2=4844_22930333_pYLdUJ&akid=4844%2E22930333%2EpYLdUJ) — but first, we hope you’ll give us a chance to explain why we need your support right now. Here’s the deal:
* Virginia is the **_only_ state** where we can flip a governor’s seat from red to blue this year.
* **_Early voting has already begun_** and we are running out of time to reach voters who may still be undecided.
* The Coordinated Campaign, Operation Virginia Victory, has an incredible organizing team doing the crucial work to turn out voters, activate volunteers, and protect access to the ballot box.

This is work that takes sustained resources from people like you, Derek. But the Trump-backed Republican candidates and national GOP are hoping we’ll all just become overwhelmed by the chaos of the day-to-day news cycle and tune out entirely. They’re counting on us sitting this one out. We can’t let that happen. That’s why this moment is so important. October has just begun, but Democrats are about to face our most important test since the 2024 election. On November 4, we will have the opportunity to stand up to Trump and Republicans’ disastrous agenda. The results will tell a story: Victory — up and down the ballot, in Virginia and beyond — will show the strength of Democrats’ opposition to Trump and his agenda. _They’ll show we aren’t done fighting._ [**So, Derek, we’re asking: Can you split a $20 contribution between the Virginia Democratic Party’s Coordinated Campaign and the DNC today to show Republicans that nothing will stop you — or thousands of other grassroots supporters just like you — from fighting back?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-vadcc-split?amount=20&refcode=em_20251011_4820_fr&refcode2=4844_22930333_pYLdUJ&akid=4844%2E22930333%2EpYLdUJ) _If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between the Virginia Democratic Party's Coordinated Campaign and the Democratic National Committee instantly:_ | | | **[Donate $20](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-vadcc-split?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em_20251011_4820_fr&refcode2=4844_22930333_pYLdUJ&akid=4844%2E22930333%2EpYLdUJ)**

Thank you for standing with us,
The Democrats

name: The Spanberger Campaign
subject: You need to see this breaking news:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
National Republicans are investing another $1.5 million into Virginia to clobber us with attack ads.

name: Greg Cunningham, Former combat vet
subject: Not everyone saw combat but I did
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cunningham for NM
body:
That’s why I’m running for Congress. To step up once again for our families, our freedoms, and our future.

| | | Friend, At 21 years old, I was part of Marine special forces - slipping across enemy lines in the dark. I wasn’t sitting in a classroom or climbing a political ladder. I was a **Reconnaissance Marine - the Marines’ elite special forces - heading into combat in Desert Storm.**
---
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z09md1up3unmn03g54d8lbl7gj40om2ddv7eip8g_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hmcoj0s3h2bs)
---
Our mission was as dangerous as it gets: sneak across the border, map out enemy positions, and call in airstrikes if needed. **_We walked into traps. We engaged in firefights. For four years, that was my life._** Not every Marine saw combat but _**my unit did**_ and we ended up earning the **Combat Action Ribbon** for it. I was personally awarded a **Meritorious Mast** for going beyond the call of duty, showing initiative and judgment when it mattered most.
---
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2znlq4qstm0k6ranjfhc0hqotc7tubcmril9d022g_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hmcoj0s3h2bs)
---
Those years forged me. They taught me that **freedom isn’t guaranteed - it’s fought for, earned, and protected.** And today, I see a different kind of fight. Open borders. Washington overreach. Radical politicians who don’t share our values. That’s why I’m running for Congress. **_To step up once again for our families, our freedoms, and our future._** But this fight won’t be easy. **My opponent has the radical left and D.C. insiders funding his campaign**. **[I need grassroots supporters like you to stand with me right now.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zi13sfd8pa703orodf75khigs5vbho4k7pk0bdfo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hmcoj0s3h2bs)**
---

clean_body: That’s why I’m running for Congress. To step up once again for our families, our freedoms, and our future. | | | Friend, At 21 years old, I was part of Marine special forces - slipping across enemy lines in the dark. I wasn’t sitting in a classroom or climbing a political ladder. I was a Reconnaissance Marine - the Marines’ elite special forces - heading into combat in Desert Storm. Our mission was as dangerous as it gets: sneak across the border, map out enemy positions, and call in airstrikes if needed. We walked into traps. We engaged in firefights. For four years, that was my life. Not every Marine saw combat but my unit did and we ended up earning the Combat Action Ribbon for it. I was personally awarded a Meritorious Mast for going beyond the call of duty, showing initiative and judgment when it mattered most. Those years forged me. They taught me that freedom isn’t guaranteed - it’s fought for, earned, and protected. And today, I see a different kind of fight. Open borders. Washington overreach. Radical politicians who don’t share our values. That’s why I’m running for Congress. To step up once again for our families, our freedoms, and our future. But this fight won’t be easy. My opponent has the radical left and D.C. insiders funding his campaign. Semper Fi, Greg Cunningham Christian. Marine. name: Byron Donalds
subject: I Will Never Wave a White Flag
body:
I need you to read why.

---
| | | | | | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z98s0b90rpo1m1l4rs2g6n73uk3s0sve4kpo1hro_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hmcoj6cdh2bs)
---
| | | | | The Radical Left is hellbent on forcing me to wave the white flag of surrender, but I'm going on record now saying - **THAT WILL NEVER HAPPEN!**

While the DC elites and liberal billionaires pour their fortunes into ending the _**MAGA Movement**_ , I am convinced that it's the unwavering resolve of patriots like YOU that keeps America strong.

My name is Byron Donalds,_I 'm a PROUD Trump-endorsed MAGA Republican running for Governor of Florida_ and I have to keep it real with you:
_This isn 't just an election - it's a battle for America's future. If we lose Florida - we lose the whole nation to the Woke Mob._

Florida is our last line of defense against a corrupt Democrat Establishment who have made it abundantly clear how much they **HATE****** our _America First agenda_.

**_If MAGA loses this race, you can kiss the country you love goodbye._**

Goodbye to President Trump's America First Agenda, America's Golden Age, and so much more.

I couldn't wait another day to send you this. We need to respond right at this moment.
_**[So, could I humbly ask you to step up today to support my efforts with a donation of $25, $47, or $100?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zu1lr0hgnqnf5gfavf34khd3t1o0ashlco9jjcvo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hmcoj6cdh2bs "So, could I humbly ask you to step up today to support my efforts with a donation of $25, $47, or $100?")**_
---

---

We need steadfast Patriots like you to step up and send an unmistakable message to the Democrats that MAGA isn't giving them an inch.

As the MAGA candidate for Governor, every dollar you contribute to my campaign will boldly demonstrate your _**[unwavering dedication](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z111j82bsj5qg08pip5s6u0chkmda37q646f3aeo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hmcoj6cdh2bs "unwavering dedication")**_ to President Trump's MAGA Movement and to ensuring Florida remains MAGA HQ.

---
| | [STAND WITH ME AND WITH MAGA>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zh50ms7sel2fqt8em5kslerfadou62t4u7ht91ko_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hmcoj6cdh2bs)

Thank you for your unwavering support, it means the world to me. It will not be forgotten!

Byron

name: Tyler Bowyer, Turning Point Action
subject: The machine Charlie built changed the game
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TURNING POINT ACTION (TPACTION
body:
When I heard of Charlie Kirk, he wasn’t famous.

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zt1v7jr20p317dc074gqtomap46h1tt8vsugolbg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hmcoj6c9h2bs)
---
Friend, When I heard of Charlie Kirk, he wasn't famous. He wasn't filling arenas. He wasn't a household name. A few people told me, _" You've gotta meet this guy -- he's doing something big out in Illinois."_ So I went. Charlie was running Turning Point from a modest office in the Chicago suburbs -- surviving on coffee and pure belief that America was still worth saving.
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2f05qg9hlrl7vfdesfmhak8q3m32eotna1dpipg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hmcoj6c9h2bs)
---
_**Above:** The original Turning Point HQ in Lemont, Illinois. This is where it all began -- just Charlie, a vision, and a mission that changed everything. _
---
Back then, we were both organizing young conservatives, both dreaming about how to win back the culture. But when I first sat down with Charlie... _I knew._ Charlie was the visionary. He had the plan. And I HAD to be part of it. I jumped in and never looked back. From that moment on, I was there for all of it. The early conferences and campuses. The road trips. The rallies. The fights. In those days, our team didn't have much. But what we had was conviction -- and that was more than enough. Because we believed in something BIG. Something real. Something urgent. **Faith, family, freedom** -- and the absolute grit to go build something that could save this country. And Charlie? _He did it._ He didn't just build a brand... _He built a machine._ First, Charlie built a movement that changed the hearts and minds of an entire generation -- a seismic shift that flipped the narrative that young people belonged to the Left. Then, he built Turning Point Action to become the grassroots force the Left never saw coming... and beat them at their own game. And, I hitched my wagon to it _from the start._ Charlie and I weren't just friends... We were brothers in the fight. We did everything together.
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7q4970lur455tjdftbic7fltsea6tgijp21fcjg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hmcoj6c9h2bs)
---
We strategized over midnight texts... battled together through COVID, the 2020 Election, and every crisis they threw at us...We created AmericaFest from scratch... launched Turning Point Action to go on offense -- in the very states the GOP had given up on. **And we rallied a grassroots army that put President Donald J. Trump back in the White House in 2024. ** We didn't just talk about chasing ballots... Turning Point Action built the first full-scale, professional ballot-chasing operation on the Right -- _and it delivered real results._ 10 for 10. **In every single state we operated in... Trump won.** In Arizona _alone,_ we chased over 205,000 low-propensity conservative votes -- well beyond the margin of victory. _In Wisconsin?_ 60,000+. _In Nevada?_ 6,000+ -- and we won back a district we hadn't carried in 20 years. _In Michigan?_ 14,000+ votes helped us flip a U.S. House seat and take the state house majority. We didn't just make noise... _We made history. _
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zat7joaahhjrmjbpke22j2m6s724b793aes7kju0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hmcoj6c9h2bs)
---
_**Above:** Election Night 2024. Our biggest win yet. That's me on the left -- still fighting beside Charlie, just like we always did. _
---
Friend, I watched Charlie pour everything into this mission. He lived on the road 300+ days a year. We never stopped. _Because Charlie never stopped. _ He didn't build all of this for clout or clicks... Instead, he did it for this country. For all of us. For every parent who feels like they're losing their kid to the Left... For every student who's afraid to speak up... For every American who still believes in this country... Charlie built this movement and this machine for them. For you. And now? After he gave everything for that mission? **We have to carry the torch. We have to keep the machine running -- ****_and make it stronger than ever._** Everything we've felt since the day we lost Charlie -- _we must turn it into action._ He used to ask me (and everyone else at Turning Point) all the time: _" What are we building next?"_ **Well, Friend, here 's the answer: We're building the next generation of grassroots power -- one voter, one precinct, one act of courage at a time.**
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z93fs6k2c35cjuvqhh34e27tn5d32ljjji58lod0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hmcoj6c9h2bs)
---
**But it doesn 't happen without you.** _So, here 's my ask..._ Go to church for Charlie. Start a family for Charlie.Join a chapter or coalition for Charlie. Register to vote for Charlie.Chase votes for Charlie. Run for office for Charlie. Commit to WIN. Commit to FIGHT. Commit to FINISH what he started. That's what Charlie would've wanted.I'm not stopping until we save our country. I'm all in -- and if you're reading this, I'm betting that you are, too. If so, I'm honored to fight alongside you. And if you've already been with us for a while -- thank you. Now, let's get to work.
---
**For Charlie.** **God Bless,** **Tyler Bowyer**
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point Action
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zopjdsu85ml82f06murjdpgi8dmsq54ojdq21ge0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hmcoj6c9h2bs)
---
[**Support Turning Point Action**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4lafsqkft1r6tp0sam5dv8mcd642nbj4m7ske68_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hmcoj6c9h2bs) **P.S.** I would give anything to have Charlie back. But he left us with something powerful -- a machine that works... a machine that's proven and battle-tested. Now it's time to run it -- _and run it like never before._ Bigger. Bolder. More battlegrounds. More victories. **Because right now, thanks to a generous supporter of Turning Point Action, your gift will be matched dollar-for-dollar -- up to $500,000, through October 31.** That means, with your gift today: ✅ 2X the activists trained
✅ 2X the voters registered
✅ 2X the pressure on weak-kneed politicians
✅ 2X the ballot-chasing operations
✅ 2X the grassroots strength the Left can't stop We don't need to reinvent anything. Charlie already drew the blueprint and turned the key. So, if you've been wondering how to help... If you've been asking _" what now?"_ **Then, Friend, this is your moment to step in, fuel the fight, and take Charlie 's vision to the next level.** Let's turn this energy -- this momentum -- into action. **[Let's deliver America First victories in every corner of this country. And many more for years to come. Make your gift to Turning Point Action today and immediately double your impact.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7pp10vouqqs6rtq6p5akv1opase80i14qmvsero_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hmcoj6c9h2bs)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point Action **
**& Double Your Impact**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zat55n6t43ru3vpj4sn76thau3ih87ohve73lf4o_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hmcoj6c9h2bs)

subject: The machine Charlie built changed the game

body:
When I heard of Charlie Kirk, he wasn’t famous.

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zrmkpfh42inutvcrdd1nobldj2jmk4mjfh1bbtdo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hm2p34chh2bs)
---
Friend, When I heard of Charlie Kirk, he wasn't famous. He wasn't filling arenas. He wasn't a household name. A few people told me, _" You've gotta meet this guy -- he's doing something big out in Illinois."_ So I went. Charlie was running Turning Point from a modest office in the Chicago suburbs -- surviving on coffee and pure belief that America was still worth saving.
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zn5lujts9kb4f16omh806bdmqrgemgq203o0pgto_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hm2p34chh2bs)
---
_**Above:** The original Turning Point HQ in Lemont, Illinois. This is where it all began -- just Charlie, a vision, and a mission that changed everything. _
---
Back then, we were both organizing young conservatives, both dreaming about how to win back the culture. But when I first sat down with Charlie... _I knew._ Charlie was the visionary. He had the plan. And I HAD to be part of it. I jumped in and never looked back. From that moment on, I was there for all of it. The early conferences and campuses. The road trips. The rallies. The fights. In those days, our team didn't have much. But what we had was conviction -- and that was more than enough. Because we believed in something BIG. Something real. Something urgent. **Faith, family, freedom** -- and the absolute grit to go build something that could save this country. And Charlie? _He did it._ He didn't just build a brand... _He built a machine._ First, Charlie built a movement that changed the hearts and minds of an entire generation -- a seismic shift that flipped the narrative that young people belonged to the Left. Then, he built Turning Point Action to become the grassroots force the Left never saw coming... and beat them at their own game. And, I hitched my wagon to it _from the start._ Charlie and I weren't just friends... We were brothers in the fight. We did everything together.
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zk3lid208i7srpn6gc6jucuegco2lk81loujf7k8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hm2p34chh2bs)
---
We strategized over midnight texts... battled together through COVID, the 2020 Election, and every crisis they threw at us...We created AmericaFest from scratch... launched Turning Point Action to go on offense -- in the very states the GOP had given up on. **And we rallied a grassroots army that put President Donald J. Trump back in the White House in 2024. ** We didn't just talk about chasing ballots... Turning Point Action built the first full-scale, professional ballot-chasing operation on the Right -- _and it delivered real results._ 10 for 10. **In every single state we operated in... Trump won.** In Arizona _alone,_ we chased over 205,000 low-propensity conservative votes -- well beyond the margin of victory. _In Wisconsin?_ 60,000+. _In Nevada?_ 6,000+ -- and we won back a district we hadn't carried in 20 years. _In Michigan?_ 14,000+ votes helped us flip a U.S. House seat and take the state house majority. We didn't just make noise... _We made history. _
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvl6tl09a4fmsfil8kh5f6r6ge65c0m6cv6tgu0o_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hm2p34chh2bs)
---
_**Above:** Election Night 2024. Our biggest win yet. That's me on the left -- still fighting beside Charlie, just like we always did. _
---
Friend, I watched Charlie pour everything into this mission. He lived on the road 300+ days a year. We never stopped. _Because Charlie never stopped. _ He didn't build all of this for clout or clicks... Instead, he did it for this country. For all of us. For every parent who feels like they're losing their kid to the Left... For every student who's afraid to speak up... For every American who still believes in this country... Charlie built this movement and this machine for them. For you. And now? After he gave everything for that mission? **We have to carry the torch. We have to keep the machine running -- ****_and make it stronger than ever._** Everything we've felt since the day we lost Charlie -- _we must turn it into action._ He used to ask me (and everyone else at Turning Point) all the time: _" What are we building next?"_ **Well, Friend, here 's the answer: We're building the next generation of grassroots power -- one voter, one precinct, one act of courage at a time.**
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zka70fftiqv01arpmkp3m1ft7gr9roiagduj79eg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hm2p34chh2bs)
---
**But it doesn 't happen without you.** _So, here 's my ask..._ Go to church for Charlie. Start a family for Charlie.Join a chapter or coalition for Charlie. Register to vote for Charlie.Chase votes for Charlie. Run for office for Charlie. Commit to WIN. Commit to FIGHT. Commit to FINISH what he started. That's what Charlie would've wanted.I'm not stopping until we save our country. I'm all in -- and if you're reading this, I'm betting that you are, too. If so, I'm honored to fight alongside you. And if you've already been with us for a while -- thank you. Now, let's get to work.
---
**For Charlie.** **God Bless,** **Tyler Bowyer**
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point Action
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zofs2b935i7jdl86pnqu7lgg33iero7pt96on4eo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hm2p34chh2bs)
---
[**Support Turning Point Action**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z1jijpl3mg548q2k13fammbk076njq4b20fb86n0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hm2p34chh2bs) **P.S.** I would give anything to have Charlie back. But he left us with something powerful -- a machine that works... a machine that's proven and battle-tested. Now it's time to run it -- _and run it like never before._ Bigger. Bolder. More battlegrounds. More victories. **Because right now, thanks to a generous supporter of Turning Point Action, your gift will be matched dollar-for-dollar -- up to $500,000, through October 31.** That means, with your gift today: ✅ 2X the activists trained
✅ 2X the voters registered
✅ 2X the pressure on weak-kneed politicians
✅ 2X the ballot-chasing operations
✅ 2X the grassroots strength the Left can't stop We don't need to reinvent anything. Charlie already drew the blueprint and turned the key. So, if you've been wondering how to help... If you've been asking _" what now?"_ **Then, Friend, this is your moment to step in, fuel the fight, and take Charlie 's vision to the next level.** Let's turn this energy -- this momentum -- into action. **[Let's deliver America First victories in every corner of this country. And many more for years to come. Make your gift to Turning Point Action today and immediately double your impact.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvp8spf7nvljgks40l9fduq41ncfv4jt04dcmm7g_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hm2p34chh2bs)**
---

**& Double Your Impact**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z5brn22npu9cck9h1dp2pd1u8o344vnd0a0ad9vo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hm2p34chh2bs)

name: James =?UTF-8?Q?O=E2=80=99Keefe?=
subject: Dark Nightmares
body:
I've been having nightmares recently that are dark beyond description. Terrifying. One occurred at 3:30 in the morning on the day that Charlie was killed. In one nightmare, a landline phone next to my bed rang. I answered, and on the other end was some demon, the most haunting voice I've heard in my life, saying, "I'm in your basement."

| | [****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztrjfahrs9ssn6vce830limg7b50n4vboaltgbio_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hm2p32cph2bs) [****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zojbcoe8a076deokgm0dtedf5gsd0nkstqufoeeo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hm2p32cph2bs) Dear Patriot,

I've been having nightmares recently that are dark beyond description. Terrifying. One occurred at 3:30 in the morning on the day that Charlie was killed.

In one nightmare, a landline phone next to my bed rang. I answered, and on the other end was **some demon** , the most haunting voice I've heard in my life, saying, "**I'm in your basement.** "

I sat up immediately, not knowing if it was real or a dream. My hands ran alongside my bed to feel the fabric in the darkness. It took some time to recognize that I was awake. I looked at my nightstand, and there was no phone.

Those who know much more about God and the Devil than I do say that this is an example of spiritual warfare. They tell me that it's meant to terrify me, to make me question myself and my own sanity. **These nightmares, this evil, come just before a story OMG will be breaking that I believe will expose evil in a way we've never seen before**.

The story was placed on hold due to the shock and grief we've all felt for Charlie Kirk. I used to run stories by Charlie to get his feedback. I relayed our next release to Charlie before he was shot. It was the last text Charlie Kirk ever sent me. I prefer to keep the message private, but he understood the significance of the story and that **it strikes at the heart of evil in our nation.**

I'm reluctant to "hype" stories anymore. That's not my intent. But I am asking for your help.

First, I'm humbly asking for your prayers for me and OMG's staff. If you're a believer, I don't need to say anything else, other than "thank you."

Secondly, [**your support is needed**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztjdbc0btk2ou228mqssrg723hudfau77g4uj9oo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hm2p32cph2bs). [**Any amount that you can contribute is appreciated**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkp6lgjejj3kid1o3nks6q3d1rv7e2j41lpepi30_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hm2p32cph2bs).

This story was one of our least expensive to produce, and you'll see why when it comes out. But it will open the floodgates of truth, and we need to be prepared for that. This story has the potential to change the world, but that's not up to me. OMG, reports the truth, the world decides. But I would be negligent in my duties if we're not prepared to deal with a flood of high-level whistleblowers after this release. And that's where your support is needed. [**Please, donate whatever you can today**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlbk4cf7aj33v03brd7al3cvufj7aa15sbfg5du0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hm2p32cph2bs).

Thank you again for all that you do and, as always, stay tuned.

In Truth, James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

| | [****](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk6qmolqndonknb7oj8gej321n994p7qicljdf08_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hmao34clh2bs) [****](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt7ar7tv1pai27fh32jo44fejrp6h8pt6rah2158_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hmao34clh2bs) Dear Patriot,

I've been having nightmares recently that are dark beyond description. Terrifying. One occurred at 3:30 in the morning on the day that Charlie was killed.

In one nightmare, a landline phone next to my bed rang. I answered, and on the other end was **some demon** , the most haunting voice I've heard in my life, saying, "**I'm in your basement.** "

I sat up immediately, not knowing if it was real or a dream. My hands ran alongside my bed to feel the fabric in the darkness. It took some time to recognize that I was awake. I looked at my nightstand, and there was no phone.

Those who know much more about God and the Devil than I do say that this is an example of spiritual warfare. They tell me that it's meant to terrify me, to make me question myself and my own sanity. **These nightmares, this evil, come just before a story OMG will be breaking that I believe will expose evil in a way we've never seen before**.

The story was placed on hold due to the shock and grief we've all felt for Charlie Kirk. I used to run stories by Charlie to get his feedback. I relayed our next release to Charlie before he was shot. It was the last text Charlie Kirk ever sent me. I prefer to keep the message private, but he understood the significance of the story and that **it strikes at the heart of evil in our nation.**

I'm reluctant to "hype" stories anymore. That's not my intent. But I am asking for your help.

First, I'm humbly asking for your prayers for me and OMG's staff. If you're a believer, I don't need to say anything else, other than "thank you."

Secondly, [**your support is needed**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdiqhb0tvlvt8mtemani7iatne7qbqe65v3mqni8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hmao34clh2bs). [**Any amount that you can contribute is appreciated**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmq22ein2c7q16e5h507nem8nuu428gi7qp76g18_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hmao34clh2bs).

This story was one of our least expensive to produce, and you'll see why when it comes out. But it will open the floodgates of truth, and we need to be prepared for that. This story has the potential to change the world, but that's not up to me. OMG, reports the truth, the world decides. But I would be negligent in my duties if we're not prepared to deal with a flood of high-level whistleblowers after this release. And that's where your support is needed. [**Please, donate whatever you can today**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi82rev3248h9oagcafqk9n7unm759mqvb4cnu98_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hmao34clh2bs).

Thank you again for all that you do and, as always, stay tuned.

In Truth, James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

body:
Thank goodness I secured an extension for you!

Friend, you're really a last minute nelly.
They say the early bird gets the worm, but this may be the exception:
[I've managed to secure you a brief EXTENSION!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmp8q0jsck4r8semkkk0lqh6srsjcfdin9rqgm8o_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hm6o74c3h2bs)

I'd hate for you to make a massive mistake in ignoring this any longer.
After everything you've given and everything you've meant to us over the years, leaving us hanging right before we close our books for the quarter would be completely devastating.
Not to mention you'd be leaving the ultimate recognition for your support on the table!

You're usually quite prompt with every single deadline, so this was concerning to us! You're cutting it quite close but there's still time left.
Look, I know you receive countless messages every day to your inbox. And the last thing we want to do is bother you.
So I'll just remind you 1 last time!
[The deadline to secure your platinum status is at midnight. After that, this opportunity will be gone. >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zn8qvoc461dejmte3cjmb7edu2c0kpjie7a6e2e0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hm6o74c3h2bs)

| | | | | The Radical Left is hellbent on forcing me to wave the white flag of surrender, but I'm going on record now saying - **THAT WILL NEVER HAPPEN!**

While the DC elites and liberal billionaires pour their fortunes into ending the _**MAGA Movement**_ , I am convinced that it's the unwavering resolve of patriots like YOU that keeps America strong.

My name is Byron Donalds,_I 'm a PROUD Trump-endorsed MAGA Republican running for Governor of Florida_ and I have to keep it real with you:
_This isn 't just an election - it's a battle for America's future. If we lose Florida - we lose the whole nation to the Woke Mob._

Florida is our last line of defense against a corrupt Democrat Establishment who have made it abundantly clear how much they **HATE****** our _America First agenda_.

**_If MAGA loses this race, you can kiss the country you love goodbye._**

Goodbye to President Trump's America First Agenda, America's Golden Age, and so much more.

I couldn't wait another day to send you this. We need to respond right at this moment.

name: Tim Holbert, American Veterans Center
subject: Celebrate 250 years of American valor with your free American flag
body:
For more than two decades, American Veterans Center has been dedicated to honoring the sacrifice and preserving the legacy of our nation’s heroes.

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zhpu2kqr36lbjag7aqq7mg22sg48dsot3ovajhqo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hmepr0c3h2bs)
---
Friend, For more than two decades, American Veterans Center has been dedicated to honoring the sacrifice and preserving the legacy of our nation's heroes. Each year, we host the **National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** , bringing Americans together in a powerful display of remembrance and patriotism. We also proudly produce **" American Valor: A Salute to Our Heroes,"** a nationally televised tribute to the men and women who have served across generations.

But our work goes far beyond public events. At the heart of our mission is a commitment to **preserve the stories of veterans from every era of service** -- from the final voices of World War II, to those who served in Korea, Vietnam, and the post-9/11 generation. Through these efforts, we ensure that future generations understand the cost of freedom and the courage it has taken to defend it.

This year, American Veterans Center is marking historic military milestones: the 250th anniversaries of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps...the 80th anniversary of the victories that won World War II...and key events in the Korean War 75 years ago, and the Vietnam War which ended 50 years ago this year.
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2znp5fd70q1ja9oscgdc1ucf0q9eeifpjnk9sibn8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hmepr0c3h2bs)
---
**We may never have another opportunity like this to recognize their sacrifice on a national scale.**

[**To mark the occasion, I want to send you a full-size (3x5ft) American flag when you make a gift of $25, $50, $100 or more to support the American Veterans Center 's historic campaign: American Honor 2025.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zc79haktq27eftdjg0j41khd1pbmo4trbsbmqcn0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hmepr0c3h2bs)
---
[ **Claim Your FREE Flag Today**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2ze6s63bsv58repk757tl1gqhb6hbi9qnu21bmbug_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hmepr0c3h2bs)
---
This is one of our most ambitious efforts ever, Friend -- a national salute to those who fought to make and keep America free.

**Together, we 're capturing the stories of WWII veterans before it's too late...and preserving seldom-heard accounts from those who fought in Korea, Vietnam, and the post-9/11 wars.**

And with your gift today, I'll send you a free, full-size American flag as my thank you.

To some, it may look like just a flag.

_But to those who served, it 's a promise kept._

It flew over the beaches of Normandy.

It sailed with the Pacific fleet.

It was stitched into the sleeves of every soldier who never made it home.

**This flag reminds us of all they sacrificed, and what we 're now called to defend.**

Let it fly proudly as a reminder that freedom isn't free -- and that this generation will not forget the sacrifices of the last.

[**So please, Friend, make your gift today. Help us preserve their legacy while there's still time -- and proudly fly the flag they fought for.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z28alcol15l5angkvgok0guro03b92i294dsoj9g_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hmepr0c3h2bs)
---
[ **Claim Your Free Flag Today**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zpm1hngelm781bc3kkjfpe2h0gq92420q01ed6eg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hmepr0c3h2bs)
---
Friend, throughout American history, our nation's flag has stood tall.

**I hope you 'll take this opportunity to receive your American flag and fly it proudly, today and every day as a symbol AND promise of freedom.**

Thank you for standing with America's heroes -- past, present, and future.
---
Sincerely,

Tim Holbert
President
American Veterans Center
---
[ **Support the American Veterans Center**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zc9gja2seaequtbeepa8dngr0o7jloue7b3ddndo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hmepr0c3h2bs)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

body:
Reproductive freedom is economic freedom |
#
---
Team, **No parent should be forced into poverty because politicians took away their rights.** But that’s exactly what’s happening, and economists have the studies to back it up. When clinics close and abortion bans force people to carry pregnancies against their will, families are pushed deeper into poverty — sometimes into eviction, debt, or desperation. This is the reality Republicans created by ripping away abortion rights. But we know — abortion _is_ health care. At its core, it is essential to freedom, dignity, and economic security. **And until we restore that right, families will continue to pay the price.** **[Fight Like Hell PAC is working to elect leaders who will fight to bring back reproductive freedom across the country. name: Byron Donalds
subject: I Will Never Wave a White Flag
body:
I need you to read why.

---
| | | | | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zusug3j1tav43ualh3rmup15s8kmijkpv5uo2ti0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9hm1or2c9h2bs)
---
| | | | | The Radical Left is hellbent on forcing me to wave the white flag of surrender, but I'm going on record now saying - **THAT WILL NEVER HAPPEN!**

While the DC elites and liberal billionaires pour their fortunes into ending the _**MAGA Movement**_ , I am convinced that it's the unwavering resolve of patriots like YOU that keeps America strong.

body:
Hochul will be a rubber stamp...

Hochul will be a rubber stamp...
| Friend,
---
The latest poll results show us _BEATING_ Democrat governor Kathy Hochul by 1-POINT once New York voters are fully aware of our positions on the issues.
---
This poll PROVES what I suspect you already knew...
---
**Kathy Hochul’s endorsement and full embrace of radical antisemitic Communist Zohran Mamdani has BACKFIRED catastrophically!**
---
Even in a poll where 48% of the respondents were registered Democrats, just 34% of voters want to see Hochul reelected.

body:
Thank goodness I secured an extension for you!

Friend, you're really a last minute nelly.
They say the early bird gets the worm, but this may be the exception:
[I've managed to secure you a brief EXTENSION!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjcvu85l83go3ausutlumppi3l9m5j08tedsceco_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9jm8pj4cdh2bs)

I'd hate for you to make a massive mistake in ignoring this any longer.
After everything you've given and everything you've meant to us over the years, leaving us hanging right before we close our books for the quarter would be completely devastating.
Not to mention you'd be leaving the ultimate recognition for your support on the table!
You see, we're already in the process of conducting our quarterly audit at House GOP Headquarters.
[And again, we noticed that despite being one of our most dedicated patriots (Top 10% to be exact), you still had left your PLATINUM STATUS upgrade UNCLAIMED!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zapogrnq518tdivfsci1rk0j3hnfogiefur77vmg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9jm8pj4cdh2bs)

So I'll just remind you 1 last time!
[The deadline to secure your platinum status is at midnight. After that, this opportunity will be gone. >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdj6uvforg4m8d5gessmgt6mm31k4q9fdft1r2go_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c9jm8pj4cdh2bs)

name: Troy Downing
subject: Hail Mary Moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
That’s it... I’m throwing my final Hail Mary pass.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._-DEQc9SLECxpxvm-Zg)That’s it... I’m throwing my final Hail Mary pass.
Peter, it’s not looking good. **We came up short of our Q3 fundraising goal last week, and I’m down to my last play.**
I was counting on grassroots Patriots like you to help run defense, but I guess I’m out of luck.
I’ve sent texts, sent emails, made phone calls... and I’ve heard nothing. It’s been **__RADIO SILENCE.__**
**THIS. WON’T. DO.**[ CHIP IN TODAY
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-7njzJppm4Q) _I’m**NOT** a quitter_ \- I will keep fighting, even when my back is against the wall.

It's Troy Downing. I’m just a guy from Montana taking a huge leap of faith.
Peter, I'm also a U.S. Air Force combat veteran. A God-fearing Christian, a husband, and a proud dad.
**I've taken my seat in Congress, and I couldn’t be more honored to serve you!**
But, I still need to make one thing clear to my new colleagues: the American people are demanding real change. To do that, I need your help to shatter my next goal. I’m asking you, person to person, please **CHIP IN TODAY.** [Whether it’s $5 or $100, EVERYTHING HELPS.](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[CHIP IN TODAY
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[You’re on deck, Peter. Will you help me crush this next goal?](https://trk.emails.troydowning._svw)

Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Congressman Troy Downing| |

name: Team Marsha Blackburn
subject: FROM: Peter TO: President Trump
body:
You have unlocked this exclusive opportunity due to your incredible Team Marsha record of supporting President Trump.

| | | | Hey there –
We are putting together a letter of support for President Trump and want YOUR name to be at the very TOP.
You have unlocked this exclusive opportunity due to your incredible Team Marsha record of supporting President Trump. [So, Peter, please take a minute to review and sign our letter at your earliest convenience:](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._asUrBf6_-BdjPzilH1hg)Dear President Trump,
I am writing to express my unwavering support for your leadership as the 47th President of the United States.
Your vision and values for the future of our country deeply resonate with me and I am eager to work alongside you in advancing the America First Agenda. I firmly believe that your leadership is exactly what our nation needs at this critical time.
From the beginning, I have been a proud supporter of your efforts:
1) Your dedication to securing our borders, lowering taxes, strengthening our economy, and prioritizing national security has proven time and time again that YOU are the right person to lead America.
2) Your commitment to defending our families and restoring common-sense policies has had a lasting impact on our country, and I am confident that YOUR leadership will bring prosperity and safety BACK to our nation for all Americans.
Please know that you have my full support as you continue working toward seeing the America First Agenda through to the end and reversing all the radical policies that have been imposed by the Biden-Harris Administration.
Thank you for your dedication to preserving the values that make America great.
Together, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
Sincerely,
X_________________ | [ SIGN THE LETTER >> ](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._0VfCU1oTw9PQ)
---
Thank you,

Team Marsha Blackburn
| |
---
| | Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account.
---

Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund
PO Box 3750
Brentwood, TN 37024

This message reflects the opinions and representations of Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund's online community.

To unsubscribe from Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund , [click here](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._-w)

subject: Dark Nightmares
body:
I've been having nightmares recently that are dark beyond description. Terrifying. One occurred at 3:30 in the morning on the day that Charlie was killed. In one nightmare, a landline phone next to my bed rang. I answered, and on the other end was some demon, the most haunting voice I've heard in my life, saying, "I'm in your basement."

| | [****](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkT2P3CAQhn8N7ryCwWa9BUUky92lTWnNwtiLznwIsPP3IzY6pUlzHbzzzCs9ml8f6we6w4X9J3rS5nJrLqvF_Bnc_qoeM5UVOIy94L2ANeVYEpm6is5qY5WEjrS4Kw5KwvjoXhpGfBAKNU7PgQ8wKJLbttlpGh8TbmA7p1uf4AIE53zkNxwm4Pz-NEZtSPbOBn4mi5XKzcRQKF9Y3UUuhNheMdxM9N2hX7WmwuQPBguDpZA5M90wkI21EQyW-Em0kSfrcM_xTC3ye9_0-n9-vX_2KSZkcjmrX0s8syEm5_-gDFRDWuPpmZzfa38zgz6h2wOT85ff1ySGSqEyOZvLMVDo4_n-wthlbdNvdxyuqOa9e3THW69-6xaXhj8BAAD__4NrmL4) [****](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkT2P3CAQhn8N7ryCwWa9BUUky92lTWnNwtiLznwIsPP3IzY6pUlzHbzzzCs9ml8f6we6w4X9J3rS5nJrLqvF_Bnc_qoeM5UVOIy94L2ANeVYEpm6is5qY5WEjrS4Kw5KwvjoXhpGfBAKNU7PgQ8wKJLbttlpGh8TbmA7p1uf4AIE53zkNxwm4Pz-NEZtSPbOBn4mi5XKzcRQKF9Y3UUuhNheMdxM9N2hX7WmwuQPBguDpZA5M90wkI21EQyW-Em0kSfrcM_xTC3ye9_0-n9-vX_2KSZkcjmrX0s8syEm5_-gDFRDWuPpmZzfa38zgz6h2wOT85ff1ySGSqEyOZvLMVDo4_n-wthlbdNvdxyuqOa9e3THW69-6xaXhj8BAAD__4NrmL4) Dear Patriot,

I've been having nightmares recently that are dark beyond description. Terrifying. One occurred at 3:30 in the morning on the day that Charlie was killed.

In one nightmare, a landline phone next to my bed rang. I answered, and on the other end was **some demon** , the most haunting voice I've heard in my life, saying, "**I'm in your basement.** "

I sat up immediately, not knowing if it was real or a dream. My hands ran alongside my bed to feel the fabric in the darkness. It took some time to recognize that I was awake. I looked at my nightstand, and there was no phone.

Those who know much more about God and the Devil than I do say that this is an example of spiritual warfare. They tell me that it's meant to terrify me, to make me question myself and my own sanity. **These nightmares, this evil, come just before a story OMG will be breaking that I believe will expose evil in a way we've never seen before**.

The story was placed on hold due to the shock and grief we've all felt for Charlie Kirk. I used to run stories by Charlie to get his feedback. I relayed our next release to Charlie before he was shot. It was the last text Charlie Kirk ever sent me. I prefer to keep the message private, but he understood the significance of the story and that **it strikes at the heart of evil in our nation.**

I'm reluctant to "hype" stories anymore. That's not my intent. But I am asking for your help.

First, I'm humbly asking for your prayers for me and OMG's staff. If you're a believer, I don't need to say anything else, other than "thank you."

Secondly, [**your support is needed**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkT2P3CAQhn8N7ryCwWa9BUUky92lTWnNwtiLznwIsPP3IzY6pUlzHbzzzCs9ml8f6we6w4X9J3rS5nJrLqvF_Bnc_qoeM5UVOIy94L2ANeVYEpm6is5qY5WEjrS4Kw5KwvjoXhpGfBAKNU7PgQ8wKJLbttlpGh8TbmA7p1uf4AIE53zkNxwm4Pz-NEZtSPbOBn4mi5XKzcRQKF9Y3UUuhNheMdxM9N2hX7WmwuQPBguDpZA5M90wkI21EQyW-Em0kSfrcM_xTC3ye9_0-n9-vX_2KSZkcjmrX0s8syEm5_-gDFRDWuPpmZzfa38zgz6h2wOT85ff1ySGSqEyOZvLMVDo4_n-wthlbdNvdxyuqOa9e3THW69-6xaXhj8BAAD__4NrmL4). [**Any amount that you can contribute is appreciated**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkT2P3CAQhn8N7ryCwWa9BUUky92lTWnNwtiLznwIsPP3IzY6pUlzHbzzzCs9ml8f6we6w4X9J3rS5nJrLqvF_Bnc_qoeM5UVOIy94L2ANeVYEpm6is5qY5WEjrS4Kw5KwvjoXhpGfBAKNU7PgQ8wKJLbttlpGh8TbmA7p1uf4AIE53zkNxwm4Pz-NEZtSPbOBn4mi5XKzcRQKF9Y3UUuhNheMdxM9N2hX7WmwuQPBguDpZA5M90wkI21EQyW-Em0kSfrcM_xTC3ye9_0-n9-vX_2KSZkcjmrX0s8syEm5_-gDFRDWuPpmZzfa38zgz6h2wOT85ff1ySGSqEyOZvLMVDo4_n-wthlbdNvdxyuqOa9e3THW69-6xaXhj8BAAD__4NrmL4).

This story was one of our least expensive to produce, and you'll see why when it comes out. But it will open the floodgates of truth, and we need to be prepared for that. This story has the potential to change the world, but that's not up to me. OMG, reports the truth, the world decides. But I would be negligent in my duties if we're not prepared to deal with a flood of high-level whistleblowers after this release. And that's where your support is needed. [**Please, donate whatever you can today**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkT2P3CAQhn8N7ryCwWa9BUUky92lTWnNwtiLznwIsPP3IzY6pUlzHbzzzCs9ml8f6we6w4X9J3rS5nJrLqvF_Bnc_qoeM5UVOIy94L2ANeVYEpm6is5qY5WEjrS4Kw5KwvjoXhpGfBAKNU7PgQ8wKJLbttlpGh8TbmA7p1uf4AIE53zkNxwm4Pz-NEZtSPbOBn4mi5XKzcRQKF9Y3UUuhNheMdxM9N2hX7WmwuQPBguDpZA5M90wkI21EQyW-Em0kSfrcM_xTC3ye9_0-n9-vX_2KSZkcjmrX0s8syEm5_-gDFRDWuPpmZzfa38zgz6h2wOT85ff1ySGSqEyOZvLMVDo4_n-wthlbdNvdxyuqOa9e3THW69-6xaXhj8BAAD__4NrmL4).

Thank you again for all that you do and, as always, stay tuned.

In Truth, James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

name: The Flyover
subject: Federal Layoffs Start, Tech Stocks Fall, and Maritime Lions
body:
The Trump administration laid off [more than 4,100 federal employees](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO6yAURL8GOkdwDTYuKF7jLq_d0iLmElhhE8FNIv_9yqtttt76jGZ05uO6XF3Kab__dxtaCmXZ8d0yEmFdAnqsLmd3lBBaI1eJcI2NFhCgOyk6CYt3KR-L4t4GRMCeo5XjIGDoe6V4tH4SZljV5IwZXAiD13jrhbiBmfyIq-LJnm1SSJBCAMCld15LY4zT6xhUmJgS6BOVevksaaeIIR_lhfWylo1nG4kejfX_GMwMZooYU84nYzDHsuEpxGB2fkt7alQdpbIzmLXWQgvdUX1uj-437n6cuxaf5Mv7zPNq_eOdck5tGJkS982l7x1OfzruZeErAAD__0tchAA) Friday amid the ongoing government shutdown, with more layoffs to come, according to administration officials.

# Sunday, October 12, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1492, [Christopher Columbus landed](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFu7CAUheHV2B0WXIPtV1C8xt2kTWlhuAxE2IzgziDvPpooO0j9SedI_-dtu5mY4nn_MAdq8nk7sdWERFg2jw6LSclc2ftayRQitKHSBhwUE5wJ2JyJ6dpk77RHBBx71GKeOEzjKGUf9Ii7HHfhhLB-n6fJOKXAWbnMylivZB_1e01wAYJzABhG45RYlsUoO3vp_3WSo4uUy_CV40kBfbryC8tg89EnHYgetRv_d7B2sLbWhhAr5XK9vYOVQqzMmYvFk_1KB6vN6Xnsz8oKGhuwMgrITmys5ZJcX7R7tJhSrNPcSX4_TEw_f_SnSC8N3wEAAP__yBJ9sw) in the Bahamas, believing he reached East Asia, claiming the land for Isabella and Ferdinand of Spain. Sportsmanship is alive in an Oklahoma girls' basketball team. ## Shutdown Layoffs Begin
The Trump administration laid off [more than 4,100 federal employees](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO6yAURL8GOkdwDTYuKF7jLq_d0iLmElhhE8FNIv_9yqtttt76jGZ05uO6XF3Kab__dxtaCmXZ8d0yEmFdAnqsLmd3lBBaI1eJcI2NFhCgOyk6CYt3KR-L4t4GRMCeo5XjIGDoe6V4tH4SZljV5IwZXAiD13jrhbiBmfyIq-LJnm1SSJBCAMCld15LY4zT6xhUmJgS6BOVevksaaeIIR_lhfWylo1nG4kejfX_GMwMZooYU84nYzDHsuEpxGB2fkt7alQdpbIzmLXWQgvdUX1uj-437n6cuxaf5Mv7zPNq_eOdck5tGJkS982l7x1OfzruZeErAAD__0tchAA) Friday amid the ongoing government shutdown, with more layoffs to come, according to administration officials. The most significant layoffs took place at the Treasury Department, with 1,446 employees receiving reduction in force notices Friday. The Department of Health and Human Services also saw major cutbacks, with roughly 1,100 to 1,200 employees affected. The layoffs [spanned five other federal departments](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDHO3CAQhU-DOywYA3YKijTu_rQpLRaGNQk2Fsyu5dtHjjYnSDOaYvTefN_Pr-XLpZz25w-3oaVYlh3PlpEI6xIxYHU5u6vE2Bq5SoR-bbSAAM2l4BKW4FK-FtUFGxEBhw6tHI0AMwxKdavVgzZaee-V0j4YZ1wMDycV6IeIU5i6ZO80KSRIIQCgH1zQcpomp_0YVfzGlMCQqNT-V0k7rRjzVd5Ye1-2LtuV6Ghs-M5gZjCf59m_mqMS3HUfMJgblXoxmG8yBvNRcqLk7_UuZjBL8W9QfW0H31xr_EPNPxL4WepvrI0_7-p9w514W18UyrnzmuIdNxkDWgstxMhg7qoNx5lyTs2MTInn5lL--zP9l-i3hT8BAAD___TMkeE): 315 workers in the Commerce Department; 466 in the Education Department; 187 in the Energy Department; 442 in the Department of Housing and Urban Development; and 176 in the Department Homeland Security. The figures were detailed in a court document the Justice Department submitted in response to a lawsuit from unions representing government workers.
## Biden to Undergo Cancer Treatment
Former President Joe [Biden is receiving radiation](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGupDAQRE9jMiO7MQMEDjYhm003RI3dHjzyYGS3BnH7Ff8KPyuppCq99--5PDGmuL_-4ocsh7zsdNZEzFSWQJ4KpoRXDqFWxsJMbqu8gIJeaiU1LB5juhbTeBuIgLqGrB4eCh5dZ0yz2RXcNPSmU-BHPfRuMmHqjdJrcKtb3dhEe69ppUErBQBth77X4zhi74ZgwiSMIh85l_ad484bhXTlL5XW5U-T7MZ8VNH9ETALmM_zbN1ab4q7FzDfUcD8ziTX6GmXR8mVkUk63B0VWdBH5Jh3yRsVPC4Bc1OsP86YUqyPQRj1-mBMP4f8K0tfC_8DAAD__6vkfT4) and hormone therapy for prostate cancer as part of his ongoing treatment plan, according to a spokesperson. Diagnosed with an aggressive [prostate cancer in May](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2O5SAQhE-DMyxo_PcCgk2czaYbWv2gGTPCYEFrLN9-5Q32ApPWJ5Wqvj8f2wfGFPPnbzzIcihbpqslYqa6BfJUMSW8SwitMVZmcnvjDRSMUiupYfMY070NnbeBCMh0ZPU8KZiMGYZut5NZSPtxdoSvEGiaHLz9aOZFewXO-S7ap00rDVopAOgN-lEvy4Kjm8MQXmJQ5COX2n-VmHmnkO7yTbV35eiS3ZnPJswvAauA9bquPr_d8-LhAtazpMjRNQHrVyH5jp6ygDWUelCVZ6X2JCz_Q1nRR-RYsuSdKp63PGtpjEzSYXZUZXUZwcxKv7pq_XnFlGKbZjGozwNj-reMf6Tz28LfAAAA__-9A4yf), Biden is expected to undergo five weeks of radiation therapy while continuing his pill-based hormone treatment. Doctors discovered [Biden’s prostate cancer](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOwyAQBNCvwV0sWAgmBcU17nLtldYalpiImAivYvnvT75fuG6kkZ4083Of7phLXh_f-CLPqU4r7VshZmpTokgNS8GjprRtjI2ZwrLxBBKuFyUvCqaIuRyT6aJPREC6I68GK8FqbUy3eB2DVugQtVEwO-tsgJuM8-B0tDeNXfanpqQCJSUA9BrjVTnn8BqGZNJNGEkxc239s-aVF0rlqB9qfaivrviF-b0J_SVgFDDu-97Pczg7AeM5RsCIjXModMagKJId5HM9atd8fO-5lLzZQRj5eGEufyr_64qPh98AAAD__z3Ycfk) after he reported urinary symptoms that led to finding a small nodule, later classified as Gleason score 9 with bone metastasis. Recently, President Biden [underwent Mohs surgery](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDHO4yAQRk-DO0d4MLZTUGzjLttuaU1gCLPCEMEoUW6_yl7hrz_pe3rvz-24IWcuj994kpNYj0LvnkmE2hEpUMOc8VNj7F2wiZBPXQ7QYMdJjxMcATl_jnkILhIBmYHctC4aFmPmeUjOmAArWL1G0luIIfg7-buluAZ9XRAGdt-3SU8waQ0AF4PBTtu2ofVrnONVzZoCS22Xv5WLJIr5U1_ULr6eQ3ZJ5NmV-aVgV7BLosQ5fzcFe6onfYUU7BhOLtyloXAtCnZrrb4aO945UBmfrXZBodFj8dRGaYRyUhEF-9BceL45Z-7Lqmb9OJH_Ewb5UbKXg38BAAD__3Hdgas) to remove skin cancer from his forehead, leaving a small scar.
## Actress Diane Keaton Dead at 79
Oscar-winning [actress Diane Keaton](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFu9CAQBOCnwZ1PsMbYLij-hu7-NqW1McuZBMMJVnfy20fOK6SZZqRvpPm4r3eMKebHfzzIcihrpndLxEx1DeSpYkp4lhBaY6zMtO2NV5Aw9kr2ClaPMZ2r7rwNREBDR1ZNRoIZBq273ZrPQSIuUo5GwuSN0iNQmJfNGD2OWnXRXpqSCpSUAHAb0I9qnmcctynosAgtyUcu9fZVYuadQjrLi-ptK0eX7M78bGL4J8AJcPl8lsZXJcBdsACn5BVKgKPMVBljPiizAOcjZuq_Cbnk3hP6HrmfFgGuq9Y_3zGl2MwktHwcGNPvIv_pppeFnwAAAP__VnB45A), celebrated for her quirky charm and iconic roles in _Annie Hall_ , T _he Godfather_ films, and _Father of the Bride_ , has died at 79. Keaton made [her film debut in 1970's](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLtu4zAQAL9G6mjwIYpSweIad772SmFNLq290KRAbuz47wPnF1IPMAPMv8t2AcpUbn_hjp5T3Qo-e0ZmbFvCiA1yhldNqXeGxoxh77xpqa1QUii9RaD82qYx-oSo0YzolZulno2ZpnH3boUVbTRLhDBDtNJejZvgapOzaIMcyb9tSiqtpNRanwxEq5ZlARtcmtI6TBIjcW2n_5UK75jyqz6wnUK9j9nvzEcfzJ9Bnwd9PrAeGd9o0OdIUFB8IHAtIiJEUXuAJp5UCpWbgMANexeRsAtg4VaBXyF_dnqgWGZplFrG5uPxpJypz26Y5O0OlH_S_KtfD6-_AwAA__-XcX_3) _Lovers and Other Strangers_ , but her breakthrough came as Kay Adams in Francis Ford Coppola's _The Godfather_ in 1972. She later admitted she never read Mario Puzo's novel before auditioning. Her numerous [collaborations with filmmakers](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAURb_G3hzBA2MzMHTJlq4drQc8YlpiIvyUyH9fub_Q8epK9-qcr9tyw1zydv_EBzlOddnovRdiprYkitSwFDxqSvvO2JgprDsvIGAcpBgkLBFzORbdR5eIgFRPTk5GgFFK6351xkcpgrdWR69pHCdSSngPYY5egVF9dueaFBKkEABwURhHOc8zjmFKOtlOC4qZa7t817zxSqkc9UXtEuqjL25lfu6d-ujg2sEVnyfAWZ2hcQ6FOrjGjBsNP4RctyESxiFCmq3w1sjkrTAhee_Raz9hUsIG0zcXn-9cSt7N1Glxf2Auf5f8L08vB78BAAD__5y0e1Q) Woody Allen and Nancy Meyers introduced her to new audiences and generations of moviegoers, earning praise for both her acting and her trendsetting fashion sense. Keaton, who had not been seen publicly in six months and never disclosed any illness, leaves behind her two children, Dexter and Duke, whom she adopted in her 50s. [See her life in photos here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO6yAQRb8Gd7ZgDAYXFK9xl9duaU3MELNLIDKjWPn7VXY_Yet7dY50Pi7rBVNO5fYf7-Q51rXQ2TIx07FGCnRgzviqMbbGeDDTtjdeQYLplewVrAFTfq26Cz4SAY0deWUnCdM4at3t3kwzbNZoZzYF6CbnrJ1QXWcT1BVH7JJ_05RUoKQEgGHEYJRzDs1mo46z0JJC4noMnzUV3inmV33SMWz13mW_Mz-aGP8JWAQs53kOVEtOhd67gOWxV65NwDLaGaSAJSQs1H8Rci19TpH6VPrfV3f48DhTzqlNVmh5u2PKPx7-U5ynh-8AAAD__yg1eCU).****

[Your gift today](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkb-unTAMh58mbKDECX_OwFDpiu127YhMYiBXCUGJz0Hn7Svau3Tu4sGfP1vW79fn_Ik--GP7iZFGXtN80FUCMVOeV3KUMQR8p3UthTEzk90LzyChrZWsFcwOfXjPpnLjSgSkKxpV30notDam2sfH0Csyi9YWqdO09OaBVnatGYi0BVv58d6mpAIlJQA0Gl2rhmHA1varWR_CSHKeU26-kj94pzW804tyY1Oswrgzn0XoHwImAdN1Xc0XXb7sr-QtNSlvAiaXDmS6MS0Cps2_qN4pnLUvGSnUeLi68F3_uvVJ6Qy38H1L6OnJcS7pmS0J_YGuCOjuViTnn1Hoj8Q7ZQFdoS3SwbNN7p68lqVAi05134LFeKLfjn9YlUd3Xj4EX7peGLlF9OHPg_xfqbxG-B0AAP__-UikOw) can make a life-saving difference. Your support provides:
* Resources to rebuild homes and communities devastated by the Iranian missile strikes
* Trauma counseling and recovery care for war-affected families
* Rent assistance and income support for those who’ve lost everything
* Safe spaces: bomb shelters, emergency ambulances, and protective gear
* Mobile shelters offering warmth, security, and joy for children
* Help for Jewish immigrants from Ethiopia adjusting to new lives
* Relief for Holocaust survivors and elderly

**Whatever happened to Eli an Gonzalez?** Elian Gonzalez became a national sensation in 1999, after he and his mother left Cuba by boat for the U.S., only to have the boat sink. His mother died, but Elian was rescued clinging to an inner tube and brought to his great-uncle in Miami.

A high-profile custody and immigration battle followed, pitting his Miami relatives against his father in Cuba. That ended with a federal raid on the Miami house, where armed agents took the child from the uncle, a moment captured in [this award-winning news photo.](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL0OnDAQhJ8GOiN7bf4KF2noLm1KtOA1ODL2yewd4u0jkkdIN6ORRjPfr9f8whBD2n7iQZZ9nhNdZyRmKrMnRwVjxDt7f56MhZnW_eQZJLRCSaFgdhjiPZvaWU8EpGuyqu8kdFobU-92WRBcPzhqQckFVTtqM7TQ46D7kWisg33alFSgpASARqNr1TAM2K69N36sjCQXOJfmdw6Jd_Lxzl8qzZqPOtqd-X1W-kcFUwXTdV1NWtbnxZNXMD2ygikih5T_eeHy-jkoMZZbUAwiiUIHHQuVkDax5Fus-Nl2FngEJz7iFKk3o5ZdXax7XyHGcHZ9ZeR2YIh_h_B_0fta-BMAAP__VYmEvg) After being sent back to Cuba, Gonzalez grew up and studied industrial engineering at the University of Matanzas, and then worked in a state company handling tourism. In 2023, he became a deputy member of Cuba's National Assembly of People's Power

Gonzalez has publicly stated that he doesn't regret growing up in Cuba, despite "difficult situations." In a 2023 interview, he said he led a simple life, noting that he is married and has a young daughter named "Eliz" in honor of his late mother, Elizabeth. The layoffs : 315 workers in the Commerce Department; 466 in the Education Department; 187 in the Energy Department; 442 in the Department of Housing and Urban Development; and 176 in the Department Homeland Security. The figures were detailed in a court document the Justice Department submitted in response to a lawsuit from unions representing government workers. body:

| | | | | The Radical Left is hellbent on forcing me to wave the white flag of surrender, but I'm going on record now saying - **THAT WILL NEVER HAPPEN!**

While the DC elites and liberal billionaires pour their fortunes into ending the _**MAGA Movement**_ , I am convinced that it's the unwavering resolve of patriots like YOU that keeps America strong.

My name is Byron Donalds,_I 'm a PROUD Trump-endorsed MAGA Republican running for Governor of Florida_ and I have to keep it real with you:
_This isn 't just an election - it's a battle for America's future. If we lose Florida - we lose the whole nation to the Woke Mob._

Florida is our last line of defense against a corrupt Democrat Establishment who have made it abundantly clear how much they **HATE****** our _America First agenda_.

**_If MAGA loses this race, you can kiss the country you love goodbye._**

Goodbye to President Trump's America First Agenda, America's Golden Age, and so much more.

I couldn't wait another day to send you this. We need to respond right at this moment.

name: Tyler Bowyer, Turning Point Action
subject: Charlie built a machine the Left never saw coming
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TURNING POINT ACTION (TPACTION
body:
When I heard of Charlie Kirk, he wasn't famous.

| | | [](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyckTGvnDAMxz9N2DglDiS8gaHqCanDe2vHyDjmiF4CNAlX9dtXtDd07mbZ_59_svz93b1jiGF7fGDikZ7B5eJoxRwDz2eIFRPSGjauK0d2IKFvlWwVuCPv5WCqTjV-JG80NDwqayQYM_S6WUcAbwnmziPxYsnYbrY9D_atX2zfe92E8dqnpAKlpOzVTfMgFSOD8mZe7CI6eR4eK5cb7Vvh_MQanhy2bb-qfbvRnpo4rrUeRegvAiYBU2E6M99wY7_XKyFgqgfSBQiYrO5mMJ1tB81921nL7dvCqvVqAO6WuQMGoaeyn5nY0e5Z6PvXbx8WrJUCzFmTS-zPJPSdE4b46v0FhL6vmD2WT4f04zUiTAeGxyb0nT5d5AfSL5ew0voKVM7pH0uTR3_8DDGGYqzo5OPS_Lm1_u-PniP8DgAA__-bh6Gx)
---
Friend, When I heard of Charlie Kirk, he wasn't famous. He wasn't filling arenas. He wasn't a household name. A few people told me, _" You've gotta meet this guy -- he's doing something big out in Illinois."_ So I went. Charlie was running Turning Point from a modest office in the Chicago suburbs -- surviving on coffee and pure belief that America was still worth saving.
---
[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyckTGvnDAMxz9N2DglDiS8gaHqCanDe2vHyDjmiF4CNAlX9dtXtDd07mbZ_59_svz93b1jiGF7fGDikZ7B5eJoxRwDz2eIFRPSGjauK0d2IKFvlWwVuCPv5WCqTjV-JG80NDwqayQYM_S6WUcAbwnmziPxYsnYbrY9D_atX2zfe92E8dqnpAKlpOzVTfMgFSOD8mZe7CI6eR4eK5cb7Vvh_MQanhy2bb-qfbvRnpo4rrUeRegvAiYBU2E6M99wY7_XKyFgqgfSBQiYrO5mMJ1tB81921nL7dvCqvVqAO6WuQMGoaeyn5nY0e5Z6PvXbx8WrJUCzFmTS-zPJPSdE4b46v0FhL6vmD2WT4f04zUiTAeGxyb0nT5d5AfSL5ew0voKVM7pH0uTR3_8DDGGYqzo5OPS_Lm1_u-PniP8DgAA__-bh6Gx)
---
_**Above:** The original Turning Point HQ in Lemont, Illinois. This is where it all began -- just Charlie, a vision, and a mission that changed everything. _
---
Back then, we were both organizing young conservatives, both dreaming about how to win back the culture. But when I first sat down with Charlie... _I knew._ Charlie was the visionary. He had the plan. And I HAD to be part of it. I jumped in and never looked back. From that moment on, I was there for all of it. The early conferences and campuses. The road trips. The rallies. The fights. In those days, our team didn't have much. But what we had was conviction -- and that was more than enough. Because we believed in something BIG. Something real. Something urgent. **Faith, family, freedom** -- and the absolute grit to go build something that could save this country. And Charlie? _He did it._ He didn't just build a brand... _He built a machine._ First, Charlie built a movement that changed the hearts and minds of an entire generation -- a seismic shift that flipped the narrative that young people belonged to the Left. Then, he built Turning Point Action to become the grassroots force the Left never saw coming... and beat them at their own game. And, I hitched my wagon to it _from the start._ Charlie and I weren't just friends... We were brothers in the fight. We did everything together.
---
[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyckTGvnDAMxz9N2DglDiS8gaHqCanDe2vHyDjmiF4CNAlX9dtXtDd07mbZ_59_svz93b1jiGF7fGDikZ7B5eJoxRwDz2eIFRPSGjauK0d2IKFvlWwVuCPv5WCqTjV-JG80NDwqayQYM_S6WUcAbwnmziPxYsnYbrY9D_atX2zfe92E8dqnpAKlpOzVTfMgFSOD8mZe7CI6eR4eK5cb7Vvh_MQanhy2bb-qfbvRnpo4rrUeRegvAiYBU2E6M99wY7_XKyFgqgfSBQiYrO5mMJ1tB81921nL7dvCqvVqAO6WuQMGoaeyn5nY0e5Z6PvXbx8WrJUCzFmTS-zPJPSdE4b46v0FhL6vmD2WT4f04zUiTAeGxyb0nT5d5AfSL5ew0voKVM7pH0uTR3_8DDGGYqzo5OPS_Lm1_u-PniP8DgAA__-bh6Gx)
---
We strategized over midnight texts... battled together through COVID, the 2020 Election, and every crisis they threw at us... We created AmericaFest from scratch... launched Turning Point Action to go on offense -- in the very states the GOP had given up on. **And we rallied a grassroots army that put President Donald J. Trump back in the White House in 2024. ** We didn't just talk about chasing ballots... Turning Point Action built the first full-scale, professional ballot-chasing operation on the Right -- _and it delivered real results._ 10 for 10. **In every single state we operated in... Trump won.** In Arizona _alone,_ we chased over 205,000 low-propensity conservative votes -- well beyond the margin of victory. _In Wisconsin?_ 60,000+. _In Nevada?_ 6,000+ -- and we won back a district we hadn't carried in 20 years. _In Michigan?_ 14,000+ votes helped us flip a U.S. House seat and take the state house majority. We didn't just make noise... _We made history. _
---
[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyckTGvnDAMxz9N2DglDiS8gaHqCanDe2vHyDjmiF4CNAlX9dtXtDd07mbZ_59_svz93b1jiGF7fGDikZ7B5eJoxRwDz2eIFRPSGjauK0d2IKFvlWwVuCPv5WCqTjV-JG80NDwqayQYM_S6WUcAbwnmziPxYsnYbrY9D_atX2zfe92E8dqnpAKlpOzVTfMgFSOD8mZe7CI6eR4eK5cb7Vvh_MQanhy2bb-qfbvRnpo4rrUeRegvAiYBU2E6M99wY7_XKyFgqgfSBQiYrO5mMJ1tB81921nL7dvCqvVqAO6WuQMGoaeyn5nY0e5Z6PvXbx8WrJUCzFmTS-zPJPSdE4b46v0FhL6vmD2WT4f04zUiTAeGxyb0nT5d5AfSL5ew0voKVM7pH0uTR3_8DDGGYqzo5OPS_Lm1_u-PniP8DgAA__-bh6Gx)
---
_**Above:** Election Night 2024. Our biggest win yet. That's me on the left -- still fighting beside Charlie, just like we always did. _
---
Friend, I watched Charlie pour everything into this mission. He lived on the road 300+ days a year. We never stopped. _Because Charlie never stopped. _ He didn't build all of this for clout or clicks... Instead, he did it for this country. For all of us. For every parent who feels like they're losing their kid to the Left... For every student who's afraid to speak up... For every American who still believes in this country... Charlie built this movement and this machine for them. For you. And now? After he gave everything for that mission? **We have to carry the torch. We have to keep the machine running -- ****_and make it stronger than ever._** Everything we've felt since the day we lost Charlie -- _we must turn it into action._ He used to ask me (and everyone else at Turning Point) all the time: _" What are we building next?"_ **Well, Friend, here 's the answer: We're building the next generation of grassroots power -- one voter, one precinct, one act of courage at a time.**
---
[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyckTGvnDAMxz9N2DglDiS8gaHqCanDe2vHyDjmiF4CNAlX9dtXtDd07mbZ_59_svz93b1jiGF7fGDikZ7B5eJoxRwDz2eIFRPSGjauK0d2IKFvlWwVuCPv5WCqTjV-JG80NDwqayQYM_S6WUcAbwnmziPxYsnYbrY9D_atX2zfe92E8dqnpAKlpOzVTfMgFSOD8mZe7CI6eR4eK5cb7Vvh_MQanhy2bb-qfbvRnpo4rrUeRegvAiYBU2E6M99wY7_XKyFgqgfSBQiYrO5mMJ1tB81921nL7dvCqvVqAO6WuQMGoaeyn5nY0e5Z6PvXbx8WrJUCzFmTS-zPJPSdE4b46v0FhL6vmD2WT4f04zUiTAeGxyb0nT5d5AfSL5ew0voKVM7pH0uTR3_8DDGGYqzo5OPS_Lm1_u-PniP8DgAA__-bh6Gx)
---
**But it doesn 't happen without you.** _So, here 's my ask..._ Go to church for Charlie. Start a family for Charlie. Join a chapter or coalition for Charlie. Register to vote for Charlie. Chase votes for Charlie. Run for office for Charlie. Commit to WIN. Commit to FIGHT. Commit to FINISH what he started. That's what Charlie would've wanted. I'm not stopping until we save our country. I'm all in -- and if you're reading this, I'm betting that you are, too. If so, I'm honored to fight alongside you. And if you've already been with us for a while -- thank you. Now, let's get to work.
---
**For Charlie.** **God Bless,** **Tyler Bowyer**
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point Action
---
[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyckTGvnDAMxz9N2DglDiS8gaHqCanDe2vHyDjmiF4CNAlX9dtXtDd07mbZ_59_svz93b1jiGF7fGDikZ7B5eJoxRwDz2eIFRPSGjauK0d2IKFvlWwVuCPv5WCqTjV-JG80NDwqayQYM_S6WUcAbwnmziPxYsnYbrY9D_atX2zfe92E8dqnpAKlpOzVTfMgFSOD8mZe7CI6eR4eK5cb7Vvh_MQanhy2bb-qfbvRnpo4rrUeRegvAiYBU2E6M99wY7_XKyFgqgfSBQiYrO5mMJ1tB81921nL7dvCqvVqAO6WuQMGoaeyn5nY0e5Z6PvXbx8WrJUCzFmTS-zPJPSdE4b46v0FhL6vmD2WT4f04zUiTAeGxyb0nT5d5AfSL5ew0voKVM7pH0uTR3_8DDGGYqzo5OPS_Lm1_u-PniP8DgAA__-bh6Gx)
---

But he left us with something powerful -- a machine that works... a machine that's proven and battle-tested. Now it's time to run it -- _and run it like never before._ Bigger. Bolder. body:
Ryan Niblett’s [75-yard punt return touchdown](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAQgOGnwVss7mLjMDB0YUvXjgibuxiJGAuQnbx9lb5C51_6hv_n7u4-prg9vv2TTHtxdhudNVFrVFzK22PNZasz-VZz3qjUEg-fHEocLyAvgC74mN5u6IKZZdDQkYFJSVTqNl271ahxXEjTwMxy4JH1rFkDaz3766ICd9F8MJCAABIA-2kMTAqV4plRBhCDpBBbLn1bqdHLV07vfFDpl_zskllb26u4fgm0Au15nj3VfftEgfaIgbJAu6S4C7ROoI1BoB3UqIYb3Lpiwn7GlGJVkxjk4-lj-oPb_3YcBn8DAAD__wrpc28) in the fourth quarter punctuated Texas’ 23-6 win over No. 6 Oklahoma in the Red River Rivalry.

# Sunday, October 12, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1874, 15-year-old [George B. Dealey](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFugzAQgOGnMRvId4BJBg9d2NK1IzriA1s1vsi2QvL2VfsKfYH_l76v23KjEEPaP-lgW1-bLInPErlWzkuUtHvJqaxMtYgkziWHJ8UFNY4t6BZwcRTiexkaZ1ftrtCwhcloNOYy9Y23PfdXIhhMT3RlWAenL6PZxgnxPmqHTbC_MdCAABoAu2l0Gxs0Zls31A7UoNmFKrmrniu_qGzxLU_O3V2OJlpf66Oo_kPhrHA-z7OrxZOkGBJ3kneFs6fkVpFvhTOnmgMXhbNjivxud5a8c7tSSpwPSk227nGGGEMxkxr0flCIf6v6P6CnxZ8AAAD___AxfEE) went to work as an office boy for the _Galveston_ _News_. In 1885, he founded the _Dallas Morning News_. The city’s Dealey Plaza, the site of the Kennedy assassination, is named after him. A 3-foot robot has been seen patrolling parts of Austin and watching local residents. ## Survey Ranks Texas 3rd-Most Dangerous State
A new survey of the safest states in America has [ranked](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGOqzAQgOHTmI7IM4D9Urh4DV223RKZzBAsTXBkTyC5_Sp7ha1_6Sv-78t0iUnSdvuKdw76WvK08VGFVblMkrfbmstWZ45ac9641JL2KBNaHFqwLeBEMcl76hsKs6UzNBzAO4vO_fNdswby3ewJuuuVfNefzxwt-dkPnjxwR32TwgcDCwhgAfDkB1rYoXPLvKAlML1lSprLSVdWfsW6yDvvXE7XfG8krKqParr_BkeD4xFFWNfn_KkGR6anwbHGhau2VaNybTW3knZu02Zw7AfnmhLocSSRVJ03vb3dY5JfXv82ZQ_4EwAA___-zHa_) Texas No. 48, topping only Mississippi and Louisiana. The study analyzed each state based on 52 criteria, including assaults per capita, financial losses from disasters per resident, and economic factors like unemployment. Texas' highest-rated attribute was workplace safety, ranked the 33rd-best in the country. Texas' worst-rated attribute was emergency preparedness, ranking 48th out of 50. Texas' average rating across all criteria was 38. You can see the full list of states and more information on Texas' ranking [here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGOqzAQgOHTmI7IM4D9Urh4DV223RKZzBAsTXBkTyC5_Sp7ha1_6Sv-78t0iUnSdvuKdw76WvK08VGFVblMkrfbmstWZ45ac9641JL2KBNaHFqwLeBEMcl76hsKs6UzNBzAO4vO_fNdswby3ewJuuuVfNefzxwt-dkPnjxwR32TwgcDCwhgAfDkB1rYoXPLvKAlML1lSprLSVdWfsW6yDvvXE7XfG8krKqParr_BkeD4xFFWNfn_KkGR6anwbHGhau2VaNybTW3knZu02Zw7AfnmhLocSSRVJ03vb3dY5JfXv82ZQ_4EwAA___-zHa_).
## Gov. Abbott Readies Emergency Resources
Gov. Greg Abbott [directed](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGO4zAMRU9jdzIkxWM7hYtt0s22Wxq0SdkEFDGgOM7M7RfJHmFrvkfg_T-fyydw5rL_hjvN9p1kKfSsmcxIlyxlP0RLXQmsihTSqnxCXqKPHy54F-KCwPln6VucV4_X0NIcxsHHYZjGS3vM13HqcaM0bWEN0xhWuPSX6-YDTAFo9S3Pr2fBhxiCDyF24wcmGuIwpDVFj6HpPSGbaGcHGX1DTflHTtJuk3ub58PsUZvLrybemnjb5ezeULfL2cTbK6eJt4dU-3clLaIO1lXMHGzGJxhVB4hsLAWyqwZG7skZEys5pSpfulF1Xw98s8gVqpE6pC2DwstzcBCgk-S4bEpQCd1bRyg7aaszPp6cM9dhbHq_34HzO8D-b_Zzjn8DAAD__4m1ncQ) the Texas Division of Emergency Management to activate state emergency resources ahead of a growing wildfire risk and potential flood risk in parts of the state. According to the Texas A&M Forest Service, dry vegetation across the eastern half of the state, with increased winds and higher temperatures, has created an elevated risk for wildfires. Heavy rainfall from storms in the eastern Pacific moving northward over Mexico and into Far West Texas could lead to flash flooding over the weekend, according to the National Weather Service. Texans can inform themselves on how to prepare for wildfire or flood conditions [here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykj7GO6yAQAL8GuljsxoG4oHiNu7z2SrQci42ETQTIif_-dPmF62dGmq-He1DKaV_-08a2v2NxO79a5t65ulz2ZS11b56pt1J2rq2mg7JDhbcLqAugC5Ty6UYZrFdhAskWjFao9d1c5WoDGe_N5O_R0y1oBNA0gVEjRGYe7zLZ3xgoQAAFgIO5hcgatY4-ogogRsUh9VKHvnLnN7WYz3JwHb7LJrNde382cf0ncBY4f4DKFM5hKYfAWVYbnq-Uc2raiFEtG6X8Ufvfhg-LPwEAAP__kohq4g).
## Texas Wins Red River
Ryan Niblett’s [75-yard punt return touchdown](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAQgOGnwVss7mLjMDB0YUvXjgibuxiJGAuQnbx9lb5C51_6hv_n7u4-prg9vv2TTHtxdhudNVFrVFzK22PNZasz-VZz3qjUEg-fHEocLyAvgC74mN5u6IKZZdDQkYFJSVTqNl271ahxXEjTwMxy4JH1rFkDaz3766ICd9F8MJCAABIA-2kMTAqV4plRBhCDpBBbLn1bqdHLV07vfFDpl_zskllb26u4fgm0Au15nj3VfftEgfaIgbJAu6S4C7ROoI1BoB3UqIYb3Lpiwn7GlGJVkxjk4-lj-oPb_3YcBn8DAAD__wrpc28) in the fourth quarter punctuated Texas’ 23-6 win over No. 6 Oklahoma in the Red River Rivalry. The Longhorns fell behind Oklahoma 6-0 in the second quarter before scoring 23 unanswered points. A [12-yard pass](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGO6yAQgOHT4C4WMwacV1C8hi7bbomwGccjYWMBspPbr7JX2PqXvuL_fvhH4MT78ytsZNtryX6nqyZqjYpPeX-uuex1otBqzjuVWvgMyaNEfQN5A_QxcHp71UU7yfgPOrIwGonG3MehW-2MkSatBtLLrDXRcNczSVCDGpW8x7Fj-8FAAgJIAOxHHRcyaMwyLSgjCCUpcsulbys1eoW6pHc-qfRz3rpk19aOKob_Ap1Ad11XT_XYP1GgOzlSFujmxIdA5wU6jgKdMtooZUxXbDwuTomrGYWSzy1w-oXb33acFn8CAAD__0fOco0) from Arch Manning to DeAndre Moore Jr., the Longhorns’ only offensive touchdown of the day, gave Texas its first lead in the third quarter. Texas intercepted John Mateer three times and held the Sooners to [48 rushing yards](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOhCAUAL8GuzXwVFgLimtIrthrryQoDyV5igFOd__-svcLV08yk8z3wz5cpLgvX25DXZ8h2R2vQlgrZktpX9aU9zKhqyWlHXPJ8XRkgcNwE_wmwHoX6WX7xuuJ-1E0qIWSHKS8q65Z9ehF52Ae50H1znWoRhxgvis_eaXGe2iifssEFyAEFwJaNfiAEqQMUwDuBes5-lhTbuuKFZ-uBHqlE3M7p60hvdZ6FNZ9MDAMzHVdLZZjf0MGZk5EuOAtpFQnR8TAbK7O68_BwFgGZnEbfnoGpudCDaA62WTtjysSxSIV6_myuUh_rfq_Q6eG3wAAAP__o4F6BA) on 30 attempts, an average of 1.6 yards per carry. It was the first time the Longhorns won [consecutive Red River games](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGOgzAQheHTmC7IMxADhYtt6LLtlmiIBxitwZFt4eT2q-QKWz7p6Sv-n9t0I_FyrN-0s83PJUwHl-Q5Z46TD8e6hXikmSmnEA6OKcpJfkKN1wvoC-DkSPxraitnZ-0GqNhCZzQa03dNtVlqgBqN3A7z3Db3YYCh79jdzWJ60859JfaNgQYE0ABYd1e3sEFjlnlB7UC1mp3kEOu8ceYnpcW_wsmxvoe98nbL-ZFU86VwVDiWUuoiR5IHO6H3ReG40s5J4Rh-PW1hJ4Xj-d4frYrWPYp4L8l0qtXrTuI_dv5fkdPiXwAAAP__j5V2FQ) since 2008–09. Texas will travel to Kentucky next weekend.

Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog—your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | Survey Ranks Texas 3rd-Most Dangerous State A new survey of the safest states in America has Texas No. 48, topping only Mississippi and Louisiana. The study analyzed each state based on 52 criteria, including assaults per capita, financial losses from disasters per resident, and economic factors like unemployment. Texas' highest-rated attribute was workplace safety, ranked the 33rd-best in the country. Texas' worst-rated attribute was emergency preparedness, ranking 48th out of 50. Texas' average rating across all criteria was 38. You can see the full list of states and more information on Texas' ranking . Gov. Abbott Readies Emergency Resources Gov. Greg Abbott the Texas Division of Emergency Management to activate state emergency resources ahead of a growing wildfire risk and potential flood risk in parts of the state. According to the Texas A&M Forest Service, dry vegetation across the eastern half of the state, with increased winds and higher temperatures, has created an elevated risk for wildfires. Heavy rainfall from storms in the eastern Pacific moving northward over Mexico and into Far West Texas could lead to flash flooding over the weekend, according to the National Weather Service. Texans can inform themselves on how to prepare for wildfire or flood conditions . Texas Wins Red River Ryan Niblett’s in the fourth quarter punctuated Texas’ 23-6 win over No. 6 Oklahoma in the Red River Rivalry. The Longhorns fell behind Oklahoma 6-0 in the second quarter before scoring 23 unanswered points. A from Arch Manning to DeAndre Moore Jr., the Longhorns’ only offensive touchdown of the day, gave Texas its first lead in the third quarter. Texas intercepted John Mateer three times and held the Sooners to on 30 attempts, an average of 1.6 yards per carry. It was the first time the Longhorns won since 2008–09. body:

-Abigail Spanberger
That's my Democrat opponent's message, friend. She’s traveled all over the Commonwealth telling radical liberals to embrace rage. She wants Democrats to lean into anger and hatred. It’s a sick, un-Christian message and it’s NOT what we need in Virginia or our nation right now.
Now it’s come out that her partner on the ticket this November, Jay Jones, fantasized about committing violence against his political opponent. All because they didn’t agree about politics. Political violence of any kind is totally unacceptable and completely disqualifying from holding political office.
My opponent has stood by Jay Jones even with full knowledge of his vile comments. Every day Spanberger stands by Jay Jones, she legitimizes his fantasy of committing violence against his political opponent.
Jay Jones’ comments make me sick to my stomach, and Abigail Spanberger’s tacit approval of what he said is absolutely revolting. I’ve put everything I’ve got into winning this race so we can make our communities safer and build a brighter future in the Commonwealth. Now, conservatives are facing the threat of violence in a way I never could’ve imagined.
We have never seen the threat of political violence against conservatives like this in our Commonwealth. We cannot let unhinged radicals like Jay Jones and Abigail Spanberger win in November.
I’m fighting to win this race. I’ve put my faith in the Lord, but today I’m putting my trust in YOU.
