name: NRCC HQ
subject: Cutting it close
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Thank goodness I secured an extension for you!

Friend, you're really a last minute nelly.
They say the early bird gets the worm, but this may be the exception:
[I've managed to secure you a brief EXTENSION!](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyMkbuunDAQhp_GdCA8voWCIsqKNDlpUyJjD-xI2BB72JPHj1CUfuv55pvL_-tj_vC0U95--oRjWOZS53AxU96Iw35UnKEH08q-lXAXZRPHMCDoRTc4Smd7sIPRrnmOg9EGF1RrkIMO0Rrjl-XLGm3EVUqrGxpvl-wlSKmNtp2LSksDapUwGOe90D1G4qN04cgVy8szvXAph4_BV-4ycrOPT-azCvVVwCRgqhiugt0n5YKxC0cSMOUSgoDp3D1TvlKbMC1Y6pPOFo_fd5-afOLzqMR0ZKEeSoAtt6lQ3oR6cLlQgL04zcGn09N2U__W79387Uf73XZSOuP0zNIBOKta5ZQVYPHPzBTfxu8ZjCUJ9QhL-_9DTRnj-Un7TtU6ofstedrv8xp-L6bXCH8DAAD__2Lzk3Y)
[At present, you are just $7 short of the annual giving requirement to reach PLATINUM STATUS with House GOP.](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyMkbuunDAQhp_GdCA8voWCIsqKNDlpUyJjD-xI2BB72JPHj1CUfuv55pvL_-tj_vC0U95--oRjWOZS53AxU96Iw35UnKEH08q-lXAXZRPHMCDoRTc4Smd7sIPRrnmOg9EGF1RrkIMO0Rrjl-XLGm3EVUqrGxpvl-wlSKmNtp2LSksDapUwGOe90D1G4qN04cgVy8szvXAph4_BV-4ycrOPT-azCvVVwCRgqhiugt0n5YKxC0cSMOUSgoDp3D1TvlKbMC1Y6pPOFo_fd5-afOLzqMR0ZKEeSoAtt6lQ3oR6cLlQgL04zcGn09N2U__W79387Uf73XZSOuP0zNIBOKta5ZQVYPHPzBTfxu8ZjCUJ9QhL-_9DTRnj-Un7TtU6ofstedrv8xp-L6bXCH8DAAD__2Lzk3Y)
I'd hate for you to make a massive mistake in ignoring this any longer.
After everything you've given and everything you've meant to us over the years, leaving us hanging right before we close our books for the quarter would be completely devastating.
Not to mention you'd be leaving the ultimate recognition for your support on the table!
You see, we're already in the process of conducting our quarterly audit at House GOP Headquarters.
[And again, we noticed that despite being one of our most dedicated patriots (Top 10% to be exact), you still had left your PLATINUM STATUS upgrade UNCLAIMED!](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyMkbuunDAQhp_GdCA8voWCIsqKNDlpUyJjD-xI2BB72JPHj1CUfuv55pvL_-tj_vC0U95--oRjWOZS53AxU96Iw35UnKEH08q-lXAXZRPHMCDoRTc4Smd7sIPRrnmOg9EGF1RrkIMO0Rrjl-XLGm3EVUqrGxpvl-wlSKmNtp2LSksDapUwGOe90D1G4qN04cgVy8szvXAph4_BV-4ycrOPT-azCvVVwCRgqhiugt0n5YKxC0cSMOUSgoDp3D1TvlKbMC1Y6pPOFo_fd5-afOLzqMR0ZKEeSoAtt6lQ3oR6cLlQgL04zcGn09N2U__W79387Uf73XZSOuP0zNIBOKta5ZQVYPHPzBTfxu8ZjCUJ9QhL-_9DTRnj-Un7TtU6ofstedrv8xp-L6bXCH8DAAD__2Lzk3Y)
You're usually quite prompt with every single deadline, so this was concerning to us! You're cutting it quite close but there's still time left.
Look, I know you receive countless messages every day to your inbox. And the last thing we want to do is bother you.
So I'll just remind you 1 last time!
[The deadline to secure your platinum status is at midnight. After that, this opportunity will be gone. >>](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyMkbuunDAQhp_GdCA8voWCIsqKNDlpUyJjD-xI2BB72JPHj1CUfuv55pvL_-tj_vC0U95--oRjWOZS53AxU96Iw35UnKEH08q-lXAXZRPHMCDoRTc4Smd7sIPRrnmOg9EGF1RrkIMO0Rrjl-XLGm3EVUqrGxpvl-wlSKmNtp2LSksDapUwGOe90D1G4qN04cgVy8szvXAph4_BV-4ycrOPT-azCvVVwCRgqhiugt0n5YKxC0cSMOUSgoDp3D1TvlKbMC1Y6pPOFo_fd5-afOLzqMR0ZKEeSoAtt6lQ3oR6cLlQgL04zcGn09N2U__W79387Uf73XZSOuP0zNIBOKta5ZQVYPHPzBTfxu8ZjCUJ9QhL-_9DTRnj-Un7TtU6ofstedrv8xp-L6bXCH8DAAD__2Lzk3Y)
Thank you, in advance, for your support.
Sincerely,

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: Semper Fi. Always faithful.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I often get asked, "Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in?" And to that, I say absolutely.
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=545c4767d47e4ed1902d30b7afd3519b&_e=2zArpeagdvzcmEammlp1d83TqrX1G0DINBHJwKgBzjbhH7UAepdSwlV2ycBaJ3ApqsSskxCjv_OR5xXzjMV4Q_jEmkrpls8PQxLb8Xlz_Y_3DzqvlEY4N_jNzR9E7vChtNU9EG_J-uvIadCcZ7R-CvR0KxldkoUP3RxpwlyFionb-5XUKxl1YrsLKbNFJGwgoZJ6HAgLU5gFzVhBNGLrAQvNTFXv2B85s58oSuxxvatuM7nDi4V6tbZrjm16KVfxDZP4PbhUDRNbZbOYMW2o42PdejMF1mk2u0hSu85V5HXmEezQu6aNmLLMSX3SC_q8KA2axhmtpU3-WdVE_0N9k1YTOuQx9EgEEIIx9sTYlgjNMdyUs1WYYWoAYHiIArLQp1xa9FyFkVbB0W3WkGh_SuMZfNX_6gotvg-K6ECo-TUHj5p2Rz4DalQi6WHgZlYxR6NOnLePlzytoqu3Onj8Aqp5PBjtpzbb2Zk4U2-hwwrZh7uOTAG9XG0wBYJmprNSgXtDcN9TIB2igtVqp98abb_aPyvXvpYn23WbAfUYDtWGBGzbSIJLAMoyPT4_t236CABZirfqaNxY1vDrs7oCQwtmkrKPNIiAfUcr0jW5U5IATVynT11iKQNa12oUKujmnkqJaPUadhVzasrcD6AHKl_iD9MKOgG5umPKxiLmiS4%3D) Semper Fi. Always faithful.
I often get asked, "Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in? [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=545c4767d47e4ed1902d30b7afd3519b&_e=2zArpeagdvzcmEammlp1d83TqrX1G0DINBHJwKgBzjbhH7UAepdSwlV2ycBaJ3ApqsSskxCjv_OR5xXzjMV4Q_jEmkrpls8PQxLb8Xlz_Y_3DzqvlEY4N_jNzR9E7vChtNU9EG_J-uvIadCcZ7R-CvR0KxldkoUP3RxpwlyFionb-5XUKxl1YrsLKbNFJGwgoZJ6HAgLU5gFzVhBNGLrAQvNTFXv2B85s58oSuxxvat0iDECqpI9oMnln-UKlR-H2FsV2Fm3i-U6FYtvRKikR6sN-t6gKZX0gXsez6uxsemqRwJHEDGCzYkAZEJQwubfoVJ6NNM6KMsRliC4BHfWKKRo23gVfaRYmkOdWKyN0rHFarTz7Usm7YE4Dt5af55wEasRI_mHBwNZp2p6wnQ6yYlMWWQczINbquwRMjBJshwLMkAyhVTNkh7AhdRr_WQ2WhF5Mb0vDiyuT4vdKysh3mySxFBTMAxLkSCBg-SzlQ9PA9PKR5OqW9zmCS7OzjaohF0Axy04PuDgT5hXL3q1MccNHkFlNGuOSgEJih28DTBNleAcOqUywg_gIWrHvwuVEEu6tVs3tDuso1_Txy8YuxGghxycd41hc34N39UhPWd3Iq5KSDNF8uI_DXfu5sIzmc2_CSxrO-PxoBgl7BwMkEYdSNBuaWK8NApe3xBgCTE%3D) And to that, I say absolutely.
Friend, my name is Winsome Earle-Sears. I don't often make promises, but I can promise you this: I'm not your typical politician, and I'm not like the others who normally send you these messages:
-I immigrated to the US from Jamaica with my family when I was six years old. -I served in the Marine Corps as an electrician. -I ran a women's homeless shelter and a men's prison ministry.
I've lived a full, rewarding life - and I owe it all to this country. In a world of so much uncertainty, I know one thing to be 100% true: my story is only possible in America.
And now, I'm running for Governor of Virginia - to make certain that the same country that let a poor, black woman ascend to the highest levels of politics remains that way - a beacon of hope.
But the reality we have to confront is that those on the Left are actively trying to tear this down. They aim to destroy the middle class, strip away our 2nd Amendment rights, and brainwash our children.
Not on my watch.
[So, consider this a humble invitation to join my campaign: Will you chip in today—even if it’s just a few bucks—to ensure that we have the means needed to beat my Democrat opponent and win this thing?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=545c4767d47e4ed1902d30b7afd3519b&_e=2zArpeagdvzcmEammlp1d83TqrX1G0DINBHJwKgBzjbhH7UAepdSwlV2ycBaJ3ApqsSskxCjv_OR5xXzjMV4Q_jEmkrpls8PQxLb8Xlz_Y_3DzqvlEY4N_jNzR9E7vChtNU9EG_J-uvIadCcZ7R-CvR0KxldkoUP3RxpwlyFionb-5XUKxl1YrsLKbNFJGwgoZJ6HAgLU5gFzVhBNGLrAQvNTFXv2B85s58oSuxxvasavXFmfkUwkPekSraZZrkHgXQY8FTnyT8IoluxNv57Z6KhULFbrbupabbF_gBiPF6G9vnD4T3nBw98FXIrjJI1qOrIDiFCNl_rAqLq7TJf26Eu1k89OvUmfumYxftMDicmP-FJ4b8w4LmbZIvw9toiRB7YCsRllr3l5hMZZdgePvUtGPR7fO_wMLXnQsZG6iTVwo6D1zz6IiL5W9sLA8kjwcHR6sA4BfOSnBouGWOfFsStqT1FQZMh7fBSuEC029TNXSpTRqU5bEvX_5mR_ATgdfoC8DIiMjimS09ydGG4qugbXGTSI232_nCldsyOHBY185ETVseOFyfsCbembZNpF4JTlQnjgSWIVqJibYRQuiKHhNtQLGX6PLU3n3QOSXrq8Gv-1Eg9UwDqfLoLveDLogswv-I-BjKpcw_Enu-8B3SVNqwYokjumMWmmYnqcCA%3D) [ CHIP IN HERE >>

clean_body: I often get asked, "Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in?" And to that, I say absolutely. Semper Fi. Always faithful. I often get asked, "Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in? And to that, I say absolutely. Friend, my name is Winsome Earle-Sears. I don't often make promises, but I can promise you this: I'm not your typical politician, and I'm not like the others who normally send you these messages: -I immigrated to the US from Jamaica with my family when I was six years old. -I served in the Marine Corps as an electrician. -I ran a women's homeless shelter and a men's prison ministry. I've lived a full, rewarding life - and I owe it all to this country. In a world of so much uncertainty, I know one thing to be 100% true: my story is only possible in America. And now, I'm running for Governor of Virginia - to make certain that the same country that let a poor, black woman ascend to the highest levels of politics remains that way - a beacon of hope. But the reality we have to confront is that those on the Left are actively trying to tear this down. They aim to destroy the middle class, strip away our 2nd Amendment rights, and brainwash our children. Not on my watch. We have a long journey ahead of us, but we will be better off with you on our side. name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: Should I assume we won’t hear back from you?
body:
Peter, is everything OK?

| | | | Peter, why have you been giving us the cold shoulder?
I know I’ve reached out this week about this issue.My team tells me they’ve texted and emailed at least twice too!
Is everything ok? Should we take the hint and assume you aren’t interested in these messages?
That would be truly shocking to me since you’ve always been such a steadfast supporter of mine and President Trump’s mission to save America, so I’m giving you one more chance!
[My ONLY request right now is that you complete the Official Trump Voter Profile before the end of the week.](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.-uog_vow) Really, that’s it! I just need your feedback, nothing more! | [ SUBMIT MY TRUMP VOTER PROFILE ](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)
---
You still have time, but not much, so I encourage you to complete your profile sooner rather than later! I’m also really starting to worry that we haven’t heard from you!

[Please, Peter, if you have a few minutes submit your Voter Profile before time expires!](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)

THANK YOU,
[](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)
Marsha Blackburn

name: Sitting ducks
subject: MAGA unveils Manhattan Project to kill Dem party
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
If ever there was a moment we needed a rallying moment from every Democrat everywhere, this is it
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iMvwu8d9z-x9KpthB9HpxYZbuI_DVu2T1gLYKPgX1SqYsi5pG8QXHSyts7f9pk-yeL5D6a1WenyxJ8T1AJwZNZ1ag7IFUOFImebn8WSIOWcFWO6MfqUGwMr5T9KlCxu_e6SYOJNxQjVRuf5_B-nGQEBcNAa463Jm57ouTRFGEaGTMV5RAHManqPxexB8ZVwF7Fazf7b9EQydgG7N5hk20_1goSaFYdYqrhcDgwhZ9J4bxP9xkvPqlg==&c=rAuRskkFrlfjdaYxPU_g8bhS45zDOel3BXFG_lOiMjZqNFrVMSVNIQ==&ch=lSHv8JhsGoiKWvxosEjYX7zyP4k6V8S4d5U67DTRlbz1k9MpAQ8_Mg==)
---
| Peter,
This is an all hands on deck emergency.
Today MAGA-aligned groups unveiled, "Project Doorstrike", a Manhattan project-esque secret weapon that will give them an unprecedented edge in their blitzkrieg push to win the obscure but critically important 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court reelection.
This little known race will determine whether or not Democrats retain their 3-vote majority on the Supreme Court Race. Losing this majority means that MAGA will ensure that Democrats never win Pennsylvania's 19 electoral college votes again, and the GOP is laser focused on winning this:
---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iMvwu8d9z-x9KpthB9HpxYZbuI_DVu2T1gLYKPgX1SqYsi5pG8QXHSyts7f9pk-yeL5D6a1WenyxJ8T1AJwZNZ1ag7IFUOFImebn8WSIOWcFWO6MfqUGwMr5T9KlCxu_e6SYOJNxQjVRuf5_B-nGQEBcNAa463Jm57ouTRFGEaGTMV5RAHManqPxexB8ZVwF7Fazf7b9EQydgG7N5hk20_1goSaFYdYq4zVUuYQ2Kc1SCNiWqj4wfA==&c=rAuRskkFrlfjdaYxPU_g8bhS45zDOel3BXFG_lOiMjZqNFrVMSVNIQ==&ch=lSHv8JhsGoiKWvxosEjYX7zyP4k6V8S4d5U67DTRlbz1k9MpAQ8_Mg==)
---
| Screengrab of "Project Doorstrike" memo from the Republican State Leadership Committee's website, revealing their plan to unseat 3 Democratic justices in PA's Supreme Court election this November.
---
| | | | Project Doorstrike will blanket PA with canvassers, GOP voter registration drives, and a GOTV turnout machine that can swamp Dems and flip three Democratic-held state supreme court seats in one fell swoop.
Republicans know they are weak during Midterm and off-year elections and they know that the next opportunity that voters have to hit back is the Pennsylvania Supreme Court election this November, now only 23 days away and they are leaving nothing to chance.
We won big in Wisconsin this year - but only because of massive media attention, huge spending from the national Dem party, and the support of millions of grassroots donors from across the country.
There is no similar effort now. We are forced to take on "Project Doorstrike" with only a portion of the resources MAGA has--and with three Dem justices up for retention, the stakes are 3x as high as Wisconsin's race.
The truth is that Democrats are getting massively outspent here 10-1, and unless we can counter Project Doorstrike this is going to kill the Democratic party by ensuring that we never win a Presidential election again.
[Defend Our Courts is on the verge of something big, but we can't save these judges without everyone pitching in and doing what they can to help. We have only 23 days left to mount a counteroffensive to beat MAGA's Project Doorstrike. Can you rush a contribution right now to stop Project Doorstrike before it's too late?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iMvwu8d9z-x9KpthB9HpxYZbuI_DVu2T1gLYKPgX1SqYsi5pG8QXHSyts7f9pk-yduBiru4l5TiZb8ZjyQADEw_AfmfUZFimeqBAu2sUCoUBw7BEiUj8oSuJwm0ARW-ocqxaUiQi8Ez5hskS7AQwQ22FAxafs3jbVRxG3Rg9pvPKNaxonk_kAoHqIR0OepFyNN0v4nPhYAh9Q5k5Z6Q6bS9uMmTZh6AnRT6qaCurwTSvPMoMLs_xHelTVkoJFsut&c=rAuRskkFrlfjdaYxPU_g8bhS45zDOel3BXFG_lOiMjZqNFrVMSVNIQ==&ch=lSHv8JhsGoiKWvxosEjYX7zyP4k6V8S4d5U67DTRlbz1k9MpAQ8_Mg==)

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Late campaign filings raise red flags
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning, Happy Columbus Day, and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

[S](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=14183b6dcc&e=b7b3eddce2)[ubscribe to our daily email list ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1705fbf3ab&e=b7b3eddce2)and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[Boraski files overdue campaign reports; paid most of the money to himself as ‘reimbursement’](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=450af0b0e3&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Bradley Vasoli_
When a township official rakes nearly $30,000 into his campaign coffers since his last election, he’s probably gearing up for a hard-hitting run next time. For Jeff Boraski, there was no next time.

While federal campaign funding records showed a labor union flooded his committee with $27,850 since 2020, the Democratic Falls Township supervisor chose not to run for reelection this year. And before this March, he failed to submit required finance reports for roughly five years.

These events raise three major questions: Why did the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers (IBEW) Political Action Committee give a legislator in a township of only about 34,000 people so much money? Why did the Bucks County Board of Elections, chaired by County Commissioner (and former Falls Supervisor) Bob Harvie, not send Boraski any late-filing notices after 2020? And what did Boraski, an IBEW member, do with all that money?

**Why It Matters**. We’ve reported more than once about the campaign finance shenanigans among the Democrats of Falls Township. It might seem like an undue focus on the corruption of one small borough. But the problems there reflect a deeper countywide problem that truly requires action.

Campaign finance filings often represent the only window into the money fueling a candidate’s campaign — and a clue to where that candidate’s interests lie. That is why in normal circumstances, counties are very strict about fining campaigns for failing to file them, or even for filing them late. Nearly every campaign gets dinged for this a time or two and it ensures that the law is followed.

But Boraski never got a notice or a fine from the Bucks County Board of Elections despite not filing reports for years — while simultaneously accepting tens of thousands from the IBEW’s national PAC.

If that doesn’t suggest a deeper problem, nothing will. Boraski declined to comment for this story. So did every member of the Bucks County Board of Elections. No comment from Democrats Bob Harvie (now a congressional candidate in Pennsylvania’s First District) and Diane Ellis-Marseglia. None from Republican minority commissioner Gene DiGirolamo, either.

_Broad + Liberty_ will keep asking.

**[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4b602550b4&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Budget Task Force? County claims months of meetings, but almost nothing on the public record](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b93c2c5468&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Todd Shepherd_
Against the backdrop of a steep and shocking 24 percent tax increase for Delaware County residents enacted last December, Council Vice Chairman Richard Womack offered his vision for a way forward.

“I had to take a step back like, ‘What can I actually do?’ Or, ‘What can I do for the residents to lessen this burden?’ And so what I kind of came up with is: I really want to see the county put together a budget commission composed of a diverse group of community leaders, faith leaders, union leaders, business leaders and academics,” said Womack, a Democrat up for re-election this year, and the only ‘No’ vote on last year’s proposed tax increase. The commission would report back to the county in six months, he said.

The county now says the commission — since renamed as the “Budget Task Force” — has completed its work (except for delivery of a final recommendation to council), but the task force is unheralded in the public record — no appearance on council agendas, no posted minutes, and no roster of members.

**Why It Matters**. Broad + Liberty sent a detailed list of questions to the county last week, giving it two-and-a-half business days to respond. The questions included a request for the county to list all participating members of the task force — none of whom are listed on the county’s task force webpage — and the dates of various meetings over the last year.

The county largely sidestepped those questions.

It’s possible that if the task force did meet as the county says, those meetings might have been in violation of Pennsylvania’s Sunshine Law which places certain requirements on government meetings so that any particular government may not convene or make decisions completely out of the public eye. Meetings of the task force most likely should have been executed in accordance with the Sunshine Law, which requires the government to provide advance notice to the public of the meetings, agenda items, and more.

It’s a problem since, as [Wally Nunn notes in a separate article this week](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=145b97d103&e=b7b3eddce2), serious questions about the budget remain unanswered and have for months.

Although not speaking directly to the matter at hand, Melissa Melewsky, media law counsel for the Pennsylvania NewsMedia Association, says even most ad hoc committees or task forces are held to Sunshine Law standards when they render advice or make decisions on agency business, although there are some exceptions. If they were not, it would create a loophole in which governments could routinely move decisionmaking to darker corners by simply delegating those decisions to subcommittees. **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8705fa71b6&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Exclusive interview**
This week, managing editor Kyle Sammin [talked with Stacy Garrity](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=af218a89ff&e=b7b3eddce2), Pennsylvania’s state treasurer and a leading candidate for governor in 2026. Meanwhile, Paul Davis [caught up with local activist Frank Scales](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d85b714a90&e=b7b3eddce2) about his recent viral confrontation with DA Larry Krasner.****
---
|
---
|
# **4\. Lightning Round**
* **[Ben Mannes: Are Krasner’s violence prevention grants politically targeted?](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1221f1e79e&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Wally Nunn: The hidden tax bomb in Delaware County Council’s budget](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=95f22677b4&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Guy Ciarrocchi: Questions that Democrats need to answer](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ca47c84993&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Thom Nickels: President’s House is politics over architecture — and everything else](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=66559bada6&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Stew Bolno: Is Donald Trump a stable genius?](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=098a2ae8a5&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
---
|
# **5\. Podcast**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=cde5beaca2&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
# **6\. What we're reading**
They say “only Nixon could go to China,” but we might have to update that to “only Trump can go to Gaza” after the President brought the two warring sides together in what looks to be an end to the two-year Gaza War that has raged since Hamas’s horrific massacre of Israelis on October 7, 2023.

Shocking that Trump could succeed where Biden failed? [National Review’s Rich Lowry](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=5a291acfe7&e=b7b3eddce2) doesn’t think so. “A lifetime of maneuvering for advantage in the real estate and media worlds in New York City — searching for and using every ounce of leverage — was better preparation for high-level international diplomacy than if Trump had spent a lifetime on the Senate Foreign Relations Committee.” Maybe the folks at the State Department could learn a thing or two.****
---
|
---
|
# **7\. Rough week**
The Phillies fell apart in the playoffs and the Eagles lost to the once-laughable Giants. Where do they go from here? [Grace Del Pizzo](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3a38d2d51a&e=b7b3eddce2), [Matthew De George](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=2cbee97331&e=b7b3eddce2), and [Tim Kelly](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=763390b20c&e=b7b3eddce2) ask all the hard questions at On Pattison — a part of the Fideri News Network.
---
|
---
|
# **8\. Flashback**
The governor’s race in California went crazy this week after a video of a train-wreck interview by Dem. gubernatorial candidate Katie Porter went viral because of Porter’s, uh,...bad behavior? sense of entitlement? After which, more stories began to surface suggesting Porter was just a not-fun person to work for.

We are not saying that this story is perfectly analogous to something here in Pennsylvania, but it feels like a good time to remind you that in 2022, B+L’s Todd Shepherd [reported on allegations of bad behavior](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ffb533f100&e=b7b3eddce2) against PA State Senator Katie Muth, and the facts about incredibly high staffer turnover in her office.****
---
|
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=06b6ebbb1f&e=b7b3eddce2)
---

clean_body: If ever there was a moment we needed a rallying moment from every Democrat everywhere, this is it | | | | | == | Friend, This is an all hands on deck emergency. Today MAGA-aligned groups unveiled, "Project Doorstrike", a Manhattan project-esque secret weapon that will give them an unprecedented edge in their blitzkrieg push to win the obscure but critically important 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court reelection. This little known race will determine whether or not Democrats retain their 3-vote majority on the Supreme Court Race. Losing this majority means that MAGA will ensure that Democrats never win Pennsylvania's 19 electoral college votes again, and the GOP is laser focused on winning this: | | == Screengrab of "Project Doorstrike" memo from the Republican State Leadership Committee's website, revealing their plan to unseat 3 Democratic justices in PA's Supreme Court election this November. Project Doorstrike will blanket PA with canvassers, GOP voter registration drives, and a GOTV turnout machine that can swamp Dems and flip three Democratic-held state supreme court seats in one fell swoop. Republicans know they are weak during Midterm and off-year elections and they know that the next opportunity that voters have to hit back is the Pennsylvania Supreme Court election this November, now only 23 days away and they are leaving nothing to chance. We won big in Wisconsin this year - but only because of massive media attention, huge spending from the national Dem party, and the support of millions of grassroots donors from across the country. There is no similar effort now. We are forced to take on "Project Doorstrike" with only a portion of the resources MAGA has--and with three Dem justices up for retention, the stakes are 3x as high as Wisconsin's race. The truth is that Democrats are being massively outspent here 10-1, and unless we can counter Project Doorstrike this is going to kill the Democratic party by ensuring that we never win a Presidential election again. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | == With your help we can mount a comeback and wage a real battle to win, but we are running out of time. Thank you for rallying to our aid in this critical moment. Defend our Courts | | | | == | | == | Mail checks to: Defend Our Courts P.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 | | == | | | | Defend Our Courts | P.O. Box 45569 | Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | | | | |

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: Small request
body:
|
#
Hi there – this is a different type of email than I usually send. I’m not asking for a donation. Instead, I’m asking you to personally endorse my re-election campaign for Congress. **With our race shaping up to be one of the most competitive in the country, your endorsement would send a powerful message that we’ve got the grassroots strength to win.** [**We want to add 500 names to our list of endorsers today. **That’s also a reminder of why this seat matters so much. **
MI-08 is one of the most competitive districts in the country. What happens here could be the deciding factor in who holds the gavel in Congress – and whether we move forward with policies that lower costs for working people or slide backward to protect the wealthy and well-connected.
I know this will be a tough fight – the million dollars in attacks have already proved that. But with a strong grassroots team, I know we can win this race and continue delivering for families across mid-Michigan.

name: Seth Moulton
subject: Pete Hegseth is no military man. He’s a coward.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
Meanwhile, he can’t even do a pull-up

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117135393/575468981/1866411932?refcode=251012_sm_hegseth&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGM4MGZkZC02ZWE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fse-_haV7pbg-i2AFJIjj_LPMsF7luDmBuIRfZ3PsXA=)
---
Friend, Not long ago, Pete Hegseth stood before senior military leaders and delivered what can only be described as a political pep rally. We’ve seen a lot of political theater over the years, but what happened recently wasn’t just another headline, and we shouldn’t treat it as such. I was recently quoted in **[this article](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117135394/575468982/-1286430612?refcode=251012_sm_hegseth&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGM4MGZkZC02ZWE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fse-_haV7pbg-i2AFJIjj_LPMsF7luDmBuIRfZ3PsXA=&emci=1b7b5f4e-cca5-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=74c80fdd-6ea7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=194769)** from the Boston Globe. Here’s the rundown:
* I called Hegseth’s address “borderline fascist.”
* I accused Hegseth of using the speech as a political pep rally and defended the role of inspectors general as essential to protecting principled and honest leaders in the military.
* I said the speech’s authoritarian tone says more about Hegseth’s insecurity than real strength.

As a Marine veteran and U.S. citizen, I know how dangerous it is when politics seeps into the chain of command. When military briefings turn into campaign rallies, when accountability is treated as the enemy, and when public service is twisted into partisan performance,**we all lose.** **[I’ve always believed leadership means putting country before politics. If you agree, I’m asking you to stand with me. Chip in to help us defend that principle and keep this fight going.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117135395/575468983/2005830277?refcode=251012_sm_hegseth&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGM4MGZkZC02ZWE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fse-_haV7pbg-i2AFJIjj_LPMsF7luDmBuIRfZ3PsXA=)** | | [**CONTRIBUTE**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117135398/575468984/1866411932?refcode=251012_sm_hegseth&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGM4MGZkZC02ZWE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fse-_haV7pbg-i2AFJIjj_LPMsF7luDmBuIRfZ3PsXA= "https://secure.actblue.com/")
---
Thank you.
Seth Moulton

# [Peace in the Middle East?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=175869416&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1ODY5NDE2LCJpYXQiOjE3NjAyNzU4ODksImV4cCI6MTc2Mjg2Nzg4OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.3j8G-y2CUUoOZQ3rqGW4trmEUjxR0WfZbHo6tUxmYQk)
### Did breadth of perspective outfox depth of expertise?

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d6c19b9c-4129-4ee4-b5fe-ac645f26b339?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Long-time readers know that I have long championed a generalist rather than specialist approach to navigating uncertainty. It is my belief that experts by their very nature live in silos and tend to view most developments through the narrow lens of their specific microscope. This leads to depth of expertise, but the flip side of that dynamic is that specialists tend to lack breadth of perspective. They tend to overlook the proverbial "big picture."
The most effective approach to navigating uncertainty, I contend, is to look across silos and connect dots rather than focus on generating dots. My second book, [Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/77e16976-8387-49f3-bccd-c76e3c791acd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), is about how experts should be consulted but not empowered ("Keep Experts on Tap, Not on Top" is the title of one of the chapters). My third book, [The Making of a Generalist](https://substack.com/redirect/77e16976-8387-49f3-bccd-c76e3c791acd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), shares how I arrived at this approach to addressing uncertainty.
Throughout all my writing over the past twenty years, I have consistently tipped my hat to ancient Greek philosopher [Archilochus](https://substack.com/redirect/efa2a49b-1f77-4ce6-83da-d820fff1fc8d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) who noted, "The fox knows many things, but the hedgehog knows one big thing." This logic was later expanded by Isiah Berlin in a book titled "[The Fox and the Hedgehog](https://substack.com/redirect/617645f6-7ac6-4261-9434-e4842d9b0823?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" that explicitly suggested hedgehogs see the world through one lens while foxes draw on a diversity of experiences and perspectives. I've always thought of myself as a fox, and even shared some of my thinking in a 2012 TEDx talk entitled "[The Power of Foxy Thinking](https://substack.com/redirect/397745dc-51f5-41cf-b30b-1f5099231b91?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/397745dc-51f5-41cf-b30b-1f5099231b91?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
All of this came to mind this past week when [news broke](https://substack.com/redirect/e93c8919-1b0d-42bb-b708-f66172b3e88c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that the United States might have finally brokered an end to the Israeli-Gaza War that has been raging for the past two years. Against the odds, and most expert opinion, American leaders appear to have struck a deal that ends hostilities and--at least temporarily--puts the region on a path towards peace.
The deal is particularly surprising given the team that pulled this off is, from one perspective, a bunch of rank amateurs. Let's not forget that Donald Trump is the only man in U.S. history to be elected president without having first served in another political office or the military. Further, Steve Witkoff, the Administration's Special Envoy to the Middle East, was a [property developer](https://substack.com/redirect/58e198e8-9ded-4b70-91d1-681eababf12b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that [Foreign Policy](https://substack.com/redirect/55924db4-e6e0-411a-b2d0-5c01de3085c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) declared had "failed spectacularly" as a diplomat. Rather than being a hindrance to progress, could Trump and Witkoff have been empowered through the power of fresh eyes?
Could expertise be a liability? Zen Master Shunryu Suzuki has noted that "the mind of the beginner is empty, free of the habits of the expert, ready to accept, to doubt and open to all possibilities." Critics have called [Trump's approach to global negotiation an "amateur hour](https://substack.com/redirect/f2180236-1d7c-466c-b3b4-44386798b060?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" but I can't help but ask, is being an amateur always a bad thing? Rather than being a hinderance, could the lack of experience have been an asset?
[](https://substack.com/redirect/1410b810-4e23-454d-9776-1b9e3b3baea6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
For years, the foreign policy expert class assumed that peace in the Middle East was dependent on resolving the Israeli-Palestinian conflict, and an expert consensus emerged that it required a two-state solution. Many graduate students, think tanks, and journals treated the necessity of a two-state solution as an immutable article of faith. Until that faith was rocked by an alternative possibility.
Many on Trump's team were free of the "expertise" gained via international affairs graduate programs or professional foreign affairs careers. Instead, they seem to have focused on the reality that Arab countries were more concerned about Iran than Israel. This insight proved to be a strong foundation on which to build better relations, and was clearly the negotiating logic that led to the Abraham Accords. And by some [accounts](https://substack.com/redirect/4a1f64a7-075a-454b-ba1a-64ee0540f1bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), those better relations were crucial to this week's deal. The focus on Israel as the issue was so deeply embedded in expert thinking that it took an "amateur approach" to shift the focus to Iran. The foxes saw what the hedgehogs missed.
If Abraham Lincoln had his ["Team of Rivals,"](https://substack.com/redirect/6c7d5001-37fb-4be0-81d5-0bd959d3f81e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Barak Obama had his ["Team of Rivals 2.0,"](https://substack.com/redirect/feb0a0c2-c6ea-4073-b968-e989a6c884cc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and Joe Biden had his ["Team of Buddies,"](https://substack.com/redirect/4b15d551-ef4c-4471-bbdb-0d1da934317f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Trump has assembled a "Team of Foxes." Their diverse backgrounds and generalist approaches continue to [confound](https://substack.com/redirect/b8117966-295c-4e87-b4bc-89635624b613?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the hedgehogs, whether on the [economy](https://substack.com/redirect/5aaf1da9-8173-4b25-a7fc-fb6c4e06694c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [tariffs](https://substack.com/redirect/ee1005fd-7c84-4afb-b8ca-76292a56d9b8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), or [international affairs](https://substack.com/redirect/76197c25-b4bf-4729-846b-a5e510bb2516?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). And while it may be too early to judge the results of their policies, the approach has been a huge success in getting all of us to think differently about tough problems...and with respect to navigating uncertainty, that's a big win.

---|---|---
**VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. **He 's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza**. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, _**[The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World](https://substack.com/redirect/5c1777e2-0ac2-4b0d-8ed1-a20df7fc46d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ , _**[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/52161ce1-0764-4ae2-902e-f8ddb27c4097?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and _**[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/ac6b7772-4a9a-4f36-8b73-26b40eadf429?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_. Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.
You're currently a free subscriber to [Navigating Uncertainty](https://substack.com/redirect/d1096386-8b05-41b2-b209-678b5e9ac45c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Did breadth of perspective outfox depth of expertise? | | | Oct 12 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Long-time readers know that I have long championed a generalist rather than specialist approach to navigating uncertainty. It is my belief that experts by their very nature live in silos and tend to view most developments through the narrow lens of their specific microscope. This leads to depth of expertise, but the flip side of that dynamic is that specialists tend to lack breadth of perspective. They tend to overlook the proverbial "big picture." The most effective approach to navigating uncertainty, I contend, is to look across silos and connect dots rather than focus on generating dots. My second book, , is about how experts should be consulted but not empowered ("Keep Experts on Tap, Not on Top" is the title of one of the chapters). My third book, , shares how I arrived at this approach to addressing uncertainty. Throughout all my writing over the past twenty years, I have consistently tipped my hat to ancient Greek philosopher who noted, "The fox knows many things, but the hedgehog knows one big thing." This logic was later expanded by Isiah Berlin in a book titled "" that explicitly suggested hedgehogs see the world through one lens while foxes draw on a diversity of experiences and perspectives. I've always thought of myself as a fox, and even shared some of my thinking in a 2012 TEDx talk entitled "." All of this came to mind this past week when that the United States might have finally brokered an end to the Israeli-Gaza War that has been raging for the past two years. Against the odds, and most expert opinion, American leaders appear to have struck a deal that ends hostilities and--at least temporarily--puts the region on a path towards peace. The deal is particularly surprising given the team that pulled this off is, from one perspective, a bunch of rank amateurs. Let's not forget that Donald Trump is the only man in U.S. history to be elected president without having first served in another political office or the military. Further, Steve Witkoff, the Administration's Special Envoy to the Middle East, was a that declared had "failed spectacularly" as a diplomat. Last weekend, Tim and his daughter Hope took on the 10-mile at the Twin Cities Marathon — and they crushed it! Here’s Tim out on a run to gear up for the race:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117138244/575477037/192118079?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzliYWU4ZC03M2E3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eUcgC3GYWNQlzsKVmqT40j0clEtTDjEHnvLgRxcOD8s=)

That’s the spirit that guides Tim every day as your governor. And it’s the same spirit that drives our reelection campaign. At a time when there’s so much noise, division, and hate in the world, Tim believes Minnesota’s values — kindness, resilience, and a sense of community — can and will lead the way.
If you share that vision, we’d be honored to have you with us.

name: Anika Page
subject: A few seats remain for A Celebration of Mississippi Success
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/gala-12850248?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Good morning Friend,
Our Gala, _A Celebration of Mississippi Success_ , is just around the corner — and it’s shaping up to be a truly special evening. We have just a **handful of individual tickets remaining** , and for a limited time, they are available at **50% off — $75 each (normally $150) — with no code needed.** On **Thursday, October 23rd** , we’ll gather at the **Country Club of Jackson** to celebrate Mississippi’s remarkable progress — from record growth to new opportunities and milestones achieved across our state. We’re honored to welcome **Governor Tate Reeves** and **Rich Lowry** , Editor-in-Chief of _National Review_ , as keynote speakers. Together, they’ll reflect on how far Mississippi has come and share their vision for the bright future ahead.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=47f3ae34a3&e=5703353baa)
---
_Purchase your tickets by clicking on the photo above!_
| Seats for this year’s Gala are nearly gone, and once they’re filled, we won’t be adding additional tables. If you’ve been planning to join us, now is the perfect moment to secure your place. **Event Details:**
* Thursday, October 23, 2025
* Country Club of Jackson
* Doors open at 6:30 PM, Gala starts at 7 PM

This evening is more than a Gala — it’s a moment to reflect, celebrate, and be proud of the progress Mississippi has made.
---
| [Purchase Your Tickets Here!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=624a9030bb&e=5703353baa "Purchase Your Tickets Here!")
---
| We look forward to celebrating this season of Mississippi success with you.
---
| |
---
Warmest wishes,

Anika Page
Director of Operations
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=06ab49f32b) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=06ab49f32b).

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
These women are fighting to protect reproductive rights, voting access, and progressive policies, and they need a pipeline of future leaders ready to step up next.

---
| Peter,

Virginia’s elections are less than a month away and Emerge alums are on the ballot, from Abigail Spanberger running for Governor to a full third of House of Delegates candidates. These women are fighting to protect reproductive rights, voting access, and progressive policies, and they need a pipeline of future leaders ready to step up next.

That’s where Emerge comes in. Every dollar helps us train the next generation of women who will run, win, and lead not only in Virginia, but across the country. With over 6,500 women trained and more than 1,200 currently serving in office, **Emerge women are proving that when women run, they win — and when they win, they fight back.

**_WE TOLD YOU:_** A federal actuary has said that Social Security trusts will begin to become insolvent by 2034 due to Trump’s bill!

**_WE TOLD YOU:_ **Social Security recipients could face up to $18,000 in cuts to their benefits in just 7 years!

**_**AND NOW WE’RE TELLING YOU, Peter:**_ **If you don’t stand up now to defend Social Security, Trump could terminate it entirely!

name: Marina Jenkins, NDRC
subject: Republicans are passing their gerrymandered maps in the shadows
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
We need your help to keep up the fight
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117139596/575481935/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFjZWNjNWJmLTczYTctZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=z1nm49kcu6lY3xly4ku9pWVRgStVB9vbIKIHS_oT7is=&emci=1f2211a6-09a6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=1cecc5bf-73a7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, In a truly representative democracy, the government is accountable to the people. Lawmakers are guided by the needs of the voters who elected them, and they act in the best interest of their constituents in the policy-making process. But that often hasn’t been the case since the Trump regime took over. After passing extremely unpopular cuts to life-saving programs like health care and food benefits, Republicans are now doing everything possible to hold on to power at the expense of the people they should be representing. You’re probably wondering why. **Peter, they're scared they’ll lose the House in the midterm elections.** What makes this attempt to subvert the democratic process even worse is that they’re doing it in the shadows. J.D. Vance and Indiana Governor Mike Braun literally hid behind a curtain to talk gerrymandering. Governor Kehoe signed Missouri’s map redraw in private on a Sunday afternoon. And Texas Republicans drew a new map in a secret meeting, then later locked Democrats in the chamber so they couldn’t stop the vote. **This isn’t transparency. This isn’t democracy. And it certainly isn’t the will of the people. This is a forcible takeover, plain and simple — and we’ve got to end it.** **Here at the NDRC, we believe that sunlight is the best disinfectant. We’re raising the alarm, mobilizing voters, and fighting with every tool at our disposal to stop this power grab.[If you’re with us, make an urgent donation to ensure we have the resources needed to keep up the fight.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117139597/575481936/-80723829?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_BehindClosedDoors_email_20251012-NDRC-Tier1-BehindClosedDoors_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251012-NDRC-Tier1-BehindClosedDoors_&utm_campaign=BehindClosedDoors&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFjZWNjNWJmLTczYTctZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=z1nm49kcu6lY3xly4ku9pWVRgStVB9vbIKIHS_oT7is=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Lauren Groh-Wargo, CEO and Co-Founder of Fair Fight** This discussion on protecting elections and democracy will be extra-timely — the Supreme Court will have just wrapped re-hearing oral arguments in a case where they could further gut the Voting Rights Act by removing some of the last remaining protections against racially discriminatory maps. Together, we’ll get to unpack the latest in the legal landscape and what it means for our work to defend the freedom to vote. [**And we hope you can make it: Click here to RSVP and save your spot on the Zoom.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117139868/575482651/1267229748?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20251012_T1_FFTogether_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2UxZmU5ZC03NGE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JIHMJFfpsvd01FPYZ2fV4MruLw1ZZ0tS0Z0GFEpiP4E=&emci=20d0f896-74a7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=03e1fe9d-74a7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=1037277#/) |

name: Donald John Trump
subject: I want to try and get to Heaven.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
I believe He saved me for a reason, and this is why I think He did it!
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
---
Friend,
**I want to try and get to Heaven.**
Last year I came millimeters from death when that bullet pierced through my skin. My triumphant return to the White House was never supposed to happen!
But I believe that God saved me for one reason: **TO MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**
I wasn’t supposed to beat Crooked Hillary in 2016 — but I did.
I wasn’t supposed to secure the border & build the greatest economy in history — but I did.
I certainly wasn’t supposed to survive an assassin’s bullet — but by the grace of the almighty God, I did.
SO NOW, I have no other choice but to answer the Call to Duty, but I can’t do it alone.
Friend, you’ve been with me through everything.
You were there when they launched: the Russia Hoax, the first Impeachment, the second Impeachment, the rigged 2020 election, the Raid on Mar-a-Lago, the Arrest and Mugshot at the Fulton County Jail, the Removal from the CO ballot, the sham cases in DC / FL / NY / DC, the first Assassination attempt, the second Assassination attempt, and so much more!
Just because I won in a HISTORIC landslide and have unleashed the Golden Age of America, **THAT DOESN’T MEAN WE CAN TAKE OUR FOOT OFF THE GAS!**
The forces that hate our country don’t want a secure border or safe cities or high paying jobs. The Radical Left Lunatics want to STOP MAGA, but we’re not going to let them NO MATTER WHAT.
**Let me make this SOLEMN PLEDGE to you: I WILL NEVER SURRENDER!**
I put my life on the line willingly because this is what I was made to do, but our movement, the beautiful MAGA movement, is powered by YOU.
Every time they count us out – count YOU out – we come back bigger, better, and stronger than ever before.
This is our moment to show the world that we will NEVER back down, NEVER give an inch, and NEVER SURRENDER in our fight to save this country.
_That’s why I’ve launched a 24 HOUR TRUMP FUNDRAISING BLITZ, and I’m asking everyone to chip in $15 to make it one for the record books!_
**_[So if you’re with me all the way to the end, join with MILLIONS of your fellow PATRIOTS by chipping in $15 to keep the wins rolling in!>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**
[GIVE $15](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Sincerely,
Donald John Trump

[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

subject: I am humbly asking you -

body:
#

| | | | | | | | | | |

Hi there, it's Gabby Giffords. Today, I'm reaching out to personally ask you to make your first contribution of $3 to GIFFORDS PAC.

If you want to stay updated but , let us know If you would like to completely from future emails, you can do so | Nancy Pelosi for Congress 700 13TH STREET NW Suite 800 Washington, DC 20005 United States | | Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress

name: Letitia James
subject: Donald Trump and his admin just indicted me
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=101125_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=101125_1]
Peter,
Nothing pisses me off more than getting a fundraising text from Democrats talking about how they’re fighting fascism... Because it’s such B.S. We’re not idiots. Everyone knows most of them aren’t doing jack right now to fight back.
People are being kidnapped into unmarked vans by masked police. There is a genocide happening in Palestine. Literal billionaires have taken over our government. And all Democratic leadership can do is send us another fundraising text?
My name is Graham Platner, and I’m the Marine Corps veteran and Democrat running for U.S. Senate against Susan Collins here in Maine. I’m not going to speak in platitudes or shy away from what I believe. There is a war going on in this country, and the oligarchy and the fascists are winning right now.
Susan Collins is the most vulnerable Republican senator in the country. We have an opportunity to replace her with a working-class Democrat – one who won’t take money from corporations or AIPAC.
But I’m not a wealthy guy, and we’re still short of our $50,000 goal and what we need to win. If I’m going to be able to defeat Susan Collins and flip this Senate seat blue, I need folks like you to chip in now to my campaign.
Please, will you split a donation right now between my campaign and The Real Texas PAC to help me defeat Susan Collins, flip Maine blue, and take back the Senate with a Democrat who will actually fight to defend our democracy like Democrats oughta be? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=101125_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Graham Platner and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=101125_1&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=101125_1&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=101125_1&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=101125_1&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=101125_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=101125_1&amount=25]
In the history of this nation, power has never been just willingly handed to the people. Another mealy-mouthed Democrat isn’t going to fix things or protect our constitution.
I’m ready to go to the United States Senate and fight – but I need your help today to get there. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=101125_1]
In solidarity,
Graham Platner

The world of work is changing--fast.
Don't be left behind. **[Come. Learn. Ask questions. Prepare.](https://substack.com/redirect/6f82b361-bd41-4cd3-be24-c37a712674e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6f82b361-bd41-4cd3-be24-c37a712674e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
What once took generations to unfold is now transforming in months. AI will be as transformative as moving from the age of the horse and wagon to self-driving cars on six-lane freeways OVERNIGHT--and many of us are still standing at the hitching post, trying to understand what just happened.
That's why **Dave Conklin** is joining us at the _Seed & Roots Summit 2025_.
**[GET YOUR TICKET](https://substack.com/redirect/6f82b361-bd41-4cd3-be24-c37a712674e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
A nationally recognized AI strategist, author, and serial entrepreneur, Dave has spent his career helping leaders and organizations harness technology instead of being replaced by it. He speaks with rare clarity about how artificial intelligence is rewriting every rule--from marketing to management, from education to ethics.
Dave's message is both sobering and energizing: the future of work isn't coming -- it's here. The companies and individuals who thrive will be those who learn to collaborate with machines while doubling down on distinctly human strengths: creativity, empathy, critical thinking, and moral discernment.
> "AI isn't taking your job," Dave often says. "But someone who understands AI will."
At the _[Seed& Roots Summit 2025](https://substack.com/redirect/6f82b361-bd41-4cd3-be24-c37a712674e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[ in Philadelphia,](https://substack.com/redirect/6f82b361-bd41-4cd3-be24-c37a712674e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Dave Conklin will break down what this revolution really means for ordinary Americans--the small-business owner, the tradesman, the teacher, the parent--and how each of us can adapt without losing what makes us human.
🗓 **Saturday, October 25, 2025**
📍 **Philadelphia, PA | Independence Visitor Center**
⏰ **9:00 AM - 5:00 PM (Doors open at 8:30 AM)**
* * *
### Why This Matters
AI is the next great equalizer--or divider--depending on whether we prepare. Don't be left behind. **Come. Learn. Ask questions. Prepare.**
Reserve your seat today at **[KathyBarnette.com](https://substack.com/redirect/3a0bdfde-c627-4f53-80a1-d72c1fcc0343?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

subject: We can’t let that happen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
Our chance to take control of the Senate.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=2817%2E582294%2Erj5-M8)
Here’s where things stand:
**If we let Republicans flip New Hampshire in 2026, Democrats will have no chance to take back control of the U.S. Senate.**
Losing would give Donald Trump more power to enact his MAGA agenda and cause more damage to our democracy and our economy.
**[We cannot let that happen. That’s why we’re asking you to step up and support Chris Pappas’s campaign. Will you chip in today?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251012_1_flip.7Sud0t&refcode=em20251012-1&t=2&akid=2817%2E582294%2Erj5-M8)**
Chris is building a grassroots movement powered entirely by people who refuse to sit on the sidelines – but this fight will not be easy.
Far-right billionaires and MAGA-aligned dark money groups are going to go all in to defeat Chris and flip New Hampshire’s Senate seat red. We need everyone on this team to take action if we’re going to stop them.
**[That’s where you come in: If you’re up for it, pitch in $5 or more now to help power our campaign and send Chris to the Senate. Will you chip in $5 or more today?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251012_1_flip.7Sud0t&refcode=em20251012-1&t=3&akid=2817%2E582294%2Erj5-M8)**

Every dollar counts in this fight.

Team Pappas

body:
I need you to read this, Derek

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117144062/575495303/126936940?refcode=email_101225_davids-split&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjQ3YjQxZC03Y2E3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u5ADaOasp9RQ9qW3_cTySXvDVlhYp5D0b67lwH7nhiA=) Republican politicians want to make it impossible for a Democrat like me to win my district. Not more difficult. **Impossible.** This is Congresswoman Sharice Davids from Kansas’ 3rd Congressional district — and Donald Trump has made it his **number one** priority to gerrymander me out of office. [**But Derek, I didn’t flip this seat from red to blue by running scared when the going got tough, and I’m not going to start now. I’m more energized than ever to defend this seat — and our democracy — from the far-right, but I need you standing with me to do it. Will you split a donation between Chris Deluzio and my campaign before midnight?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117144064/575495310/126936940?refcode=email_101225_davids-split&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjQ3YjQxZC03Y2E3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u5ADaOasp9RQ9qW3_cTySXvDVlhYp5D0b67lwH7nhiA=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117144068/575495319/126936940?refcode=email_101225_davids-split&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjQ3YjQxZC03Y2E3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u5ADaOasp9RQ9qW3_cTySXvDVlhYp5D0b67lwH7nhiA=)
---
There’s a pretty obvious reason why Donald Trump wants me out of Congress: **I don’t fit his mold of what a “Kansas politician” should look like.**
And Derek, he’s right. I do stand out in Washington — and I’m proud of it. I’m the first LGBTQ+ Native American woman ever elected to Congress. I was raised by a single Army mom, paid my own way through college, and even had a career as an MMA fighter before I ran for elected office.
Maybe that background doesn’t make me a “typical” politician. **But I think that’s a good thing.**
But Donald Trump disagrees. Instead, he wants to end _all_ competitive Congressional elections in Kansas and install a hand-picked, far-right extremist in my place.
**[Kansas Republicans know they can’t win my district unless they cheat, so they’re trying to stack the deck and pray that we won’t notice. That’s why I need your help. Can you chip in a split donation right away to help me keep fighting back against this partisan power grab while we still have the chance?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117144073/575495355/126936940?refcode=email_101225_davids-split&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjQ3YjQxZC03Y2E3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u5ADaOasp9RQ9qW3_cTySXvDVlhYp5D0b67lwH7nhiA=)**

name: Haley S.
subject: FWD: Did you see this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
add your name to our flash petition

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1053%2E49239%2E2WSGf1)
Hi null, it's Haley Stevens.
---
I just wanted to make sure you saw our flash petition about the government shutdown.
It's critical I hear from you – we still need 68 more responses from 18326. **Will you add your name now if you believe the Republicans are to blame for the shutdown?**
**[surveys.signforgood.com/Stevens-Gov-Shutdown/pet](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6654?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=2&akid=1053%2E49239%2E2WSGf1)**
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Team Haley**
Subject: Here's the truth: MAGA Republicans shut down the government
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6655?t=3&akid=1053%2E49239%2E2WSGf1)
---
Null, if you agree that Republicans are to blame for the government shutdown, **[add your name to our emergency petition now.](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6654?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=1053%2E49239%2E2WSGf1)**
| | [Add Your Name >>](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6654?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=1053%2E49239%2E2WSGf1)
---
Here’s how the GOP got us into this mess:
**FIRST:** Donald Trump handed the federal government over to Elon Musk’s DOGE – and they made massive, harmful cuts to essential federal services.
**THEN:** Republicans passed their so-called “Big Beautiful Bill,” kicking millions off of their health care just to hand the richest people in the country a huge tax break.
**NOW:** Trump and the GOP have shut down the government – and are jeopardizing health care for millions more.
That’s why we’re calling on 10,000 people to speak out by midnight and demand accountability. **[Add your name now to our live petition if you agree Republicans are to blame for this dangerous shutdown:](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6654?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=1053%2E49239%2E2WSGf1)**
| | [Add Your Name >>](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6654?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=1053%2E49239%2E2WSGf1)
---
Thank you for standing with us,

Team Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6656?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=8&akid=1053%2E49239%2E2WSGf1) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6655?t=9&akid=1053%2E49239%2E2WSGf1)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

**[Will you pitch in to help us win the biggest election of 2025? _We're setting the tone for 2026, 2028, and beyond._ By embracing a politics that puts Virginians first — not a president, not a party; by drawing on the powerful conversations I've had with thousands of Virginians; and by laying out a common-sense agenda, starting with a plan to make all of our lives more affordable.
Our victory at the ballot box will pave the way for Democrats for years to come.
That's why far-right Republicans have spent tens of millions of dollars against me. It’s why Donald Trump is attacking me from inside the Oval Office. _And it's why meeting our fundraising goals is so important._
But as I learned working cases at CIA and crafting laws at the U.S. Capitol, you're only as good as the team around you.

name: Team DNC
subject: The most impactful thing you can do today
body:
---
Derek, Election Day is just weeks away, on November 4. What kind of America do you want to wake up to on November 5? Donald Trump will be hoping for good news. He wants to flip the New Jersey governor’s mansion. He wants California’s redistricting amendment to fail. He wants MAGA Republicans to take control of Pennsylvania’s Supreme Court. **Here at the DNC, we don’t plan on letting that happen. But Derek, we need your help.** Don’t let Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans demoralize you and stop you from using your voice. Don’t let polls and the news make you complacent before Election Day. **And don’t wake up on November 5 wishing you had done more to help Democrats win.** [**Do the most impactful thing you can do to help Democrats win and chip in $7 today because the DNC is the organization best positioned to distribute resources to the state parties, and races that need it most right now >>>**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?amount=7&refcode=em_20251012_4832_fr&refcode2=4846_22930333_GmHFgh&akid=4846%2E22930333%2EGmHFgh) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251012_4832_fr&refcode2=4846_22930333_GmHFgh&akid=4846%2E22930333%2EGmHFgh)**

Don’t let polls and the news make you complacent before Election Day. And don’t wake up on November 5 wishing you had done more to help Democrats win. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you, The Democratic Party If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support.

name: Major General Paul Eaton, U.S. Army, Ret.
subject: What gives me hope at moments like these
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
I have hope in our troops, and in their leadership. I have hope in the Veterans showing up and speaking out against Trump and his administration. I have hope because countless principled, distinguished leaders have chosen to run for office and hold the line.
#
Peter, this is Paul Eaton.
About two weeks ago, Donald Trump ordered our most senior Military leaders to leave their posts, at home and abroad, and forced them into a room to listen to his litany of political grievances.
He is mobilizing and weaponizing the entire federal government against his political opponents – people he and his administration have labeled domestic extremists.
American soldiers are deployed in American cities against the American people. Veterans are seeing their health care and critical services cut. All the while, Trump sits in his gilded Oval Office, scheming about new ways to undermine our Constitution and the rights and liberties each of us were born into.
Frankly, it turns my stomach. After more than three decades in uniform, the degree to which Donald Trump has disgraced this country and the office he holds is stunning.
**But even now, Peter, I have hope.**
I have trust in our troops, and in their leadership. I have trust in the Veterans showing up and speaking out against Trump and his administration. I have trust because countless principled, distinguished leaders have chosen to run for office and hold the line.
And here at VoteVets, we are busier than ever. We have a full slate of candidates nationwide, two critical statewide elections this November, and our members are on the frontline of every critical fight.
**[If supporting us as we continue this work is worth a donation of $5 or $10 to you, please, take a few moments to chip in. We would be extremely grateful for your support.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-oct25.PLXLty&refcode=em251012-1-120&t=1&akid=34680%2E3013755%2EDkBXB7)

name: Ollie (Chris' dog!)
subject: I’ve been doing some digging
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
My mom, Judge Chris Taylor, has spent her career standing up for fairness, justice, and the rights of every Wisconsinite. (Furry friends included!)
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251012-681&t=1&akid=695%2E294397%2ETOJV4_)
Hiii, it’s me, Ollie!
[](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251012_1_ak.RfYG6_&amount=10&refcode=em20251012-681&t=2&akid=695%2E294397%2ETOJV4_)
I’ve been doing some digging and needed to make sure you heard about this: **My mom has a new right-wing opponent!**
I’m still sniffing around for more info, but if there’s one thing I know, it’s that our opponents are barking up the wrong tree if they think they can take down my mom.
My mom, Judge Chris Taylor, has spent her career standing up for fairness, justice, and the rights of every Wisconsinite. (Furry friends included!)
But winning this election is no walk in the park — _which I love, by the way._
Our opponent has some real baddies backing their campaign, and the only way we’ll defeat them is by sticking together.
[**If you’re able to, could you pitch in to support my mom, Judge Chris Taylor? Throwing a few bones our way gets us one step closer to victory:**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251012_1_ak.RfYG6_&amount=10&refcode=em20251012-681&t=3&akid=695%2E294397%2ETOJV4_)
**[Donate $10 ››](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251012_1_ak.RfYG6_&amount=10&refcode=em20251012-681&t=22&akid=695%2E294397%2ETOJV4_)**
Thank you so much! My mom is so lucky to have you on her side.
Tail wags,
Ollie 🐾
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_footer?refcode=em20251012-681&t=23&refcode2=695_294397_TOJV4_&akid=695%2E294397%2ETOJV4_)**

name: S.O.S
subject: Dems outflanked and outmaneuvered in marquee 2025 PA race
body:
Our battleground is the state that has been indispensable to the very Founding of our country and the preservation of American freedom and liberty for over 249 years: Pennsylvania.
| | |
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yhDs3W_GqibaAbr4YmSapINA44QQaQpu4bE5oYKpED8kHT7ADxynr3e__ZXq4R1HGjRXEtPZkAb74jbjxUl60hzdw0Gijp0azwleP3WrArDRtYx5dAWhPGbzuL2VNSLBtmCHxjMp3ZG2Hwq1W7aub1MJxJsSbb-942aaJkVWARJAkcTpNeWa0Lzl52adJ47TLjzYLjNCvONsLgaN0fV2ewP27hYT_G2YMYz3HM5xQNc=&c=p65ruiJfYYVHugv9Fj6d-asgF6f5RLyg7F55ZhjdU3pS9yHLnyutRQ==&ch=7bssBikPWHgsS_s0EOlumNjBUvVxwOsWwK4ooCOLmFRNewXd_XPyQQ==)
---
| Friend,
This is an urgent S.O.S. to every Democrat and every single American who knows the threat that Trump's unchecked power poses to our freedoms and democracy:
We are officially 23 days out from the marquee election of 2025 -- and in this contest it is all of us versus the fascist MAGA movement.
Our battleground is the state that has been indispensable to the very founding of our country and the preservation of American freedom and liberty for over 249 years: Pennsylvania.
Democrats' 5-2 majority on the state supreme court is responsible for preventing the GOP's darkest ambitions from ever becoming real: extreme abortion bans, rolling back voting rights, and allowing Trump to steal the presidential election in 2020.
Without this critical buffer, Pennsylvania would be a right-wing hellscape. That's why MAGA has been at a fever pitch working to turn this obscure 2025 judicial race into the victory that sets the stage for their biggest ambition yet: Trump 2028.
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yhDs3W_GqibaAbr4YmSapINA44QQaQpu4bE5oYKpED8kHT7ADxynr3e__ZXq4R1HGjRXEtPZkAb74jbjxUl60hzdw0Gijp0azwleP3WrArDRtYx5dAWhPGbzuL2VNSLBtmCHxjMp3ZG2Hwq1W7aub1MJxJsSbb-942aaJkVWARJAkcTpNeWa0Lzl52adJ47TLjzYLjNCvONsLgaN0fV2e7IfoB3AwbPc-0izq1GVa38=&c=p65ruiJfYYVHugv9Fj6d-asgF6f5RLyg7F55ZhjdU3pS9yHLnyutRQ==&ch=7bssBikPWHgsS_s0EOlumNjBUvVxwOsWwK4ooCOLmFRNewXd_XPyQQ==)
---
| MAGA has already attempted to abolish mail-in voting, and if they win on Election Day they will be given the green light to steal PA and cheat their way to a permanent victory.
Because the stakes are abnormally high for a judicial retention race, MAGA billionaires are preparing to launch a series of last-minute 8-figure broadsides with ads that deceive, lie, and mislead voters into kicking out all three Dem judges.
Democrats have been outflanked and outmaneuvered and time is running out to salvage this dire situation. We can't let these attacks go unanswered. This election is a critical check on Trump's authoritarian takeover of our country.
[](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yhDs3W_GqibaAbr4YmSapINA44QQaQpu4bE5oYKpED8kHT7ADxynr3e__ZXq4R1HGjRXEtPZkAb74jbjxUl60hzdw0Gijp0azwleP3WrArDRtYx5dAWhPGbzuL2VNSLBtmCHxjMp3ZG2Hwq1W7aub1MJxJsSbb-942aaJkVWARJAkcTpNeWa0Lzl52adJ47TLjzYLjNCvONsLgaN0fV2e2c5MuBiNCXUZZesMnxb06k=&c=p65ruiJfYYVHugv9Fj6d-asgF6f5RLyg7F55ZhjdU3pS9yHLnyutRQ==&ch=7bssBikPWHgsS_s0EOlumNjBUvVxwOsWwK4ooCOLmFRNewXd_XPyQQ==)[Can you send in some critical reinforcements to help us reach the voters we need to show up to save PA? If you can, we urgently need donations to immediately counter the lies and disinformation being spread by MAGA billionaires:](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yhDs3W_GqibaAbr4YmSapINA44QQaQpu4bE5oYKpED8kHT7ADxynr3e__ZXq4R1HGjRXEtPZkAb74jbjxUl60hzdw0Gijp0azwleP3WrArDRtYx5dAWhPGbzuL2VNSLBtmCHxjMp3ZG2Hwq1W7aub1MJxJsSbb-942aaJkVWARJAkcTpNeWa0Lzl52adJ47TLjzYLjNCvONsLgaN0fV2e-b2ytwlC_AkE9RYqaSIvao=&c=p65ruiJfYYVHugv9Fj6d-asgF6f5RLyg7F55ZhjdU3pS9yHLnyutRQ==&ch=7bssBikPWHgsS_s0EOlumNjBUvVxwOsWwK4ooCOLmFRNewXd_XPyQQ==)

body:

| Peter,
This is an urgent S.O.S. to every Democrat and every single American who knows the threat that Trump's unchecked power poses to our freedoms and democracy:
We are officially 23 days out from the marquee election of 2025 -- and in this contest it is all of us versus the fascist MAGA movement.
Our battleground is the state that has been indispensable to the very founding of our country and the preservation of American freedom and liberty for over 249 years: Pennsylvania.
Democrats' 5-2 majority on the state supreme court is responsible for preventing the GOP's darkest ambitions from ever becoming real: extreme abortion bans, rolling back voting rights, and allowing Trump to steal the presidential election in 2020.
Without this critical buffer, Pennsylvania would be a right-wing hellscape. That's why MAGA has been at a fever pitch working to turn this obscure 2025 judicial race into the victory that sets the stage for their biggest ambition yet: Trump 2028.
---

MAGA has already attempted to abolish mail-in voting, and if they win on Election Day they will be given the green light to steal PA and cheat their way to a permanent victory.
Because the stakes are abnormally high for a judicial retention race, MAGA billionaires are preparing to launch a series of last-minute 8-figure broadsides with ads that deceive, lie, and mislead voters into kicking out all three Dem judges.
Democrats have been outflanked and outmaneuvered and time is running out to salvage this dire situation. We can't let these attacks go unanswered. This election is a critical check on Trump's authoritarian takeover of our country.
[Can you send in some critical reinforcements to help us reach the voters we need to show up to save PA?
