Our battleground is the state that has been indispensable to the very founding of our country and the preservation of American freedom and liberty for over 249 years: Pennsylvania. Democrats' 5-2 majority on the state supreme court is responsible for preventing the GOP's darkest ambitions from ever becoming real: extreme abortion bans, rolling back voting rights, and allowing Trump to steal the presidential election in 2020. Without this critical buffer, Pennsylvania would be a right-wing hellscape. That's why MAGA has been at a fever pitch working to turn this obscure 2025 judicial race into the victory that sets the stage for their biggest ambition yet: Trump 2028. | | == MAGA has already attempted to abolish mail-in voting, and if they win on Election Day they will be given the green light to steal PA and cheat their way to a permanent victory. Because the stakes are abnormally high for a judicial retention race, MAGA billionaires are preparing to launch a series of last-minute 8-figure broadsides with ads that deceive, lie, and mislead voters into kicking out all three Dem judges. Democrats have been outflanked and outmaneuvered and time is running out to salvage this dire situation. We can't let these attacks go unanswered. This election is a critical check on Trump's authoritarian takeover of our country. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == Let's go win this. body:
Aurora needs a leader who won't back down to Big Oil.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117147607/575505988/1328794144?refcode=ea.4aaeea48-81a7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.4aaeea48-81a7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhYWVlYTQ4LTgxYTctZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2xsop69O0AQglrobKEKKlP3QSiIGEGlKCycnhnbQDag=&emci=2d585e7c-0fa6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=4aaeea48-81a7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=4823105)
---
I want to introduce you to a leader who gives me real hope for Colorado’s climate future. **Her name is Gianina Horton, and JanePAC is proud to endorse her for Aurora City Council, Ward 1.** Ward 1 is one of the most diverse communities in Aurora. It's also where social justice and environmental justice collide. It's home to the privately run GEO ICE Processing Center, and it’s under threat from corporate polluters. **As you read this message, there's a massive 166-well fracking project proposed just outside the city, and it’s right next to the Aurora Reservoir, which supplies drinking water to 400,000 Coloradans.** Fossil fuel interests know exactly how high the stakes are, and they're counting on Aurora to lock in their two-seat conservative majority on the city council and keep these fossil fuel projects alive. This open seat gives us a real chance to break that hold and elect a climate leader who will fight back. **[That's why I'm giving this race my ALL, and I need you with me. Will you chip in any amount you can afford today to directly power Gianina's campaign to victory on November 4th?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117147609/575505991/-1226360719?refcode=ea.4aaeea48-81a7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.4aaeea48-81a7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhYWVlYTQ4LTgxYTctZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2xsop69O0AQglrobKEKKlP3QSiIGEGlKCycnhnbQDag=)** | [**DONATE TO GIANINA →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117147613/575505993/-1226360719?refcode=ea.4aaeea48-81a7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.4aaeea48-81a7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhYWVlYTQ4LTgxYTctZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2xsop69O0AQglrobKEKKlP3QSiIGEGlKCycnhnbQDag=)
---
Gianina knows what's at stake because she's lived it.
As Colorado's former Reducing Racial and Ethnic Disparities Coordinator and Executive Director of the Denver Justice Project, she understands that climate justice and criminal justice are _inseparable._ **She's seen firsthand how the communities overlooked by our justice system are the same ones poisoned by fossil fuel pollution.**
But here's the thing: Gianina doesn’t have the luxury of deep-pocketed donors bankrolling her campaign. **And because of Aurora's campaign finance laws, JanePAC is limited to email fundraising and social media support instead of our traditional campaign investments.**
That's why I'm turning to you. Every single dollar you give goes directly to Gianina's campaign. In local races like this one, every dollar makes a real difference.
**[Aurora deserves a leader who will fight for clean energy, clean water, and a livable future. Gianina is that leader, and she needs us in her corner right now. Will you chip in any amount today to power her campaign to victory on November 4th?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117147616/575505999/-1226360719?refcode=ea.4aaeea48-81a7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.4aaeea48-81a7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhYWVlYTQ4LTgxYTctZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2xsop69O0AQglrobKEKKlP3QSiIGEGlKCycnhnbQDag=)**

name: Adam Schiff
subject: How we stop Trump… -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi, Adam Schiff here. It's my honor to serve as California's newest Senator and one of your DSCC Vice Chairs, fighting to flip the Senate blue.

**[In a moment, I'm going to tell you why we _must_ take back the Senate majority to stop Trump's agenda. But first, I need to ask: Will you donate $5 to the DSCC to make it happen?](https://go.dscc.org/go/22085?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251012-AdamSchiff-VCSchiffTrumpFRRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251012-AdamSchiff-VCSchiffTrumpFRRF-Pros-sl1&akid=21457%2E9716520%2EJDkheb)**

Let me make this as plain as possible: **Donald Trump isn't fit to lead.**

We see it in his actions every day. But how have Senate Republicans responded to this shocking display? With shrugs, and -- more importantly -- _votes_ to let Donald Trump have his way with our government and continue on his authoritarian path.

**And that is exactly why we _must_ take back the Senate: Republicans will _never_ stand up to Trump, so if _anyone_ is going to stop this madness and hold him accountable, the responsibility falls to Democrats like us.**

name: Elizabeth Guzman
subject: SCOTUS could bring back conversion therapy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman
body:
| | | Did you see the news, Friend? The Supreme Court is signaling it may overturn **state bans on conversion therapy** — a devastating attack on LGBTQ+ youth. _This is exactly the kind of rollback we must stop._ Here’s where I stand — and where my opponent fails us:
* In 2020, I voted to ban conversion therapy in Virginia. **No one should be forced to change who they are.******
* My opponent, Ian Lovejoy, wasn’t in the legislature then. But as a legislator, he **skipped the vote** to put marriage equality into Virginia’s constitution.
* If we lose this seat — and if MAGA regains power in VA — we risk having no defense in Richmond when SCOTUS rolls back protections.

This election is about more than budgets or local roads. It’s about **safeguarding dignity, respect, and the rights of Virginia’s LGBTQ+ youth**. ******[We’re less than a month out. I need your help now to ensure we have a voice strong enough to push back. Can you donate today?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqeoZfkhx0rJYxvzeQyPAOXxPzaHpN7uxnA66Ao0W-7EqZyFw6iLW1nc6uNsMh9U_6Cj1D6_hPjIrw3NtPnGDwSM2zw0NjSLPk9JLks4IrJhh8u6Ow-ShwzMFrKntkAT2trYjSLTxbBXTFgONLHQz2s8ylHvg7xtC0NvvaPNZZO2Q7FI8hxAsHmWsnR1RmncRvsG8PHKUO4Z5zjYO1JQKBAVM7rxWSRekShDF4gofQRSee8_pVkoWDzG_qFuWf3knlcgWy67sZf8391scgmlkn4IfFv6Iaxt3pGrTuzpDquIeixMB9rH9Zx80jjZ_w0umKw/4ko/ionykq7iSiaU5Pzp0332zg/h0/h001.bWO1rc8xEZNM3LyeW93YAlInG_fGu3Bn_gdwFa302iQ)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

clean_body: | | | Did you see the news, Friend? The Supreme Court is signaling it may overturn state bans on conversion therapy — a devastating attack on LGBTQ+ youth. This is exactly the kind of rollback we must stop. Here’s where I stand — and where my opponent fails us: In 2020, I voted to ban conversion therapy in Virginia. No one should be forced to change who they are.**** My opponent, Ian Lovejoy, wasn’t in the legislature then. But as a legislator, he skipped the vote to put marriage equality into Virginia’s constitution. If we lose this seat — and if MAGA regains power in VA — we risk having no defense in Richmond when SCOTUS rolls back protections. This election is about more than budgets or local roads. It’s about safeguarding dignity, respect, and the rights of Virginia’s LGBTQ+ youth. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. We must hold the line in state government so that our laws, not just our courts, protect everyone in Virginia Thanks for joining us in this fight. With resolve, Elizabeth | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. Contributions or gifts to Guzman for Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . _**First**_ , we were told the Black Lives Matter riots were "mostly peaceful protests."

_**Then**_ , there were assassination attempts on President Trump and Brett Kavanaugh, leading up to the tragic political assassination of Charlie Kirk last month.

_**Now, this?!**_

The man seeking the top law enforcement job in the Commonwealth of Virginia sent text messages wishing one of his political opponents got "two bullets to the head." Yet, he's still in the race with a little less than one month until Virginia's November elections.

But it doesn't end there.

Democrats' choice for a gubernatorial candidate, told supporters, "Let your rage fuel you."

And here in Minnesota, Tim Walz openly rooted for President Trump's death.

I can only say THANK GOD President Trump beat Kamala Harris and Tim Walz last November. Can you imagine having a vice president who has so little moral clarity that he would root for the death of a sitting president of the United States?

And here's the kicker: _my opponent in this Senate race is even worse.**She's more progressive than Walz, more radical than Walz, and every bit as dangerous.**_

* They both want to ban firearms in Minnesota.
* They both see Republicans not as opposition of ideas, but as enemies to be silenced and crushed.

And if they get their way, they'll forcefully instill their warped vision of America on EVERYONE.

**[Will you chip in a dollar or two to my campaign today to help me stop these hard-left lunatics in their tracks?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=526ba0af46f14fab8f87ca61d0e656fa&_e=FH3fj7rVSCBJZN75MyZ1C3vKxd6xH_qbU9bAuFtu-7BryfbZa_q4ZpxzCObjcM66c7dYy39GL68LyXAh9J9n4Hv1U9fVSB9C1r-SgqwkwvewtCNMkeqdIJYwAM2Yci1clP8xBMAarcx80uKyaUgpuHj35_IPjnurejiYuJu5Ox38nWLqCG9rcY5rgnzD1OuATwKZBCRT2X6Kck5g3EYP0ZumHzxyZCsGbrFmjgj8yNg7BtxGQXgsPGtpBC0EGdJSb0Z7lOKn9qsnz5ki-Tw4t4X46jTQKBrBq5MFTCXyzYeKawMe4g93poazIwCdvTOi62JYVqXM5c6uWqab-QqGB6Hm_Ha_BBQJi0EKTc5tahdBNJL8dpN5raB7iykE9qXdRW5Z-qXutvreGKJcFftttM6HmhVRTxzYLR-VhNx0ia3dStQlEm8vh6-m6VOySzWFvndNwP1-VhOxznzxf-jlJTGyrfEzD7IIwtYZ60gWWxOSCF0JUj0kTy96LyjZkLSZ9SawGC6HCMKFL4L0D_AxKqChYXsznh4dtoD7KcqRPqShaIGSFWvh_2hUo0N5C5a7vkaHwZSW-b1wFVwlz1IDzZtjyKkcTcSaCBLtY1fk3Z7XL_oarSoMdh787ocUY6Vmh-igvl6s17Jt2cIxH_oo1bENQqzb_uNg4-MHZoCqzoj5f_syZEKzjIdWTozbE2Vh3op9xWUgDZXeB8HHrez6t4DXqz16yS7noHoCtu7QmkOlOazf0Y3NV6-TWy2rbry4D11uMpcPfpYRcY8NKvN5uQ%3D%3D)**

clean_body: Another Democrat inciting political violence. | Democrats are at it again. And I wish I were surprised, Peter. Take a look at leaked text messages from Virginia Democrat AG candidate Jay Jones: ⬇️⬇️ This is despicable, but more of the same from the radical Left. First , we were told the Black Lives Matter riots were "mostly peaceful protests." Then , there were assassination attempts on President Trump and Brett Kavanaugh, leading up to the tragic political assassination of Charlie Kirk last month. Now, this?! The man seeking the top law enforcement job in the Commonwealth of Virginia sent text messages wishing one of his political opponents got "two bullets to the head." Yet, he's still in the race with a little less than one month until Virginia's November elections. But it doesn't end there. Democrats' choice for a gubernatorial candidate, told supporters, "Let your rage fuel you." And here in Minnesota, Tim Walz openly rooted for President Trump's death. I can only say THANK GOD President Trump beat Kamala Harris and Tim Walz last November. Can you imagine having a vice president who has so little moral clarity that he would root for the death of a sitting president of the United States? And here's the kicker: my opponent in this Senate race is even worse.She's more progressive than Walz, more radical than Walz, and every bit as dangerous. They both want to ban firearms in Minnesota. They both see Republicans not as opposition of ideas, but as enemies to be silenced and crushed. And if they get their way, they'll forcefully instill their warped vision of America on EVERYONE. We must show the country that these midterm elections are a referendum on the rise in political violence on the Left, and that this rhetoric from them has CONSEQUENCES. Thanks for joining me in this fight. Adam Schwarze Proud Marine Veteran Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Cruz plans to introduce a bill in the coming weeks that would codify protections against government-driven censorship, and make it easier for consumers to win monetary damages in lawsuits, he said in an interview. Cruz, the head of the Senate Commerce Committee, said he also plans to focus on..." **[Cruz Calls To Impeach Biden Judge Who Handled Kavanaugh Assassination Plot Case:](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)** "Sen. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140955?c0=jd-em-20251012-jp.9QmlgM&source=em20251012-37096&t=1003&akid=37096%2E1203867%2Eeyq_2s ]Endorse Justin

Justin is a progressive, tireless fighter who is always answering
constituents’ calls, attending community events, and showing up for his
community. When people in his district call, they don’t have to seek him
out or jump through hoops to speak with him, because he’s there, in the
community, fighting for them and alongside them.

In Congress, Justin won’t back down or bow down to corporate lobbies,
special interests, or big-dollar donors — unlike his opponent and the vast
majority of Congressmembers like him, who are content with incumbency and
put in little to no effort to win their constituents’ trust or fight for
their best interests.

As an organizer and a state legislator, Justin has been a leader in the
fight against Elon Musk and xAI in Memphis, Big Oil, the NRA, and
corporate gun manufacturers who make our communities less safe. As a
member of Congress, he’ll keep up the fight for:

* Economic equity and security, including national solutions to make
billionaires and corporations pay their fair share and protect workers
and unions under attack, so we can receive the investments in jobs,
wages, housing, and healthcare — like Medicare for All — the people
need to not only survive but thrive.
* Commonsense gun laws that place the lives of our children, loved ones,
and neighbors above the interests of gun lobbyists;
* Environmental and climate justice, including clean air, clean water,
and clean soil for every community, as the Trump administration and
corporate polluters roll back decades of environmental protections;
* Education and youth programming, including quality public schools,
investments in youth community centers, mentorship, and programming
opportunities, and free public college and trade schools.

Winning this primary won’t be easy. Justin is going up against a powerful
incumbent who’s been in Congress for nearly 20 years, elected office for
over 40 years, and built a multimillion-dollar war chest along the way.
But we’ve proven before that organized people can defeat organized money,
and with your support, we’ll do it again.

We’re on a mission to grow our progressive coalition in Congress so that
we can finally pass Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, Housing for All,
and more. But to do that, we need to elect Justin J. Pearson in Tennessee.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140955?c0=jd-em-20251012-jp.9QmlgM&source=em20251012-37096&t=1004&akid=37096%2E1203867%2Eeyq_2s ]Add your name today to endorse Justin’s campaign and show the political
establishment that our working-class movement isn't backing down.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140955?c0=jd-em-20251012-jp.9QmlgM&source=em20251012-37096&t=1005&akid=37096%2E1203867%2Eeyq_2s ]Add Your Name

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

name: Powered by People
subject: Ready to defeat Greg Abbott?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Greg Abbott is running for a fourth term as governor.

For the last 12 years, he’s made it his mission to push Texas further into
extremism—from stripping away health care access to attacking voting
rights. He hasn’t fought for everyday Texans; he only cares about himself
and his wealthy allies.

Here’s a quick snapshot of Abbott’s record:

* Sought to fine Democrats and remove them from office when they fought
back against Trump’s power grab during the Republican-led
redistricting scheme.
* Blocked Medicaid expansion, leaving millions of Texans without
affordable health care in the least insured state.
* Enacted the nation’s most extreme abortion ban that has no exception
for rape or incest.
* Suppressed voting rights through new ID requirements and limits on
mail-in voting.
* Defunded public education by taking tax dollars out of public schools
and sending them to private schools.
* Signed a bill that mandates the display of the Ten Commandments in
every public school classroom.
* Enacted a dangerous permitless carry law that allows Texans to carry a
loaded gun in public without a background check, training, or permit.

But this is our opportunity to flip the script.

Powered by People is building grassroots power in every part of Texas that
can defeat Abbott next year. By organizing communities, registering
voters, and mobilizing Texans statewide, we can block Abbott from a fourth
term in office and elect leaders throughout the state who fight for all
Texans—not just a wealthy few.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251012.H8u7na&refcode=ema20251012-240400&t=1002&akid=240400%2E444211%2E5XJ58L ]Will you chip in $3 to help us defeat Greg Abbott and
build the Texas we deserve?

Thank you,

Powered by People

name: NEGOP
subject: REMINDER: 🚨 Your Weekly Update From The NEGOP
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY](https://feyrpzhbb
body:
News, events, and action items to keep Nebraska red and growing strong.
| | | | |
---
| Letter from the Chair
---
As I plan and strategize for the Nebraska Republican Party's goals in the 2026 elections and beyond, I find myself reflecting on the NEGOP's rich history and enduring legacy.
As we know, the Republican Party was born in the wake of the Kansas-Nebraska Act of 1854, forged from a coalition of former Whigs, Free Soilers, and anti-slavery Democrats united under the powerful slogan, "Free Labor, Free Land, Free Men." In 1854, Abraham Lincoln emerged from retirement to embrace this new party, which formalized its platform in 1856, setting the stage for a transformative era in American politics.
Recently, while sifting through memorabilia in the NEGOP office, I uncovered more treasures from our party's storied past. I found that starting in 1935, the NEGOP had hosted a Founders Day Celebration to honor individuals who have made significant contributions to both the party and the state of Nebraska. Serving on the Founders Day Committee was considered a great honor, nearly as prestigious as receiving recognition at the event itself.
This year, we proudly mark the 90th anniversary of the NEGOP Founders Day. To commemorate this milestone, we are reviving the tradition with a special Founders Day Dinner on December 11th in Omaha. This event will celebrate our honorees and provide an opportunity for us to come together, reflect on our remarkable history, and look forward to a promising future. More details will follow, but for now, save the date! Join us as we honor those who have contributed to the NEGOP's enduring legacy and who continue to inspire us as we plan our future.

Mary Jane Truemper Chairman, Nebraska Republican Party
---
| |

clean_body: News, events, and action items to keep Nebraska red and growing strong. | | | | | | Letter from the Chair As I plan and strategize for the Nebraska Republican Party's goals in the 2026 elections and beyond, I find myself reflecting on the NEGOP's rich history and enduring legacy. As we know, the Republican Party was born in the wake of the Kansas-Nebraska Act of 1854, forged from a coalition of former Whigs, Free Soilers, and anti-slavery Democrats united under the powerful slogan, "Free Labor, Free Land, Free Men." In 1854, Abraham Lincoln emerged from retirement to embrace this new party, which formalized its platform in 1856, setting the stage for a transformative era in American politics. Recently, while sifting through memorabilia in the NEGOP office, I uncovered more treasures from our party's storied past. I found that starting in 1935, the NEGOP had hosted a Founders Day Celebration to honor individuals who have made significant contributions to both the party and the state of Nebraska. Serving on the Founders Day Committee was considered a great honor, nearly as prestigious as receiving recognition at the event itself. This year, we proudly mark the 90th anniversary of the NEGOP Founders Day. To commemorate this milestone, we are reviving the tradition with a special Founders Day Dinner on December 11th in Omaha. This event will celebrate our honorees and provide an opportunity for us to come together, reflect on our remarkable history, and look forward to a promising future. More details will follow, but for now, save the date! Join us as we honor those who have contributed to the NEGOP's enduring legacy and who continue to inspire us as we plan our future. Mary Jane Truemper Chairman, Nebraska Republican Party | | | | == | == | | == | | | UPCOMING NEGOP EVENTS | | == | | == | == | == | == | | | Help Republicans win in 2026 and beyond. From Detroit to Marquette, we’re going to reach voters across the state |
#

Friends — Every election has something that can tip the scale. **In 2026, it’s Michigan.** Control of the Senate, the House, and decisions over our fundamental freedoms and livelihoods could all come down to what happens here. Republicans know it, too — their super PACs are already flooding Michigan with attack ads and dark money to flip our state red. And they’re gearing up for millions more dollars’ worth of attacks. If we don’t fight back _now,_ we risk losing all the progress we’ve made with Governor Whitmer’s leadership. **So Fight Like Hell PAC is going all in. Hello Peter, I’m Roy Cooper, and before I ask for your contribution to our campaign for the U.S. Senate, I’d like to reintroduce myself and remind you why this fight is worth your attention — _[and your investment.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117150684/575517445/-1743631236?refcode=ea.23538b20-89a7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.23538b20-89a7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzUzOGIyMC04OWE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7lUkFbe3GRLavSuaN7jyFl2r8lfOYgVfJka0z6bDUTE=)_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117150686/575517446/-1743631236?refcode=ea.23538b20-89a7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.23538b20-89a7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzUzOGIyMC04OWE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7lUkFbe3GRLavSuaN7jyFl2r8lfOYgVfJka0z6bDUTE=) I loved serving my home state of North Carolina as Governor, Attorney General, and a legislator before that. I’m a lucky husband and father. A diehard Carolina Hurricanes fan. A proud graduate of public schools. I’m the Governor who got NC’s Medicaid Expansion done and a fierce defender of your right to get an abortion if you choose to do so. And I’m asking for your support to be the next Democratic Senator from North Carolina because this state is the tipping point — if we win here, we can take back the U.S. Senate from the GOP. Peter, are you in? **[If you’re with me, click here to help our team raise $75,000 before our mid-October fundraising deadline on Wednesday.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117150689/575517449/-1743631236?refcode=ea.23538b20-89a7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.23538b20-89a7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzUzOGIyMC04OWE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7lUkFbe3GRLavSuaN7jyFl2r8lfOYgVfJka0z6bDUTE=)** Look, I’m running for the U.S. Senate because I’m fed up with seeing Washington politicians strip away our rights, drive up the cost of living, tear apart our democracy and gut health care and SNAP benefits for folks in need. I’m profoundly frustrated for women who have been prevented from accessing reproductive care; students whose special education services are on the line; and future generations who deserve leaders who will protect our planet, not contribute to its destruction. **Peter, I’m ready to take them on.** We must achieve a balance of power in Washington to stop extreme Republicans from doing further harm to our nation. Flipping the Senate starts right here, in this toss-up race. That’s why national Republicans are already targeting me and directing huge sums to my far-right opponent. Experts are saying this’ll be the most competitive Senate election of 2026 — and it might be the first-ever to cost over 1 billion dollars. _Talk about absurd._ **[I am asking you to step up with a contribution before our mid-month deadline because I can’t keep up with the GOP’s cash without your investment, and I can’t win this one without you on my team.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117150691/575517451/-1743631236?refcode=ea.23538b20-89a7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.23538b20-89a7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzUzOGIyMC04OWE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7lUkFbe3GRLavSuaN7jyFl2r8lfOYgVfJka0z6bDUTE=)** I will never stop fighting for this country, and I’m grateful to know you’re with me. Roy Cooper [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117150692/575517452/-1743631236?refcode=ea.23538b20-89a7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.23538b20-89a7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzUzOGIyMC04OWE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7lUkFbe3GRLavSuaN7jyFl2r8lfOYgVfJka0z6bDUTE=)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

name: David Hogg
subject: We’re hitting reset
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
There’s no way around it.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251012-1&t=1&akid=2735%2E587540%2EoMNjES)
Peter,
I know a lot of groups are asking you for money right now, even at a time when it seems like the Democratic Party is failing to win or deliver. I know it can be frustrating if you’re chipping in, but you aren’t seeing the results you want to see.
**Here’s what’s different about Leaders We Deserve:** We are recruiting a brand new wave of young leaders to come in and fight the worst of Trump’s agenda AND show the positive, youthful, and modern direction we want for the party’s future.
Think of it this way, Peter — **_this is our chance to reset the Democratic Party._**
But there’s no way around it. We cannot do this work without grassroots support.
Unlike the other side, we don’t have a legion of corporatist billionaires ready to finance our efforts. There is no one waiting in the wings with a $5 million check.
Instead, we’re building this movement with _$5, $10, and $25_ at a time. (Some folks may give more when they’re able — and at the end of the day, it all really adds up.)
That’s why I’m writing to you today, Peter. We need people like you — people who understand that the Democratic Party needs a reset — to join us in the fight.
**[Will you contribute $5 right now to help us reset the Democratic Party?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251012_reset.IVePhM&refcode=em20251012-2735&amount=5&t=3&akid=2735%2E587540%2EoMNjES)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251012_reset.IVePhM&amount=5&refcode=em20251012-2735&t=22&akid=2735%2E587540%2EoMNjES)**
Thank you,
David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20251012-1&t=23&refcode2=2735_587540_oMNjES&akid=2735%2E587540%2EoMNjES)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=24&akid=2735%2E587540%2EoMNjES)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2735%2E587540%2EoMNjES)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

Fellow American,

It was just revealed that my private communications — and those of seven other Republican Senators — were monitored by Biden’s FBI as part of their politically motivated January 6th probe.

Let me be clear: **_this is a blatant violation of the Constitution!_**

The Biden administration spied on sitting U.S. Senators. They weaponized federal law enforcement to track and intimidate political opponents — _the very people elected to hold them accountable._

This is the kind of abuse you expect to see in authoritarian regimes — not the United States of America.

The Democrats are going to try to sweep this under the rug and say it’s in the past, **but I will not stay silent on this.**

I will fight with everything I have to investigate, hold those responsible—including those who knew and did nothing—accountable, and ensure this appalling abuse of power can never happen again.

**But this fight is going to take all of us.** If you believe _**no American**_ — elected official or not — should be targeted for their political views, [**I’m asking for your help today.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=b2372f23fe424fbc904276d9cf99ca29&_e=E567OWF_KBQb7dTtOtHZUESnx-NDuw6KAd578vcGZ-W-m7YeMB4tVlkji1dE7OvXM0fmNUIHKZNRSUjN4dDGmGIgMvVWw48PT66fp8-TxM_aDylzQs1HOsF7lhVC7tjv5zblaa6qJVMHOI9GHQn_jIsGRgyaooCD9e-Mp4NMId_5fTK5biT2vBUvVQe9t_p-st4E-dV5-opbX0QSutF4HoQpDAROvmjcC12CUvB40W-bfaE3ZBSaubLGWDOyOb8CiJjnyIr0rEIZu98HogNqoIvAVGVpxM50ECPJQtlOmmSp58QZTnoPpOCvd4bYKRsytU6tgPf1C8iJhQulKHH495jquNqrKoJvMT-6sB6X6NUIUE3v9qbFUOw_wPLVtlrzlYb37XZIpPSBesys-gJ9WQlS8vPr5oQNcxOLFjojmU-7NABWHomCo6M6xF7NOU_GskDtlCXtrygf4fjz5-TojYId_-3PEicffw3pHUGNQkyFB3mvV_R5ZwuBGeASdB56m1CoXf8qv-qHCjwabi1lsmzV2f4krIyh95wWjCidGTSS8PM1fYD0xnDh8-ywOqvU7Xvg33W4IR8KgbLIdudiIFSWDUtdmNX-0A4IJwFZ78ukA3ukOiygFg57Cd8eljhzH1SdsHs1-Jiq3PxQmtP2rweKToBIGwK40pyqJ7WhwkVj5-ShZhs8ZZw8lSp8GA6HOCdaP99wx_ycCzQs92Whog%3D%3D)

Let me be clear: this is a blatant violation of the Constitution! The Biden administration spied on sitting U.S. Senators. They weaponized federal law enforcement to track and intimidate political opponents — the very people elected to hold them accountable. This is the kind of abuse you expect to see in authoritarian regimes — not the United States of America. The Democrats are going to try to sweep this under the rug and say it’s in the past, but I will not stay silent on this. I will fight with everything I have to investigate, hold those responsible—including those who knew and did nothing—accountable, and ensure this appalling abuse of power can never happen again. But this fight is going to take all of us. If you believe no American — elected official or not — should be targeted for their political views, | Thank you for standing with me as we expose this corruption and defend the principles that make America free. Cynthia Lummis U.S. Senator for Wyoming Follow Cynthia Lummis | Paid for by Lummis for Wyoming Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

name: Rob Bonta
subject: Letitia James and I are asking for your urgent support:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25]
Friends, I wanted to make sure you saw this important message from my friend and esteemed colleague, New York Attorney General Letitia James.
Coming on the heels of the politically influenced indictment of former FBI director James Comey , Trump’s DOJ indicted Attorney General James this week as clear retribution for her work to hold the President accountable to the law.
The U.S. DOJ is blindly doing Trump’s bidding as he targets his enemies — and that should send chills down all our spines.
Please read the message from AG James below, and then rush a split donation to send a strong message that we won’t back down. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25-james]
Thanks for stepping up.
—Rob Bonta
--------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Letitia James
Sent: Thu, Oct 9, 2025
Subject: Donald Trump and his admin just indicted me
By now, you've likely heard the news: Donald Trump and his administration have indicted me on baseless charges – all because I’ve done my job as Attorney General.
For months now, we've seen Trump manipulate the justice system in a coordinated effort to go after his political opponents for defending the rule of law.
I knew that holding the most powerful and corrupt accountable – especially the president – could make me a target. But I'm not about to back down now, and I know you aren't either.
Trump is escalating his political retribution campaign – and I need your immediate help to fight back.
We must show, right now, that the American people reject his dangerous political revenge campaign. I'm calling for 20,000 rapid-response donations to send an unmistakable message: We won’t back down. Will you rush a donation split between me and California Attorney General Rob Bonta right now to help us stand firm and keep fighting? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25-james]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split evenly between Letitia James and Rob Bonta:
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25-james?express_lane=true&amount=10] DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25-james?express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25-james?express_lane=true&amount=50] DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25-james?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25-james?express_lane=true&amount=250] OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25-james]
Thank you for being in this with me.
– Letitia James
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25-james]
To contribute via check, please address to:
Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026
c/o Deane & Company
1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Thank you for supporting Rob Bonta. Grassroots supporters like you help us protect California’s working families, advance criminal justice reform, and keep our communities safe. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. If we're going to protect and serve the people of California, we need you with us every step of the way.
If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, click unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/tsXL_NR2qEmgRRek5GtgsA2?unsubscribedata=mFFo%2BaeVezv5u5f3USeV455M1ZAWzwk0C%2Fy1F5TJbf7%2F%2BOpX3GktXRv6N4JqGW%2FBH%2Bo1b66BFZB37nLarPMzNRUYHLr2wRvCTyVDKyeApp6bQ3m%2BbwLAcuqybqU1U6g4uldgpw5mZI589scFZOAVHhR7yP50XOByNb8GKKpIDGuxP6oiH3UrfsFWpAf9GJGFs%2BdzpRf5HSj%2FQgfa8ZWpkjWvx6WJqkgoyNvPLJfmCmizbbD6Gn%2BDmkvbfZHVD5KOcMsV5DP4gmmApJ04KPADGkSY5ki6e9OuH9em23gPrmKSBrMdoyoTBvy1TpY2hs2u2rs7UH%2FmFCaiS0EGUOAHjRd%2FpiBY5nWCJq6D3vO6BI%2Fhjici1pt4m2Ptkgyvy3mnWZuIIv%2BfoV0jB8zzdrqDdf16KxRrHkFQKPiNrc8tP%2BAXczZjwGQ7lXFegkZZ8N5l .
From all of us at Team Bonta, thank you for your support!

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Foreclosures, evictions, and loan defaults
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Derek, as we near two weeks of government shutdown, I’ve introduced new legislation:
The Federal Employee Civil Relief Act would protect federal workers and federal contractor employees — and their families — from foreclosures, evictions, and loan defaults during a shutdown.
The fact is, more than half a million federal workers are going without pay — through no fault of their own — and many are trying to figure out how to pay their rent, mortgage, car payment, or countless other bills.
This legislation would protect folks from losing their homes or defaulting on payments through a government shutdown and give them a 30-day period to keep up with their bills once the government reopens.
I’m proud that this bill has the support of our union partners, including the National Treasury Employees Union, American Federation of Government Employees, UNITE HERE, the Transport Workers Union, and many more.
I’d like to ask for your support, too — because public pressure can make a real difference in getting things done right now.
Please add your name in support of my new legislation to protect federal workers from evictions, foreclosures, and loan defaults during government shutdowns. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Dds925BjEk-lCqRPNeFixw2]
ADD MY NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Dds925BjEk-lCqRPNeFixw2]
These are hardworking public servants who aren’t receiving a paycheck through circumstances they didn’t create — and we owe it to them to protect their livelihoods.
Thanks for your support. I really appreciate you.
—Tim Kaine

clean_body: [] Derek, as we near two weeks of government shutdown, I’ve introduced new legislation: The Federal Employee Civil Relief Act would protect federal workers and federal contractor employees — and their families — from foreclosures, evictions, and loan defaults during a shutdown. The fact is, more than half a million federal workers are going without pay — through no fault of their own — and many are trying to figure out how to pay their rent, mortgage, car payment, or countless other bills. This legislation would protect folks from losing their homes or defaulting on payments through a government shutdown and give them a 30-day period to keep up with their bills once the government reopens. I’m proud that this bill has the support of our union partners, including the National Treasury Employees Union, American Federation of Government Employees, UNITE HERE, the Transport Workers Union, and many more. I’d like to ask for your support, too — because public pressure can make a real difference in getting things done right now. Please add your name in support of my new legislation to protect federal workers from evictions, foreclosures, and loan defaults during government shutdowns. [] ADD MY NAME [] These are hardworking public servants who aren’t receiving a paycheck through circumstances they didn’t create — and we owe it to them to protect their livelihoods. Thanks for your support. I really appreciate you. —Tim Kaine [] CONTRIBUTE [] Paid for by Kaine for Virginia 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272 Williamsburg, VA 23185 Emails like this one are a critical part of staying in touch during this important election year. Peter, Wisconsin families face far too many struggles right now. **From the rising costs of healthcare to affording the electricity bill, we need someone who is looking out for us.** But Derrick Van Orden? He only views our district with contempt. After all, this is a man who has voted to cut Medicaid, children’s healthcare, and veterans benefits while taking thousands of dollars from Elon Musk and other billionaires. This is a man who told a constituent, “ _I don’t give a F*ck who you are, I’m a Congressman._ ” We deserve SO much better. **That’s why we need to elect leaders who will put real, working class Wisconsinites first.** Rebecca knows what working families need, because she’s part of one. She believes every voice that calls WI-03 home matters. And she’ll make policy that works for us -- not the elite. But to get there, we’ll need continued grassroots support to keep up with Van Orden’s misinformation machine. Patriot, When I heard of Charlie Kirk, he wasn't famous. He wasn't filling arenas. He wasn't a household name. A few people told me, _" You've gotta meet this guy -- he's doing something big out in Illinois."_ So I went. Charlie was running Turning Point from a modest office in the Chicago suburbs -- surviving on coffee and pure belief that America was still worth saving.
| [ ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=28361fcb3ef54097a897eacfd158530b&_e=XGzK4bT2WBV-DMM81PwEVbpKY6_tkAn41GClv_ZO6gIecqcwNmxFMoHNevwHYfoM4ADrERU53fhuaCKtPCNQITEiSp7i_aJPW1iXukiUhQ9y0-omY1ucRD5yionAXCWaobCHjXX5-Y4kjm3J39GEUFtTUoUHcm1vxTbyi5mQp74iUxNPEfGCgSoyJjveQoZWtWgOcpkY15UEDUa6NnEb4pdwrVMMcGVyPCzvQtrGwO6Mz5g1dclFWgFToxO3TwmfJ1gbNkbA47GADJBDABE7OwyxMOb-RHCwuSd4UoY9ValdD4TR_kMI5w1JJmibgHhhjHCzVoKgUbsOxM3oqXlJZpXa7GmT_HU1fCq4eWTf5uai5RZaY2KuVtq_u6JsidbsoYwHmpdwkEFGq5_IMkuLbcTj1JYAWnlt8zH1jqOEgfYwV6sooG3xqGL3Jb24dUlMbVZb7_4lJMsm6_sJE0SVRg-I8oK68sq4C9LrJfEh5pW_Q-6b4VVzG1krvqO1yb11tFRKud-cwE4FE1KrZeDBpZXe3QNTTvI2Vvd43a-Ni1FQzAgoiIeGypL3JgkKUAVl_ZQHwAT4yPOybbFchgq7RnjLZR10lgYLabl4RwihIlW4t6ym9rYerY7Q0mSv3-huETAiecMRTXZBhFE0wHNVhybixYHXKexvCMpgZKuIfxiZG6FUOPihiKFUJnRjLY24ma19QZDUXEKK9gMHo_qWgA%3D%3D)
---
_**Above:** The original Turning Point HQ in Lemont, Illinois. This is where it all began -- just Charlie, a vision, and a mission that changed everything. _
Back then, we were both organizing young conservatives, both dreaming about how to win back the culture. But when I first sat down with Charlie... _I knew._ Charlie was the visionary. He had the plan. And I HAD to be part of it. I jumped in and never looked back. From that moment on, I was there for all of it. The early conferences and campuses. The road trips. The rallies. The fights. In those days, our team didn't have much. But what we had was conviction -- and that was more than enough. Because we believed in something BIG. Something real. Something urgent. **Faith, family, freedom** -- and the absolute grit to go build something that could save this country. And Charlie? _He did it._ He didn't just build a brand... _He built a machine._ First, Charlie built a movement that changed the hearts and minds of an entire generation -- a seismic shift that flipped the narrative that young people belonged to the Left. Then, he built Turning Point Action to become the grassroots force the Left never saw coming... and beat them at their own game. And, I hitched my wagon to it _from the start._ Charlie and I weren't just friends... We were brothers in the fight. We did everything together.
| [ ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=28361fcb3ef54097a897eacfd158530b&_e=XGzK4bT2WBV-DMM81PwEVbpKY6_tkAn41GClv_ZO6gIecqcwNmxFMoHNevwHYfoM4ADrERU53fhuaCKtPCNQITEiSp7i_aJPW1iXukiUhQ9y0-omY1ucRD5yionAXCWaobCHjXX5-Y4kjm3J39GEUFtTUoUHcm1vxTbyi5mQp74iUxNPEfGCgSoyJjveQoZWtWgOcpkY15UEDUa6NnEb4pdwrVMMcGVyPCzvQtrGwO6Mz5g1dclFWgFToxO3Twmf1rKdZlBJwc-kO84YEjT2V483M71teHdxc-37rGZ-hcmVMHz5N2rOd3q9kmGz0oCHZxIod8okKG7-hDOLBWuY-maKJySlYEmi-J3qtcvmFwLTeujfKKvHbj-rOxEIbaA_lv6vPtvsdbnEf6HkwVX9Ic6gsURA6vP-OXplOqH2V2yj1FPDf-k2229zk4jb_8WzDeJKNN5_tkjeH567__Pqtbir4H7HRs6pYg3sVu8AucEVLws9OyRVXTkmwm7oc2Xy0nmYmqz6R6Ldi7VZ0GpVfNzqMhMfJOIc_MzzGL_apgY5wYjSvViW1P3W9G830fb2BE7gkxzCtoNBTm2B_82o1Vh2NAjpyPYto4WPx6KgIzhsBr_pLZ_wkJfMlm2qTge-rsM_IH0oEAF1jQOSJsYvbwLC8hndtDjxflRnrIjMP5ra4cH6ieM7mIoKt96FIVZTSR0h4xsa__KX0k9DjUcR_g%3D%3D)
---
We strategized over midnight texts... battled together through COVID, the 2020 Election, and every crisis they threw at us... We created AmericaFest from scratch... launched Turning Point Action to go on offense -- in the very states the GOP had given up on. **And we rallied a grassroots army that put President Donald J. Trump back in the White House in 2024. ** We didn't just talk about chasing ballots... Turning Point Action built the first full-scale, professional ballot-chasing operation on the Right -- _and it delivered real results._ 10 for 10. **In every single state we operated in... Trump won.** In Arizona _alone,_ we chased over 205,000 low-propensity conservative votes -- well beyond the margin of victory. _In Wisconsin?_ 60,000+. _In Nevada?_ 6,000+ -- and we won back a district we hadn't carried in 20 years. _In Michigan?_ 14,000+ votes helped us flip a U.S. House seat and take the state house majority. We didn't just make noise... _We made history. _

clean_body: A tribute to Charlie & Turning Point Action—see how to help and double your impact today. | | Patriot, When I heard of Charlie Kirk, he wasn't famous. He wasn't filling arenas. He wasn't a household name. A few people told me, " You've gotta meet this guy -- he's doing something big out in Illinois." So I went. Charlie was running Turning Point from a modest office in the Chicago suburbs -- surviving on coffee and pure belief that America was still worth saving. | Above: The original Turning Point HQ in Lemont, Illinois. This is where it all began -- just Charlie, a vision, and a mission that changed everything. Back then, we were both organizing young conservatives, both dreaming about how to win back the culture. But when I first sat down with Charlie... I knew. Charlie was the visionary. He had the plan. And I HAD to be part of it. I jumped in and never looked back. From that moment on, I was there for all of it. The early conferences and campuses. The road trips. The rallies. The fights. In those days, our team didn't have much. But what we had was conviction -- and that was more than enough. Because we believed in something BIG. Something real. Something urgent. Faith, family, freedom -- and the absolute grit to go build something that could save this country. And Charlie? He did it. He didn't just build a brand... He built a machine. First, Charlie built a movement that changed the hearts and minds of an entire generation -- a seismic shift that flipped the narrative that young people belonged to the Left. Then, he built Turning Point Action to become the grassroots force the Left never saw coming... and beat them at their own game. And, I hitched my wagon to it from the start. Charlie and I weren't just friends... We were brothers in the fight. We did everything together. | We strategized over midnight texts... battled together through COVID, the 2020 Election, and every crisis they threw at us... We created AmericaFest from scratch... launched Turning Point Action to go on offense -- in the very states the GOP had given up on. And we rallied a grassroots army that put President Donald J. Trump back in the White House in 2024. We didn't just talk about chasing ballots... Turning Point Action built the first full-scale, professional ballot-chasing operation on the Right -- and it delivered real results. 10 for 10. In every single state we operated in... Trump won. In Arizona alone, we chased over 205,000 low-propensity conservative votes -- well beyond the margin of victory. In Wisconsin? 60,000+. In Nevada? 6,000+ -- and we won back a district we hadn't carried in 20 years. In Michigan? 14,000+ votes helped us flip a U.S. House seat and take the state house majority. We didn't just make noise... We made history. | Above: Election Night 2024. Our biggest win yet. That's me on the left -- still fighting beside Charlie, just like we always did. Patriot, I watched Charlie pour everything into this mission. He lived on the road 300+ days a year. We never stopped. Because Charlie never stopped. He didn't build all of this for clout or clicks... Instead, he did it for this country. For all of us. For every parent who feels like they're losing their kid to the Left... For every student who's afraid to speak up... For every American who still believes in this country... Charlie built this movement and this machine for them. For you. And now? After he gave everything for that mission? We have to carry the torch. We have to keep the machine running -- and make it stronger than ever. Everything we've felt since the day we lost Charlie -- we must turn it into action. He used to ask me (and everyone else at Turning Point) all the time: " What are we building next?" Well, Patriot, here 's the answer: We're building the next generation of grassroots power -- one voter, one precinct, one act of courage at a time. | But it doesn 't happen without you. So, here 's my ask... Go to church for Charlie. Start a family for Charlie. Join a chapter or coalition for Charlie. Register to vote for Charlie. Chase votes for Charlie. Run for office for Charlie. Commit to WIN. Commit to FIGHT. Commit to FINISH what he started. That's what Charlie would've wanted. I'm not stopping until we save our country. I'm all in -- and if you're reading this, I'm betting that you are, too. If so, I'm honored to fight alongside you. And if you've already been with us for a while -- thank you. Now, let's get to work. For Charlie. God Bless, Tyler Bowyer Chief Operating Officer Turning Point Action P.S. I would give anything to have Charlie back. But he left us with something powerful -- a machine that works... a machine that's proven and battle-tested. Now it's time to run it -- and run it like never before. Bigger. Bolder. More battlegrounds. More victories. Because right now, thanks to a generous supporter of Turning Point Action, your gift will be matched dollar-for-dollar -- up to $500,000, through October 31. That means, with your gift today: ✅ 2X the activists trained ✅ 2X the voters registered ✅ 2X the pressure on weak-kneed politicians ✅ 2X the ballot-chasing operations ✅ 2X the grassroots strength the Left can't stop We don't need to reinvent anything. Charlie already drew the blueprint and turned the key. So, if you've been wondering how to help... If you've been asking " what now?" clean_body: | = Friend, Ballots are already hitting mailboxes across California, so now’s the time to take action and make your voice heard. While Donald Trump presses Republicans to redraw maps across the country, Democrats in California are fighting back. We are in a political struggle over who gets to hold power. If California does nothing, we risk ceding ground to extreme Republicans who are willing to rig the maps rather than win on ideas. Republicans who dismantled independent redistricting rules nationwide are now denouncing Democrats for trying to push back. If having a Congress that truly checks the excesses of the executive branch matters to you, I hope you’ll stand with me in this fight. Make sure you have a voting plan and be sure you have received your ballot. And if you still haven’t received your ballot, Thank you for your support and your belief in a fair, accountable democracy. body:
We refuse to watch Republicans cheat their way into power while EMILYs List women, who have earned their seats, get drawn out of existence. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117152428/575523663/-1403821653?refcode=WUEFEJ25_20251012_KSRedistricting_ALL_v1s4&sourceid=1057200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWM4ZGVjOC04ZGE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=80ItZq2ll2FqH1VWwtNSI-Qvye8MmtxrEsT-C8Z-WJQ=) Peter,

Kansas Republicans are pushing a new redistricting plan aimed squarely at unseating **Rep. Sharice Davids** (KS-03).

In a state where congressional maps were just redrawn in 2022, Republicans are now attempting an unprecedented midterm redistricting effort to suppress Democratic representation. They're circulating petitions to force a special session, hoping to override veto threats and break apart Johnson County, which Rep. Davids represents.

**[**These anti-democratic power grabs are exactly why we're working to elect EVEN MORE Democratic pro-choice women — at every level — who will ensure we have fair representation up and down the ballot. Donate now to help fight back against the GOP's gerrymandering agenda: **](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117152429/575523664/-1403821653?refcode=WUEFEJ25_20251012_KSRedistricting_ALL_v1s4&sourceid=1057200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWM4ZGVjOC04ZGE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=80ItZq2ll2FqH1VWwtNSI-Qvye8MmtxrEsT-C8Z-WJQ=)** | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117152430/575523665/-1403821653?refcode=WUEFEJ25_20251012_KSRedistricting_ALL_v1s4&sourceid=1057200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWM4ZGVjOC04ZGE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=80ItZq2ll2FqH1VWwtNSI-Qvye8MmtxrEsT-C8Z-WJQ=)
---

This is not just a local fight. It's part of Republicans' national playbook to rig the rules, distort representation, and stifle the voices of voters. We've already seen it in Texas — and now the GOP is bringing it to Kansas because they know their grip on the House majority is slipping.

This is about power, not policy. And the people who suffer most are those already marginalized and underrepresented: people of color, women, and lower-income voters.

****[**We refuse to let Republicans cheat their way to power while EMILYs List women who've earned their seats are drawn out of existence. clean_body: We refuse to watch Republicans cheat their way into power while EMILYs List women, who have earned their seats, get drawn out of existence. | = Peter, Kansas Republicans are pushing a new redistricting plan aimed squarely at unseating Rep. Sharice Davids (KS-03). In a state where congressional maps were just redrawn in 2022, Republicans are now attempting an unprecedented midterm redistricting effort to suppress Democratic representation. They're circulating petitions to force a special session, hoping to override veto threats and break apart Johnson County, which Rep. Davids represents. = | = This is not just a local fight. It's part of Republicans' national playbook to rig the rules, distort representation, and stifle the voices of voters. We've already seen it in Texas — and now the GOP is bringing it to Kansas because they know their grip on the House majority is slipping. This is about power, not policy. And the people who suffer most are those already marginalized and underrepresented: people of color, women, and lower-income voters. **=** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for taking a stand, Emily Parés (she/her/hers) Deputy Chief Campaigns Officer, State & Local Campaigns, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: Team Haaland
subject: ⚠️ Republicans are making gains in New Mexico
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Republicans are closing the margin of victory in New Mexico — we can’t let 2026 be the year they win.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=5009%2E400544%2ErkZToG)
We need to be honest with you:
New Mexico’s elections have become _a lot_ more competitive over these last few years — **and chances are this race is going to be very close.**
In 2018, our Democratic governor won by 15 points — but in 2022, that margin got cut in half. And in 2024, Donald Trump came within six points of winning our state.
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251012_1_margin.P0kpsg&amount=5&refcode=em20251012-5009&t=2&akid=5009%2E400544%2ErkZToG)
That’s dangerously close — and a clear warning: **New Mexico is not a safe blue state.** Deb’s victory is anything but guaranteed, and Republicans will do anything they can to flip our state red.
**That’s why we aren’t waiting — we’re investing in statewide organizing right now to reach every voter.[Will you chip in $5 (or more if you can) to help? Early action is how we’ll win in a close race.](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251012_1_margin.P0kpsg&amount=5&refcode=em20251012-5009&t=3&akid=5009%2E400544%2ErkZToG)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251012_1_margin.P0kpsg&amount=5&refcode=em20251012-5009&t=22&akid=5009%2E400544%2ErkZToG)**
Deb knows there’s too much at stake to take anything for granted. She’s traveled 14,000 miles across the state, stood alongside healthcare workers fighting for better wages, listened to people struggling with healthcare, affordability, safety in their communities, and more. She’s fighting to change the game for New Mexico — but she can’t do it alone.
Democrats’ margins are shrinking, and Republicans know they’re coming within striking distance. Unprecedented dark money, attack ads, and misinformation are coming. We need to show up, be ready for what’s to come, and have Deb’s back.
**[Will you chip in $5 or more right now to help give Deb the resources to reach every voter, fight for every community, and build a brighter future for New Mexico?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251012_1_margin.P0kpsg&amount=5&refcode=em20251012-5009&t=23&akid=5009%2E400544%2ErkZToG)**
**[ Donate $5 » ](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251012_1_margin.P0kpsg&amount=5&refcode=em20251012-5009&t=24&akid=5009%2E400544%2ErkZToG) **
Thank you for your support,
— Team Haaland
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20251012-1&t=25&refcode2=5009_400544_rkZToG&akid=5009%2E400544%2ErkZToG)**

name: Letitia James
subject: Donald Trump and his admin just indicted me
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
We must REJECT this dangerous political revenge campaign

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117152610/575524326/-1458137172?amount=15&refcode=email_101225_james&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjY3YWJmOS04ZWE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SgY8XywDV3K6eCPClRW2GIU5xfq_vsmN6xxEP0Q4HOI=) By now, you've likely heard the news: **Donald Trump and his administration have indicted me on baseless charges – all because I’ve done my job as Attorney General.**

For months now, we've seen Trump manipulate the justice system in a coordinated effort to go after his political opponents for defending the rule of law.

I knew that holding the most powerful and corrupt accountable – especially the president – could make me a target. **But I'm not about to back down now, and I know you aren't either.**

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: The longer this continues, the more pain it’s causing for poor and working people.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20251012-5522-footer&t=1001&akid=5522%2E420207%2Ec_V464 ]Pramila Jayapal

Peter,

It’s day 12 of Trump’s government shutdown, and Republicans are still
refusing to protect health care and reopen the government.

The longer this continues, the more pain it’s causing for poor and working
people:

* Two days ago, furloughed federal workers missed their first paycheck.

* If the government isn’t reopened by Wednesday, military service
members will miss their paychecks, too.

* Critical food assistance programs are at risk of running out of money
if the shutdown extends much longer.

* With staff furloughed, wait times are up for government services that
people rely on, and flight delays are increasing across the country.

Let’s not forget why Republicans are doing this. It’s because they’re
refusing to extend subsidies that make health insurance affordable for
millions of Americans. Without those subsidies, premiums could more than
double, forcing many to drop coverage.

In the short term, it’s critical that we protect health care and reopen
the government as soon as possible.

But in the long term, we must pass Medicare For All and make health care a
right for every American. Because even with subsidies, health care is too
expensive or out of reach entirely for too many.

I’m working every day to grow our progressive movement and build a
government that puts working people first, but I can’t do it without your
support.

If you’re impacted by the shutdown and you can’t donate today, please know
that it’s okay. [ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251012.743cMD&refcode=em20251012-5522&amount=3&t=1002&akid=5522%2E420207%2Ec_V464 ]But if you are in a position to give, please pitch in
$3 or anything you can to power this movement and help me
keep fighting.

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251012.743cMD&amount=3&refcode=em20251012-5522&t=1021&akid=5522%2E420207%2Ec_V464 ]Contribute $3

In solidarity,

Pramila Jayapal

Contribute to Pramila Jayapal: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20251012-5522-footer&t=1022&refcode2=5522_420207_c_V464&akid=5522%2E420207%2Ec_V464

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.pramilaforcongress.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=5522%2E420207%2Ec_V464

Paid for by Pramila for Congress.

| Wisconsin wouldn’t be America’s Dairyland without our hardworking farmers.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117153451/575526890/-1213029538?amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&refcode=email_101225_people&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWMwOTMyYS05M2E3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q7BqQQEaCQYsAL0U6V22xA41WfuKyduYEDPVsfTSbO0=) [_**Hey there, this is Sharice. I’m sorry to reach out over the weekend, but this is a pivotal moment in the battle to keep KS-03 out of Donald Trump’s hands, and our entire campaign is treating it like one. If you’re with me, and you’re able to give, I’d be so grateful to have your support today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117153452/575526891/-1213029538?amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&refcode=email_101225_people&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWMwOTMyYS05M2E3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q7BqQQEaCQYsAL0U6V22xA41WfuKyduYEDPVsfTSbO0=) Let’s be real: The last few weeks have been wild and overwhelming for everyone here at Campaign HQ. And yet, the fight is only getting started. In just a few days, Republicans in the Kansas legislature will travel to the White House to take marching orders directly from Donald Trump — and right after that, things will happen fast: Kansas GOP leadership will call for a special legislative session. Republican politicians will work as quickly, and quietly, as possible to gerrymander this seat. The public outcry will intensify. **That third part is the key to winning this fight.** Sustained public outcry is the most effective tool we have right now. After all, we all know these extreme politicians aren’t going to do the right thing just because it’s the right thing. But if we put enough pressure on these extreme politicians — enough for them to _truly_ feel the outrage, the anger, and the momentum on our side — they’ll understand just how many political consequences will come with Donald Trump’s gerrymander. **And that’s exactly why _your_ support, _your_ voice, and _your_ protests make a difference.** To be completely candid, I can’t persuade these extreme politicians to back off Trump’s gerrymander on my own. But when thousands of Kansans — Democrat, Republican, and unaffiliated alike — are willing to stand up and speak out, things change. That’s why I need your help: [**_We have the people on our side, and we all feel that. But _keeping_ that momentum in the weeks to come will require an enormous amount of resolve, perseverance, and yes, grassroots support. If you could pitch in today and help our team keep pushing back, it would go a long, long way right now._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117153453/575526892/-1213029538?amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&refcode=email_101225_people&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWMwOTMyYS05M2E3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q7BqQQEaCQYsAL0U6V22xA41WfuKyduYEDPVsfTSbO0=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117153454/575526893/-1213029538?amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=email_101225_people&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWMwOTMyYS05M2E3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q7BqQQEaCQYsAL0U6V22xA41WfuKyduYEDPVsfTSbO0=)

name: Morgan Stahr, United for Democracy
subject: Groceries
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
| |
---
Peter, Since Congress shut down on September 30, federal workers have either been off the job or working without pay. Today, they just missed their first paycheck. Instead of negotiating an end to the shutdown, Donald Trump and his administration have threatened mass firings, even pledging to renege on a law _he signed_ to guarantee backpay to workers after a shutdown. **Trump sees a path to political victory through punishing the workers who keep Social Security working, who make sure our water is safe to drink, and who take care of our veterans.** The people who are working at Social Security offices, still making sure seniors’ checks go out on time _won’t_ get their own check this week. Their bills didn’t stop. The rent is still due, and they still have families who need to eat. **We need solidarity, not charity.** [**The Labor Force is distributing grocery cards to federal workers during this shutdown. **Federal employees are not bargaining chips.** They are veterans, caregivers, law enforcement officers, and neighbors who serve their country and fellow Americans every day. **They deserve stability and respect, not pink slips and political games.**
[**Can you chip in toward a load of groceries for a federal employee who is missing their paycheck this week? Donate here**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsQNarR6PCR1lUtXpWTyhe6VmjzFfawdUcV12m9OntWMkajnv3h0BLFLiDnulHWjEWp-LimfwqRNrb9uPaUSIXEHw1dgmbIRmdQJ4KnBHIOn1T5qW2m6NN4vOzul_fc9oq4t99XNbY8fyj2o3u83n51sR0YZeC17h8rTrl1KAyKYYUrKRvzt1nhLVuuG6CXjEJrlMeJnzEob0z56aMkgmkg3z6ZHQ1SicJFj0RhBKy-EjlmO3lpXV9ijM6Gvam8N0Q/4ko/K2r3D_81RAy--zDvqy_8oQ/h7/h001.SjB5c10jzqs9BHqFf-uYV2dItvo78i7ZueC_VNx7ebY)**!**
In solidarity,
Morgan Stahr
United for Democracy

clean_body: | | Peter, Since Congress shut down on September 30, federal workers have either been off the job or working without pay. Today, they just missed their first paycheck. Instead of negotiating an end to the shutdown, Donald Trump and his administration have threatened mass firings, even pledging to renege on a law he signed to guarantee backpay to workers after a shutdown. Trump sees a path to political victory through punishing the workers who keep Social Security working, who make sure our water is safe to drink, and who take care of our veterans. The people who are working at Social Security offices, still making sure seniors’ checks go out on time won’t get their own check this week. Their bills didn’t stop. The rent is still due, and they still have families who need to eat. We need solidarity, not charity. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split between The Labor Force and United for Democracy: | | | | | | | | | | Federal employees are not bargaining chips. They are veterans, caregivers, law enforcement officers, and neighbors who serve their country and fellow Americans every day. They deserve stability and respect, not pink slips and political games. ! In solidarity, Morgan Stahr United for Democracy Paid for by United for Democracy. | | Sent via . body:

Candidate Cocktail Reception
Friend,
Next Saturday Oct, 18th from 4-6pm, please come to my home in Bristol as we’ll be 17 days away from Election Day on Nov 4th.
We’re supporting a phenomenal slate of candidates like Army veterans Siddiq Kamara & Danny Ceisler, a Marine Mom Tiffany Thomas Smith & PA Supreme Court Justice Kevin Dougherty.
If you can’t come, please consider making a donation that will be matched 100% & sharing this invite to your fellow patriots on email and/or social media.
Appreciate your consideration. Hope you had an awesome weekend!
-Patrick

|
