name: Voter Action Project
subject: Barring election officials from promoting voting?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
NC Newsline: NC House bill would allow elections board workers to be replaced with political hires [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=101225_1&amount=25]
Get this, Team: Opponents of voting rights in North Carolina introduced a sweeping elections bill that, among other steps, would bar election officials from encouraging or promoting voter turnout. This is just the latest and most stark example of a trend among the vote suppressors of opposing even nonpartisan outreach efforts that could boost voting rates.
This bill would also take more than a third of existing nonpartisan staff positions at the state elections office and convert them to jobs for partisan political appointees deeply invested in the results of the elections they would be in charge of. Finally, the measure would add new voting restrictions for military and overseas voters, and ban ranked choice voting.
The bill and proposed ban on promoting turnout “ raises real questions about what democracy means in North Carolina, who really holds the power, who government is answering to ” according to Andrew Garber, a counsel in the nonpartisan Brennan Center’s Voting Rights and Elections Program.
Opponents of voting rights in North Carolina are more focused on expanding and cementing their own power than they are in serving the people and having fair elections. It's just another example of what they'll export around the country if they get away with it here.
This troubling bill has the potential to impact us all, no matter what state we live in. Please pitch in $15 or whatever you can today to help us stop voter suppression in North Carolina and across the country >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=101225_1&amount=15]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=101225_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=101225_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=101225_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=101225_1&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=101225_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=101225_1&amount=35]
Wondering how this impacts you? It's as simple as this: Rep. Allison Dahle, a top defender of voting rights on North Carolina’s House Elections committee, said, “ I think North Carolina has become a testing ground. It’s become a place where they say, ‘let’s see if it works.’ ”
For decades, the voter suppression movement has taken bills that pass in one state and exported them across the country. The leaders at a sprawling, dark money conservative think-tank have taken credit for it, caught on camera bragging about writing the legislation at their headquarters. For example -- the sweeping suppression bill passed in Georgia in March of 2021 was adapted and passed in states like Texas, Florida, and beyond in the months afterward.
It's all just the latest extreme anti-democracy tactic pioneered by North Carolina vote suppressors over the last decade or so. In 2016, a court found that the state’s voter suppression law targeted Black voters with “surgical precision.” They drew multiple gerrymandered maps, and stripped the new governor of several election-related powers before he took office. After the 2024 election, they waged a months-long campaign, ultimately unsuccessful, to overturn a Supreme Court race by having over 65,000 valid votes thrown out after the vote-counting, and two recounts, had been completed. It's not going to end until we stop them.
We have to fight back every time they try to chip away at our fundamental right to vote. Will you chip in $15 or whatever you can today to stop this bill and suppression bills like it nationwide? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=101225_1&amount=15]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=101225_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=101225_1&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: As New Jersey goes, so goes the nation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
The entire country is watching this race
#
Peter, there are a couple of reasons why the entire country is watching this race:
**This is one of the first major elections after the presidential election last fall.** In that election, Donald Trump was just 6 points away from winning right here in New Jersey — making it even more clear that New Jersey is no longer the safe blue state it once was.
**I’m showing our nation a new way forward.** My opponent has shown he’ll do anything Donald Trump tells him to — no matter how much it hurts New Jersey families. I will ALWAYS put the people of this state first, Peter. Leadership isn’t just following along with what some Washington politician wants. It’s doing what’s right for the people you serve, even when you get attacked for it.
**As New Jersey goes, so goes the nation.** What we do here in New Jersey will set the trend for 2026, 2028, and beyond. It’s up to us here to take a stand against Donald Trump’s incompetence and authoritarianism — and show the nation that there’s a better path forward.
**[All eyes are on New Jersey, Peter, and this race is a toss-up. clean_body: The entire country is watching this race Peter, there are a couple of reasons why the entire country is watching this race: This is one of the first major elections after the presidential election last fall. In that election, Donald Trump was just 6 points away from winning right here in New Jersey — making it even more clear that New Jersey is no longer the safe blue state it once was. I’m showing our nation a new way forward. My opponent has shown he’ll do anything Donald Trump tells him to — no matter how much it hurts New Jersey families. I will ALWAYS put the people of this state first, Peter. Leadership isn’t just following along with what some Washington politician wants. It’s doing what’s right for the people you serve, even when you get attacked for it. As New Jersey goes, so goes the nation. What we do here in New Jersey will set the trend for 2026, 2028, and beyond. It’s up to us here to take a stand against Donald Trump’s incompetence and authoritarianism — and show the nation that there’s a better path forward. subject: I refuse to be silent…

body:
...because that’s what the Democrats were hoping for.
This poll changes everything...
| Friend,
---
Ever since the Democrats’ government shutdown began on October 1, I placed a pause on our campaign’s fundraising.
---
With the Radical Left holding our government hostage to try and benefit illegal immigrants all at the expense of hardworking Americans like you, honestly, the last thing I wanted to do was bother my supporters with political emails and texts.
In fact, I believe now more than ever, the American people need to see that _YOU_ are our ONLY priority, which is why I’ve had my own salary withheld during the Democrats’ senseless shutdown.
**_But today, I have to at least break my silence because I just received information that will _UPEND_ the 2026 elections. _**
**A BRAND NEW POLL in New York just dropped, showing that once voters are aware of our positions, I would _BEAT_ Democrat governor Kathy Hochul by _1 POINT_!**
Hochul and the Democrats were desperately hoping that I would continue to pause my messaging during the shutdown so that they could bury this news and prevent us from seizing the momentum.
There’s no two ways about it; this poll is devastating for Hochul. She’s even being labeled the **MOST VULNERABLE** Democrat governor in the country.
_And this new poll shows us our clear path to victory._
_So long as we reach every last voter, so long as our message isn’t drowned out by the Democrats’ multimillion-dollar ad buys, and so long as I have YOU in my corner, we can SAVE New York!_
_...But all this depends on having the resources necessary to get the job done._
**That is why I’ve made the calls to secure a 5oo% MATCH for the next 24 hours to ensure we capitalize on this moment. **

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: ANNOUNCEMENT: Erika Kirk Will Carry On Her Husband’s Mission
body:
| | |
---
Peter,In Ecclesiastes, King Solomon wrote that mankind is to be tested by _God._ Today, we are facing such a test, yet we also know that God has prepared us with everything we need to overcome this ordeal. It was the honor of our lives to serve as board members at Charlie's side. Charlie prepared all of us for a moment like this one. He worked tirelessly to ensure Turning Point USA was built to survive even the greatest tests. **And now, it is our great pride to announce Erika Kirk as the new CEO and Chair of the Board for Turning Point USA. **All of us at Turning Point USA have a special role in carrying Charlie Kirk's mantle and completing his vision of bringing us all closer to our Lord and fostering a prosperous country for generations to come.As Charlie always said, "We have a country to save."We will not surrender or kneel before evil. We will carry on. The attempt to destroy Charlie's work will become our chance to make it more powerful and enduring than ever before. May God bless Erika, the Kirk family, and the entire Turning Point USA family.
---
**For Charlie & Very Truly Yours, **
TPUSA Board of Directors

Doug De Groote
Mike Miller
Tom Sodeika
David Engelhardt

clean_body: | | | Peter,In Ecclesiastes, King Solomon wrote that mankind is to be tested by God. Today, we are facing such a test, yet we also know that God has prepared us with everything we need to overcome this ordeal. It was the honor of our lives to serve as board members at Charlie's side. Charlie prepared all of us for a moment like this one. He worked tirelessly to ensure Turning Point USA was built to survive even the greatest tests. And now, it is our great pride to announce Erika Kirk as the new CEO and Chair of the Board for Turning Point USA. All of us at Turning Point USA have a special role in carrying Charlie Kirk's mantle and completing his vision of bringing us all closer to our Lord and fostering a prosperous country for generations to come.As Charlie always said, "We have a country to save."We will not surrender or kneel before evil. We will carry on. The attempt to destroy Charlie's work will become our chance to make it more powerful and enduring than ever before. May God bless Erika, the Kirk family, and the entire Turning Point USA family. For Charlie & Very Truly Yours, TPUSA Board of Directors Doug De Groote Mike Miller Tom Sodeika David Engelhardt & The Turning Point USA Family 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 |

name: Bernie Moreno

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Top NRSC leaders brought you up in today’s meeting — we need your vote on the policy checklist. | fellow American,

They put your name on the table today — not as a joke, not as fluff. In our leadership meeting with key NRSC folks, senators, and senior staff, _your_ state came up as one they’re watching.

_That matters._

**So here’s what’s going on: we’re building a plan to keep the Senate and protect hardworking families — and we need your clear ‘yes’ or ‘no’ on a few bold priorities.** This isn’t a poll. It’s not marketing. It’s the map we’ll follow.

**I’m asking you for two things, and both take less than a minute.**
**1.** Click the button below.
**2.** Tell us which priorities you support. (It’s one page. Honest.)

name: Senator Vincent Hughes
subject: New Affordable Housing for Seniors Mantua
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can [view the message online](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?gpiv=2100170812.172329.141&gen=1).
| Share On | [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=share&piv=2100170812.172329.141&snid=2)
---|---
[](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170812.172329.141&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15662)
#
# **Senator Hughes Celebrates New Affordable Housing for Seniors Mantua**
Senator Hughes recently joined community leaders, developers, and local residents [to celebrate the ribbon-cutting](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170812.172329.141&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15663) of the new Rev. James Moore Sr. Triangle Village in West Philadelphia's Mantua neighborhood.
* * *
_The new senior housing provides 40 units across a three-story complex designed to meet the needs of older adults._
* * *
Led by Pastor James Moore and the Second Mount Zion Baptist Church, the project was supported through federal, state, and city funding. The successful completion of this project shows what can be achieved when we work with all levels of government and the community to deliver what people really need.

* * *
## **We Need More Affordable Housing for Seniors**
_According to the National Council on Aging, more than 15 million older adults live at or below 200% of the federal poverty level._
* * *
[](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170812.172329.141&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15665)

* * *
_" It's a great accomplishment for the Mantua community. The message it sends is that we need to do more of this and make it happen faster. Keep advocating for more projects like this." _ _\- Senator Hughes -_ __ Learn more about the project and other affordable housing projects in the 7th District [on our website](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170812.172329.141&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15662).
* * *
| Offices of Senator Vincent Hughes

clean_body: If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can . | Share On | ---|--- Senator Hughes Celebrates New Affordable Housing for Seniors Mantua Senator Hughes recently joined community leaders, developers, and local residents of the new Rev. James Moore Sr. Triangle Village in West Philadelphia's Mantua neighborhood. The new senior housing provides 40 units across a three-story complex designed to meet the needs of older adults. Led by Pastor James Moore and the Second Mount Zion Baptist Church, the project was supported through federal, state, and city funding. The successful completion of this project shows what can be achieved when we work with all levels of government and the community to deliver what people really need. We Need More Affordable Housing for Seniors According to the National Council on Aging, more than 15 million older adults live at or below 200% of the federal poverty level. " It's a great accomplishment for the Mantua community. The message it sends is that we need to do more of this and make it happen faster. Keep advocating for more projects like this." \- Senator Hughes - Learn more about the project and other affordable housing projects in the 7th District . | Offices of Senator Vincent Hughes | | | District Office 2401 North 54th Street Philadelphia, PA 19131 Phone: 215.879.7777 Fax: 215.879.7778 | | Harrisburg Office Senate Box 203007 Harrisburg, PA 17120-3007 Phone: 717.787.7112 Fax: 717.772.0579 | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | \- \-

---
* Flip the house next year
* Impeach President Trump
* Reverse the Trump agenda

---

Now, my _**You Gotta Believe PAC**_ is fighting to turn out those over 6.3 million Garvey voters to vote NO on Prop 50 and protect our independent redistricting commission. clean_body: | | | | | Friend, I won't sugar coat it: this politico article should be a wake up call to Republicans. George Soros, the DNC, and the Liberal unions are bankrolling Gavin Newsom's Proposition 50 power grab to let Democrats redraw Californias congressional maps without a census and steal 5-7 GOP house seats. This is the most critical race in 2025, and it could end President Trumps agenda in Congress. The Democrats are flooding this race with over $100 million from Soros, the DNC, and the liberal unions to rig California’s maps and export their radical policies in California nationwide—open borders, high taxes, and woke nonsense. If Prop 50 passes on November 4th, Democrats will: Flip the house next year Impeach President Trump Reverse the Trump agenda Last year, over 6.3 million Californians voted for me in the senate race —the most ever for a Republican in our state’s history. Now, my You Gotta Believe PAC** is fighting to turn out those over 6.3 million Garvey voters to vote NO on Prop 50 and protect our independent redistricting commission. Your donation will fuel targeted ads, door-to-door outreach, and voter mobilization to rally my team of over 6.3 million supporters to the polls. | | | | | | | Together, we’ll mobilize a huge grassroots effort to stop Soros and Newsom and save Trump’s agenda.Lets play hardball, | | PAID FOR BY YOU GOTTA BELIEVE PAC P.O. * * *
Look, the Supreme Court has [**officially**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69484?t=10&akid=23501%2E4449941%2Evfx3C3) begun its new term and the fate of our democracy _is in their hands._

Their calendar has been filled with emergency rulings because of Donald Trump's OUTRAGEOUS behavior. But now, [**they must make final decisions that will shape the future of our country.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69484?t=11&akid=23501%2E4449941%2Evfx3C3)

With Trump’s conservative justices STACKED on this Court, we’ve already been handed a series of devastating rulings that threaten our rights and our Constitution:

♦️They OVERTURNED _Roe v. Wade._
♦️♦️ They GREENLIGHTED racial profiling.
♦️♦️♦️ And they gave Trump IMMUNITY from prosecution.

[**The Supreme Court is supposed to PROTECT Americans and their civil liberties, not put them at risk.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69484?t=12&akid=23501%2E4449941%2Evfx3C3)

As one of your city's Top Democrats, we need your opinion before 11:59PM →

name: Team Abdul
subject: Can we be straight up with you, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20251012-1081&t=1001&akid=1094%2E251025%2E2aN5Q3 ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20251012-1081&t=1002&akid=1094%2E251025%2E2aN5Q3 ]Abdul for US Senate

Can we be straight up with you,
Peter?

If we stick together, our movement has the potential to take on AIPAC,
corporate PACs, and the establishment — and win.

But without grassroots support, winning this primary becomes incredibly
difficult. That’s why we’re sharing four reasons why your contribution
matters right now:

1. This election will be a referendum on the people vs. AIPAC. Abdul is
the only major candidate who has been calling for an end to the
genocide in Gaza since he kicked off his campaign. That makes him one
of AIPAC’s top targets — and they’re already gearing up to spend
millions against us.
2. This isn’t a long-shot campaign — we’re neck-and-neck with the
establishment’s preferred candidate. With your help, we can close that
gap and take the lead.
3. Your support helps us build a government that truly represents working
people. Abdul is the only candidate in this race who has never taken a
dime from corporate PACs — and never will. That means our campaign
isn’t beholden to any corporation’s interests. We’re solely focused on
improving life for everyday
people.
4. Abdul is one of the strongest progressive candidates in the nation. We
have an opportunity to send a Medicare for All, anti-AIPAC, anti-Trump
progressive to the U.S. Senate. If we pull this off in Michigan, it
will reshape what’s possible nationwide.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251012-1-ak.6SJ8wH&amount=10&refcode=em20251012-1081&t=1004&akid=1094%2E251025%2E2aN5Q3 ]For all those reasons and more, can you pitch in $10 or
any amount to support our campaign?

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251012-1-ak.6SJ8wH&amount=10&refcode=em20251012-1081&t=1023&akid=1094%2E251025%2E2aN5Q3 ]Donate $10 ››

Thanks so much,

Team Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1024&akid=1094%2E251025%2E2aN5Q3
Update Your Information: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate

body:

Tom Homan had ONE MESSAGE for me that I had to share with my TOP MAGA Patriots!
_“If you impede an ICE officer, you’re getting prosecuted._

subject: Show the world that YOU are Charlie Kirk’s movement
body:
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.

* * *
Tell the world you're standing for faith, family, and freedom. | | | | [](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4186m&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, _We are Charlie Kirk._ That's the rally cry of millions of Americans — and the message they carry with their "We are Charlie Kirk" wristbands.
---
[](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4186m&__onlt=h)
---
We want you to have one. To join the movement carrying Charlie's legacy forward. **When you give any amount today, we'll send you your wristband — a bold symbol of the mission we carry on.**
---
[ **Claim Your Wristband Today**](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4186m&__onlt=h)
---
This isn't just a wristband, Friend. It's a symbol. Of conviction.
Of courage.
Of the movement Charlie built. **When you wear it, you're telling the world you stand for America. For faith. For family. For freedom. And for the vision Charlie ignited.** Your donation fuels the next generation of leaders who will defend these values and never surrender. **Give today and we'll put this powerful symbol in your hands as our thank-you.**

**For Charlie,** The Turning Point USA Team

name: Chrissy Houlahan
subject: my story starts with my dad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
I've looked to my dad as inspiration throughout my time in Congress, always putting the needs of those I promised to serve above my own.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117155032/575532653/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTgwY2JhNC05ZGE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HAyhKrS5GIjCdA-uH_pV5i-zYbv9R5gXSFmVXDRMuwM=&emci=74f48ce4-34a5-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=2a80cba4-9da7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=21278485)
---
This kid right here has no idea that one day she'll become a U.S. Representative. But let me take a step back for a second, Derek, because my story begins with my dad.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117155039/575532659/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1160-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTgwY2JhNC05ZGE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HAyhKrS5GIjCdA-uH_pV5i-zYbv9R5gXSFmVXDRMuwM=)
Born in Poland, my dad moved to the United States when he was just 4 years old as a Holocaust survivor and refugee of World War II. He worked hard to get into Columbia University and to become an aviator in the U.S. Navy. He dedicated his life to service to others and always stressed the value of a good education.

**His story is one of hard work and determination – of perseverance through the worst of human cruelty and violence. But now, we're watching President Trump and his MAGA allies push their own cruel, violent agenda on Americans: Project 2025. **
Derek, I've looked to my dad as inspiration throughout my time in Congress, always putting the needs of those I promised to serve above my own – as it should be. **Our president, on the other hand, continues to put profit and his own selfish interests at the forefront. **

**That's why he's ripping away affordable health care from millions, cutting federal food assistance, and promoting hateful, discriminatory rhetoric. And he's able to do so because he has the support of Republicans in Congress. **
Looking ahead to the 2026 midterms, I'm not going to let a Republican businessman, who would inevitably be another rubber stamp vote on the chaos and harmful policies of Republicans in Washington, replace me in Congress. And I know that little girl smiling with her dad in the picture above wouldn't either.
I'm in this fight for my family and yours, Derek. And I promise to continue fighting to hold this administration accountable and create opportunity for all Pennsylvanians. **But I'm counting on folks like you to make sure we can continue this progress.[Please, will you chip in $5 ahead of my midnight deadline so we can defend the future of PA-06 and flip the House blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117155046/575532665/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1160-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTgwY2JhNC05ZGE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HAyhKrS5GIjCdA-uH_pV5i-zYbv9R5gXSFmVXDRMuwM=)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117155053/575532674/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1160-fr-nd&recurring=0&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTgwY2JhNC05ZGE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HAyhKrS5GIjCdA-uH_pV5i-zYbv9R5gXSFmVXDRMuwM=)

In 2019, Mikie Sherrill and Abigail Spanberger were roommates in Washington, D.C. as freshmen congresswomen. Now, they're both running as their states' official Democratic nominees for governor in New Jersey and Virginia.

**Abigail and Mikie represent the next generation of Democratic leadership, and they're running in the _biggest elections_ since the presidential election last fall.**

Last November, Donald Trump was only six points away from winning New Jersey and just five points away from winning Virginia, so these two races will be incredibly competitive next month.

name: Nellie Pou
subject: We will not cave
body:
Families are paying the price for Republican chaos.

| |
---
Hi friend, I know what our families are going through right now. I have spoken with parents who are worried about paying their bills during this shutdown, workers wondering when their next paycheck will come, and seniors who feel abandoned while Washington grinds to a halt. These are real people’s lives that House Republicans are playing games with during the shutdown. They want healthcare premiums to spike, which means people are going to get sick and not be able to afford the care they need. This is a House Republican shutdown; no one else is to blame. They control the House, the Senate, and the White House, yet they cannot manage to govern. They created this chaos because they do not want to deal with this looming, massive healthcare cost hike. I came to Congress to address the high cost of living. They are asking us to cave on healthcare, on protecting working families, and on the values that make New Jersey strong. We will not do it. This is exactly why we need a Democratic House, because healthcare is not a bargaining chip. Because families should not pay the price for political games. And because our community deserves leaders who can deliver real solutions instead of endless dysfunction. **[This mid-month deadline is our chance to show we are ready to fight back. We need to reach our goal to keep building a campaign that can win this seat and bring responsibility back to Washington. ### About Nellie Pou
Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. clean_body: Families are paying the price for Republican chaos. | | Hi friend, I know what our families are going through right now. I have spoken with parents who are worried about paying their bills during this shutdown, workers wondering when their next paycheck will come, and seniors who feel abandoned while Washington grinds to a halt. These are real people’s lives that House Republicans are playing games with during the shutdown. They want healthcare premiums to spike, which means people are going to get sick and not be able to afford the care they need. This is a House Republican shutdown; no one else is to blame. They control the House, the Senate, and the White House, yet they cannot manage to govern. They created this chaos because they do not want to deal with this looming, massive healthcare cost hike. I came to Congress to address the high cost of living. They are asking us to cave on healthcare, on protecting working families, and on the values that make New Jersey strong. We will not do it. This is exactly why we need a Democratic House, because healthcare is not a bargaining chip. Because families should not pay the price for political games. And because our community deserves leaders who can deliver real solutions instead of endless dysfunction. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. In solidarity, Nellie | | | ---|---|--- About Nellie Pou Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same. | = | = ---|--- Follow Nellie | | | ---|---|--- Checks may also be mailed to: Nellie Pou for Congress - PO BOX 2696, Paterson, NJ, 07509 Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . Nellie Pou for Congress PO Box 2696 Paterson, NJ 07509 United States

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: A quick message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress
body:
Thank you so much for being part of our movement, friend. We couldn't do it without you.
Hi there,
I know you're busy, so this will be a quick message. I'm reaching out because we're approaching the halfway point of October, and the election year will be here before we know it.
**It's critical that we end 2025 strong so that we can keep fighting for good wages, affordable healthcare, a cleaner Great Lakes ecosystem, and a stronger Heartland.**
If you can chip in even $5 to support that mission, it would mean so much to me and everyone on our team. To show you how much we appreciate your support, friend, I had my team make you a personal contribution link:

# [Demand Johnson stop delaying swearing in of new Democratic House member](https://default.salsalabs.org/T157d5e55-9071-451c-9628-0aa4c61060b4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

He has given a series of lame excuses for the delay, but it appears that Johnson is particularly scared of her promise to be the critical last vote needed to force the release of the Epstein files. But frankly, we don't give a damn why he keeps delaying -- she won, and he needs to swear her in NOW, otherwise elections will become pointless. Don't let Johnson and Republicans get away with ignoring the will of the people. [**Add your name, and demand that Johnson swear in Grijalva NOW!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc4e50998-aae6-44f7-bb8a-b69ff0797d7f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

I was a laid-off geologist turned brewer, and I first ran for office because the concerns of everyday Coloradans simply weren’t being addressed.

My path to serving in the US Senate looked a little different from the typical politician you’ll find in Washington. I’m a laid-off geologist who became a local brewer, and I first ran for Mayor of Denver because the concerns of everyday Coloradans simply weren’t being addressed. And since then, no matter what office I’ve held, I’ve worked to put Colorado families and communities first.
Despite the dysfunction we’ve seen from Washington lately, I’m proud to say that grit, integrity, and hard work has paid off in the time I’ve served Colorado in the Senate.
I got my hands dirty working hard in the Senate to make real change for Coloradans. We invested billions of dollars to confront the climate crisis, lowered prescription drug costs, made investments to rebuild our infrastructure, and brought thousands of good-paying manufacturing jobs back to America.
And in this unprecedented and critical moment, I’m fighting tooth and nail to blunt the worst of Trump’s extreme agenda, protect Colorado’s public lands, and preserve all of the progress we’ve made over the past few years.
**Coloradans don't want to see more chaos and dysfunction in Washington — they’re counting on us to deliver real relief and progress on the issues that matter most, and that’s what we’ll always do.**
**[If you believe our country deserves more results and fewer political games, will you chip in to support my campaign? We really need to prevent extremists from flipping this seat red and bringing more dysfunction to DC →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117156385/575537126/1531865432?amount=15&refcode=email_101225_bio-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjhhZDUyMi1hMWE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=79KMIrMtnttvsLMrUpqe1uBlcbXcf6-r2QeWCZa9K54=)**

clean_body: I was a laid-off geologist turned brewer, and I first ran for office because the concerns of everyday Coloradans simply weren’t being addressed. Folks, when I first arrived in Washington to serve Colorado in the US Senate, I’ll be honest: it was a lot to take in. See, I had served in public office before, but I was still far from being a typical politician. And I knew all too well about Washington’s reputation of partisanship and gridlock. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = My path to serving in the US Senate looked a little different from the typical politician you’ll find in Washington. I’m a laid-off geologist who became a local brewer, and I first ran for Mayor of Denver because the concerns of everyday Coloradans simply weren’t being addressed. And since then, no matter what office I’ve held, I’ve worked to put Colorado families and communities first. Despite the dysfunction we’ve seen from Washington lately, I’m proud to say that grit, integrity, and hard work has paid off in the time I’ve served Colorado in the Senate. I got my hands dirty working hard in the Senate to make real change for Coloradans. We invested billions of dollars to confront the climate crisis, lowered prescription drug costs, made investments to rebuild our infrastructure, and brought thousands of good-paying manufacturing jobs back to America. And in this unprecedented and critical moment, I’m fighting tooth and nail to blunt the worst of Trump’s extreme agenda, protect Colorado’s public lands, and preserve all of the progress we’ve made over the past few years. Coloradans don't want to see more chaos and dysfunction in Washington — they’re counting on us to deliver real relief and progress on the issues that matter most, and that’s what we’ll always do. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thank you, John | Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. **High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**

You know I don’t play by the rules, so I’m spilling the dirty truth that Washington doesn’t want you to know: That’s the REAL reason why heSHUT DOWN the government. AOC has raised over 15 MILLION in the first 6 months of the year—and she’s not using the money for re-election in her own district. She’s preparing for something much bigger, and Chuck Schumer knows it. That’s why he’s SCRAMBLING and catering to the far-Left lunatics with a government shutdown, because they would rather pay for illegal alien healthcare than our troops. But this is much bigger than the shutdown, Peter. I hate to admit it, but AOC’s popularity is RISING. And you know her base is crazy enough to elect her Senator, or worse... PRESIDENT. Peter , I’ve stood up to AOC and the corrupt establishment, and they HATE me for it. So let’s do something together that will MAKE HER GO INSANE! If every patriot who reads this donates just $1, we have a chance of CRUSHING HER. I want to shake her to her core and send an OVERWHELMING message to her socialist cronies: WE’RE NOT BACKING DOWN. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter. Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained. At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch. She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history. Nancy is fighting to: Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. name: Joel Willett
subject: My mantra in life: Move or Die
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Why I’m stepping into this fight
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1faace95-3b26-4a2b-a276-6c9a9901d1df/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, here’s the truth: When Tulsi Gabbard revoked my security clearance by tweet, and Laura Loomer piled on with attacks, they thought they could scare me into silence. They don’t know me. At 17, I joined the Army National Guard. I later served in the CIA, coordinating global operations to keep America safe, and sat in the White House Situation Room during some of our nation’s most critical moments. I’ve lived by one mantra my whole life: Move or Die. You run to the fight. You don’t back down. Kentuckians are being steamrolled by a political system that treats them like they don’t matter. Billionaires and drug companies get richer, while working families struggle to pay the bills and keep the lights on. That’s not the America I served. I’m running for Senate because Kentucky deserves a fighter who will never back down. And I know I can’t do it alone — this is about joining forces with leaders like Blue Amp Action who are stepping up, too. [Can you chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can today to split a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action? This is one of the toughest races in the country, and we need to show we’re ready.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tade355f5-fdef-43c6-8bee-d4db7a760a1a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2b5902bc-6835-4ad5-b7ff-d7a8abe0ad35/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: We have to prioritize women
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Here’s the deal, Peter: I wanted to take a moment to speak from the heart about something deeply important to me — and so many of us. Recently, we've seen figures like Health Secretary RFK Jr. and Donald Trump push for measures that deeply impact women's autonomy and well-being. RFK Jr. is making it harder for women across the country to access the reproductive care they need in the form of medication abortion. Donald Trump, at a recent press conference, said pregnant women should “tough it out” and deal with pain instead of taking Tylenol. **These short-sighted, and frankly dangerous, political maneuvers have real-life effects on women and their ability to make decisions that are best for them and their families. And once again, men are telling women that their pain isn’t valid, that they know what’s best.** I am committed to ensuring that women have control over their own healthcare decisions — full stop. **[Will you contribute today to help us keep up the good fight for a woman’s right to autonomy over her body and her healthcare?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117156673/575538334/-313431460?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251012_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTUxMDQwNy1hNmE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nPFFmfQ4W7NQq_NVDIWOI8BkGny6N3dnTydwWcAaPJA=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117156674/575538337/-459997209?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251012_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTUxMDQwNy1hNmE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nPFFmfQ4W7NQq_NVDIWOI8BkGny6N3dnTydwWcAaPJA=)

name: Breaking News CA
subject: BREAKING: Robert Garcia takes on Trump over shutdown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
“Democrats will stand tall” — Garcia vs. Trump
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117157328/575540192/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWZkZjQ4OS1hNmE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HJAKzDQpJQf_kmy-gIcfDkh5H7QaTiD4HX8y3xmHXBg=)
## _**BREAKING NEWS**_**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117157329/575540193/789508428?refcode=251012_BNCA_shutdown&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWZkZjQ4OS1hNmE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HJAKzDQpJQf_kmy-gIcfDkh5H7QaTiD4HX8y3xmHXBg=)**
That top Democrat is Congressman Robert Garcia.
[DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117157330/575540194/-309737922?refcode=251012_BNCA_shutdown&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWZkZjQ4OS1hNmE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HJAKzDQpJQf_kmy-gIcfDkh5H7QaTiD4HX8y3xmHXBg=)
_**Robert Garcia went on national TV to call out Donald Trump and House Republicans**_ for holding the American people hostage and causing a full-blown government shutdown to score political points and gut the Affordable Care Act.
While Trump and his MAGA allies try to burn the place down, Robert Garcia is standing tall — defending affordable health care, protecting workers’ paychecks, and fighting to end this reckless shutdown on our terms, not Trump’s.
This is what real leadership looks like. But let’s be honest:
👉 Trump’s allies are already attacking Robert online.
👉 GOP donors are pouring money into campaigns to elect more Republicans.
👉 And we’re running out of time to fight back before midnight.

body:
A tribute to Charlie & Turning Point Action—see how to help and double your impact today.
|
---
| [ ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=e915a9f02abc470bb492dadcead15b6d&_e=A8kfIQhif8KiJxqbASRmIWv9_jMYjIqMOCeaTiiGFaH5F-WhdyoTEC2xsaLsHEIrW6zqTBdqZlzHCEueRIxI3iizNgslBaLYwEiusbOSXvkNkpOZitqDV-f0AA4UakCuD-Zzj56Cymb9xMYY-T4rZhyLKMegDFZZq7ozceXLwqQHd9pO8PGWP63KrQwDFYLfHE365HL-JJ0Kj9eNbu_uEV3cWV276DL-DsbmpQOuePiD6kIEMnutfuxeIQqozI-OyBReQO0r4qSydiYPgAu-pJSs1_xPzLNmUtTAhlACR-T-We7DGZjTJZRd4n3uCkw3hG-TxCibGCyO62uZzbO-b5NfbWJDO_VKGbMPUPWcIYq8vx4oO82qyAOHmDa5yyyAL52qLqO6ao6G8hc0sdqgKZQkpaIqNxlDuCm3RwwkS5kHTN-DWY1fJoW3UyRLTupMgNiDQuQ05v3YWA1-3vjIJ5G7wDse09dJN-pGmMqT8vHtrfpttDh2F2QxndgK35gq0DOudWGVc_09f0_LtBj8wBAx3H5ZG5JBrbdtq8eafm3PBxfpetmagWQdAy3uQ8lblNMvDNhe0Fm00NiQZvFDN6JnWaGxOAaAnlzWsO1X8U9UKsOJ46aKcooOUxTj4Go2hG8z5gq9sGba4YMjij27Rek4ge75-5p0cJPQ0VRjFPoUpNFQQpF95ho1nipft8X25hIfqCp6mMmDwHR95ycRoGq5ag90atlCJW6XqkV9tuE%3D)
---
Patriot, When I heard of Charlie Kirk, he wasn't famous. He wasn't filling arenas. He wasn't a household name. A few people told me, _" You've gotta meet this guy -- he's doing something big out in Illinois."_ So I went. Charlie was running Turning Point from a modest office in the Chicago suburbs -- surviving on coffee and pure belief that America was still worth saving.
| [ ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=e915a9f02abc470bb492dadcead15b6d&_e=A8kfIQhif8KiJxqbASRmIWv9_jMYjIqMOCeaTiiGFaH5F-WhdyoTEC2xsaLsHEIrW6zqTBdqZlzHCEueRIxI3iizNgslBaLYwEiusbOSXvkNkpOZitqDV-f0AA4UakCuD-Zzj56Cymb9xMYY-T4rZhyLKMegDFZZq7ozceXLwqQHd9pO8PGWP63KrQwDFYLfHE365HL-JJ0Kj9eNbu_uEV3cWV276DL-DsbmpQOuePiD6kIEMnutfuxeIQqozI-Oyvd4BezGBd2X-c38dNTIw13h44LWesjaeNiKW1Er0E0pQLS6Tq69xgaFjkWXu5NbTM0iC9OxlSAb-E11Vr_YOXaf79HgQ7p7jDOTZkg6OQiJeyTLFy_RYdDkU2-Tce7rqxXuIBcqTBf89ZeAKGYhudkF2ZDZMzYHkaLOTfREAKLHjK7_JkuGJ4yVXGLgT6rityLh3Uzy2qXbHiYpnPXPzeKLvGuS1uP5NC-9Ja1OoxTTAjokBZx5UoArovgePe4XUJXXn8AYPimgebjEYiGWRRaZY-uE0D60QWgY1Ap0fhx-culVDvGrTnaVqw9LUyHuVBp-fyFTENcckMIqZbo2qsMbl28T_696b_8oGQAJmPxvxi8ugeDHe5LpoosHhgnvSc1WJu0ABn0jlX25RhXFCz64c_rlzNP8OO4VUDks_x9gc9t0AIi9zfNBL65XwslkNeyQcbKBJ3u4I5Tak_nJ1rp55zjF_NXSmey_1ON5Dxo%3D)
---
_**Above:** The original Turning Point HQ in Lemont, Illinois. This is where it all began -- just Charlie, a vision, and a mission that changed everything. _
Back then, we were both organizing young conservatives, both dreaming about how to win back the culture. But when I first sat down with Charlie... _I knew._ Charlie was the visionary. He had the plan. And I HAD to be part of it. I jumped in and never looked back. >From that moment on, I was there for all of it. The early conferences and campuses. The road trips. The rallies. The fights. In those days, our team didn't have much. But what we had was conviction -- and that was more than enough. Because we believed in something BIG. Something real. Something urgent. **Faith, family, freedom** -- and the absolute grit to go build something that could save this country. And Charlie? _He did it._ He didn't just build a brand... _He built a machine._ First, Charlie built a movement that changed the hearts and minds of an entire generation -- a seismic shift that flipped the narrative that young people belonged to the Left. Then, he built Turning Point Action to become the grassroots force the Left never saw coming... and beat them at their own game. And, I hitched my wagon to it _from the start._ Charlie and I weren't just friends... We were brothers in the fight. We did everything together.
| [ ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=e915a9f02abc470bb492dadcead15b6d&_e=A8kfIQhif8KiJxqbASRmIWv9_jMYjIqMOCeaTiiGFaH5F-WhdyoTEC2xsaLsHEIrW6zqTBdqZlzHCEueRIxI3iizNgslBaLYwEiusbOSXvkNkpOZitqDV-f0AA4UakCuD-Zzj56Cymb9xMYY-T4rZhyLKMegDFZZq7ozceXLwqQHd9pO8PGWP63KrQwDFYLfHE365HL-JJ0Kj9eNbu_uEV3cWV276DL-DsbmpQOuePiD6kIEMnutfuxeIQqozI-OUN9DLt0KWoOPVpbV_Za14ziLaqB3dYIRevbZGrH3fnj8kxkjb5UQV4cuzYGzwFDKyoZonPBr1b_QZ-K3YE97hPLXsyUnko8LF6IPGJSlBQhNygSHkXVNDuiDyIyfLUmvHslxOFBZzmMJpHsK8oTYH_CH9Q9q6ACd-E_eh7Zq2Jc1riCsaAGhBFlHqk-QE9UfCS7Ag7Yf_S2PxaefoZZRIczrzBzJtS1KuyFwInZUQWiXliLSt6G2TeCRnqN_z-chz_d5jwYssKElh8bI_HszXzmgVfdGjzvPJkZxPycPLqs3u1jhcpyw47FykVxwjRgcS7vYYvu8Pg3JUZVZ537gbiQNkGG6rhtpzOOFuV8mvBq5dvuOXwBAdiVIonipk2LhnufIVzqeGgB7XbhyFI4rZaoaKJBOiiQsu7SO9EYmQG_9Kmmokh_D7rc0SLSexjjEfvdkTBkJEFEeDxJYqxGdYJjrQ28tETJU0f754Ha0yfU%3D)
---
We strategized over midnight texts... battled together through COVID, the 2020 Election, and every crisis they threw at us... We created AmericaFest from scratch... launched Turning Point Action to go on offense -- in the very states the GOP had given up on. **And we rallied a grassroots army that put President Donald J. Trump back in the White House in 2024. ** We didn't just talk about chasing ballots... Turning Point Action built the first full-scale, professional ballot-chasing operation on the Right -- _and it delivered real results._ 10 for 10. **In every single state we operated in... Trump won.** In Arizona _alone,_ we chased over 205,000 low-propensity conservative votes -- well beyond the margin of victory. _In Wisconsin?_ 60,000+. _In Nevada?_ 6,000+ -- and we won back a district we hadn't carried in 20 years. _In Michigan?_ 14,000+ votes helped us flip a U.S. House seat and take the state house majority. We didn't just make noise... _We made history. _
| [ ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=e915a9f02abc470bb492dadcead15b6d&_e=A8kfIQhif8KiJxqbASRmIWv9_jMYjIqMOCeaTiiGFaH5F-WhdyoTEC2xsaLsHEIrW6zqTBdqZlzHCEueRIxI3iizNgslBaLYwEiusbOSXvkNkpOZitqDV-f0AA4UakCuD-Zzj56Cymb9xMYY-T4rZhyLKMegDFZZq7ozceXLwqQHd9pO8PGWP63KrQwDFYLfHE365HL-JJ0Kj9eNbu_uEV3cWV276DL-DsbmpQOuePiD6kIEMnutfuxeIQqozI-OIZXrh-XKvSDnyVtPuuGU-fpk64kBNX7s6vk33xBrAZRtF0V2bTTevEy9C3i9IVlTTle6Akhx9eb2ILaWLRxwpjBqbNyry_kE3sPerlVcvmgfEk8FbFBlWoxX8g_cRQKeXRi2P_EhtGif02Y5Ki4T-t9F4QVxiL7DECmFzLQ2R1poFDv-4RQxgGGdMZMeOridvgdEjFpJz-0uhGQTTlNvlpRH6yOzW_PZL-aDKQqKRg-uM7ybakOlScgvyukfjWOQrir8N_d7d7NtoMRURZ9b4LHUpyAo2bxAlLxVbWtBlYlTDCJllzdiO-tdjKqUCQ0BxS3JjqRc8Fi7DSAv2AuhOIK_aZcnjWfw5T5lef_UNRe67ChT0GvjjRz5l6Ji5luRgc7dToBtPDSPLcLX0mK6LSH7kEkH0U-7CEFM1DnQolXXDJiDJqR8ByrPjOuE_iWqFPaw5GNFAMy90UgD5UtDP95oqkx9f_BzgAOhQnLLGJE%3D)
---
_**Above:** Election Night 2024. Our biggest win yet. That's me on the left -- still fighting beside Charlie, just like we always did. _
Patriot, I watched Charlie pour everything into this mission. He lived on the road 300+ days a year. We never stopped. _Because Charlie never stopped. _ He didn't build all of this for clout or clicks... Instead, he did it for this country. For all of us. For every parent who feels like they're losing their kid to the Left... For every student who's afraid to speak up... For every American who still believes in this country... Charlie built this movement and this machine for them. For you. And now? After he gave everything for that mission? **We have to carry the torch. We have to keep the machine running -- ****_and make it stronger than ever._** Everything we've felt since the day we lost Charlie -- _we must turn it into action._ He used to ask me (and everyone else at Turning Point) all the time: _" What are we building next?"_ **Well, Patriot, here 's the answer: We're building the next generation of grassroots power -- one voter, one precinct, one act of courage at a time.**
| [ ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=e915a9f02abc470bb492dadcead15b6d&_e=A8kfIQhif8KiJxqbASRmIWv9_jMYjIqMOCeaTiiGFaH5F-WhdyoTEC2xsaLsHEIrW6zqTBdqZlzHCEueRIxI3iizNgslBaLYwEiusbOSXvkNkpOZitqDV-f0AA4UakCuD-Zzj56Cymb9xMYY-T4rZhyLKMegDFZZq7ozceXLwqQHd9pO8PGWP63KrQwDFYLfHE365HL-JJ0Kj9eNbu_uEV3cWV276DL-DsbmpQOuePiD6kIEMnutfuxeIQqozI-O65kEcjbYVkCDvkxm32ZvDAtXpmTJxjCy4MhAaeX-8mQlfPqfVrJUIkza9ZXS1pDp77qo11i2RWa6nCJ1Vhe5Mm33IjAtBtgpL7T6OGOd0EHz56towKYKQB0DujbBT2oUwN44SgCuY06J_ja6jlilnmWHhPso7V7C2epbcIOMw17a6eegosc15k1fyjdkGD-_IrSNNzO2qBY2wdpfK9nZK1iZLxLjZWZBWd1ARIMDqiavziYt1cmM8LYQKYhlCuCZKmFHztXAqy-O8zlVG54Eia0HlDypt9iwCUcktzTZ51FU4Coe8nGk81LH763lRQGXeychCFu8U34PQIcEdVKjUgD3ROq_gD7cpHuGwnkCFEhadcfoOeCTxK8_AbqfYW5wjs4J7ftbvP3GxA9Nz5F1ngl1k53y8M4oWQ_n7AXOgKD8mNtE9Y9lnf5zoFNq-j3IdCB-ZV9r2s_4wc7-CxdZ35bC41wkoWmLMAx4Jo6Xb4A%3D)
---
**But it doesn 't happen without you.** _So, here 's my ask..._ Go to church for Charlie. Start a family for Charlie. Join a chapter or coalition for Charlie. Register to vote for Charlie. Chase votes for Charlie. Run for office for Charlie. Commit to WIN. Commit to FIGHT. Commit to FINISH what he started. That's what Charlie would've wanted. I'm not stopping until we save our country. I'm all in -- and if you're reading this, I'm betting that you are, too. If so, I'm honored to fight alongside you. And if you've already been with us for a while -- thank you. Now, let's get to work.
**For Charlie.** **God Bless,** **Tyler Bowyer**
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point Action
[ ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=e915a9f02abc470bb492dadcead15b6d&_e=A8kfIQhif8KiJxqbASRmIWv9_jMYjIqMOCeaTiiGFaH5F-WhdyoTEC2xsaLsHEIrW6zqTBdqZlzHCEueRIxI3iizNgslBaLYwEiusbOSXvkNkpOZitqDV-f0AA4UakCuD-Zzj56Cymb9xMYY-T4rZhyLKMegDFZZq7ozceXLwqQHd9pO8PGWP63KrQwDFYLfHE365HL-JJ0Kj9eNbu_uEV3cWV276DL-DsbmpQOuePiD6kIEMnutfuxeIQqozI-Oq-0atbMFqTA9iQRxl2ux3_Z60HYZg2C1YSWzW9GkYqDs0pSPSIT-G6i3nZtHuL_xJWDSMFZdX7scN6y-7G98cSQaGgKZddD3HSASP-N7T1dRLbMAJcWWxKwGcEVqQLiacmdQ86SpCFBReSSLSZkNL2hRTx2WLMLf-E-Ct-xbKFQvRniWNk_4UmniV5feaF3VkAl3xUPXSKMTI30IdkxKSyCuMsB8Zqf8Qr0b8yEaXy6B5tNvB7fNztt5mnlX4jpU3yr14StGohuBidQBRrTbemymmb9q1BQurGIlBGhnZIEr-oEgmHnDgSA53F4wakYyJG5Dg4-PEGIPqZg9tAtZffZimbknkKxaJw-wgidrBccTKcTo_Xi3CiovPgsI6T-ne3pzMRAtR2wmdFso7CWfKJIq2Yie9DcoTWh79AM1yFfqT4IgazEz_uTUR_e_ONodwv5xcyROZNK6qBkuta81_6jviUOCK3meowwH61RaViI%3D)

But he left us with something powerful -- a machine that works... a machine that's proven and battle-tested. Now it's time to run it -- _and run it like never before._ Bigger. Bolder. More battlegrounds. More victories. **Because right now, thanks to a generous supporter of Turning Point Action, your gift will be matched dollar-for-dollar -- up to $500,000, through October 31.** That means, with your gift today: ✅ 2X the activists trained
✅ 2X the voters registered

✅ 2X the grassroots strength the Left can't stop We don't need to reinvent anything. Charlie already drew the blueprint and turned the key. So, if you've been wondering how to help... clean_body: A tribute to Charlie & Turning Point Action—see how to help and double your impact today. | | Patriot, When I heard of Charlie Kirk, he wasn't famous. He wasn't filling arenas. He wasn't a household name. A few people told me, " You've gotta meet this guy -- he's doing something big out in Illinois." So I went. Charlie was running Turning Point from a modest office in the Chicago suburbs -- surviving on coffee and pure belief that America was still worth saving. | Above: The original Turning Point HQ in Lemont, Illinois. This is where it all began -- just Charlie, a vision, and a mission that changed everything. Back then, we were both organizing young conservatives, both dreaming about how to win back the culture. But when I first sat down with Charlie... I knew. Charlie was the visionary. He had the plan. And I HAD to be part of it. I jumped in and never looked back. >From that moment on, I was there for all of it. The early conferences and campuses. The road trips. The rallies. The fights. In those days, our team didn't have much. But what we had was conviction -- and that was more than enough. Because we believed in something BIG. Something real. Something urgent. Faith, family, freedom -- and the absolute grit to go build something that could save this country. And Charlie? He did it. He didn't just build a brand... He built a machine. First, Charlie built a movement that changed the hearts and minds of an entire generation -- a seismic shift that flipped the narrative that young people belonged to the Left. Then, he built Turning Point Action to become the grassroots force the Left never saw coming... and beat them at their own game. And, I hitched my wagon to it from the start. Charlie and I weren't just friends... We were brothers in the fight. We did everything together. | We strategized over midnight texts... battled together through COVID, the 2020 Election, and every crisis they threw at us... We created AmericaFest from scratch... launched Turning Point Action to go on offense -- in the very states the GOP had given up on. And we rallied a grassroots army that put President Donald J. Trump back in the White House in 2024. We didn't just talk about chasing ballots... Turning Point Action built the first full-scale, professional ballot-chasing operation on the Right -- and it delivered real results. 10 for 10. In every single state we operated in... Trump won. In Arizona alone, we chased over 205,000 low-propensity conservative votes -- well beyond the margin of victory. In Wisconsin? 60,000+. In Nevada? 6,000+ -- and we won back a district we hadn't carried in 20 years. In Michigan? 14,000+ votes helped us flip a U.S. House seat and take the state house majority. We didn't just make noise... We made history. | Above: Election Night 2024. Our biggest win yet. That's me on the left -- still fighting beside Charlie, just like we always did. Patriot, I watched Charlie pour everything into this mission. He lived on the road 300+ days a year. We never stopped. Because Charlie never stopped. He didn't build all of this for clout or clicks... Instead, he did it for this country. For all of us. For every parent who feels like they're losing their kid to the Left... For every student who's afraid to speak up... For every American who still believes in this country... Charlie built this movement and this machine for them. For you. And now? After he gave everything for that mission? We have to carry the torch. We have to keep the machine running -- and make it stronger than ever. Everything we've felt since the day we lost Charlie -- we must turn it into action. He used to ask me (and everyone else at Turning Point) all the time: " What are we building next?" Well, Patriot, here 's the answer: We're building the next generation of grassroots power -- one voter, one precinct, one act of courage at a time. | But it doesn 't happen without you. So, here 's my ask... Go to church for Charlie. Start a family for Charlie. Join a chapter or coalition for Charlie. Register to vote for Charlie. Chase votes for Charlie. Run for office for Charlie. Commit to WIN. Commit to FIGHT. Commit to FINISH what he started. That's what Charlie would've wanted. I'm not stopping until we save our country. I'm all in -- and if you're reading this, I'm betting that you are, too. If so, I'm honored to fight alongside you. And if you've already been with us for a while -- thank you. Now, let's get to work. For Charlie. God Bless, Tyler Bowyer Chief Operating Officer Turning Point Action P.S. I would give anything to have Charlie back. But he left us with something powerful -- a machine that works... a machine that's proven and battle-tested. Now it's time to run it -- and run it like never before. Bigger. Bolder. More battlegrounds. More victories. Because right now, thanks to a generous supporter of Turning Point Action, your gift will be matched dollar-for-dollar -- up to $500,000, through October 31. That means, with your gift today: ✅ 2X the activists trained ✅ 2X the voters registered ✅ 2X the pressure on weak-kneed politicians ✅ 2X the ballot-chasing operations ✅ 2X the grassroots strength the Left can't stop We don't need to reinvent anything. Charlie already drew the blueprint and turned the key. So, if you've been wondering how to help... If you've been asking " what now?" Then, Patriot, this is your moment to step in, fuel the fight, and take Charlie 's vision to the next level. Let's turn this energy -- this momentum -- into action. PAID FOR BY TURNING POINT ACTION (TPACTION.COM) AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE 4930 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: James Talarico
subject: A rare decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter —
When I was first elected, I made a rare decision in Texas politics. I was the only member of the legislature to reject corporate PAC money.
I was confronted with the same decision when I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. This will be the most expensive race I’ve ever run. There are plenty of corporate PACs willing to give big donations for access and influence.
But I’m not changing my decision. I refuse to take their money. The people I serve will never have to wonder who I’m fighting for.
[**That’s why I’m counting on people like you to fuel our campaign. Please consider making a contribution today. I can’t do this alone.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251012-1-ak&t=1&akid=101%2E1347274%2EI2knOY)
[DONATE](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251012-1-ak&t=2&akid=101%2E1347274%2EI2knOY)
Refusing to accept corporate PAC checks was not easy. When I got to the House, I suddenly had a bunch of new “best friends.” And they all had lots of money. Money that came with expectations.
I refused to be part of it. In our broken political system, it’s harder than ever to know whether your leaders are fighting for you or are just puppets for their mega-donors.
Even when they sent me unsolicited checks, I returned the money. Thousands of dollars. Check out this tweet from my first term back in 2019:
[](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251012-1-ak&t=3&akid=101%2E1347274%2EI2knOY)
If they send me checks again in this race, I’ll send them back. I won’t be part of their corrupt system. My vote is not for sale.
This campaign is of and for the people. So I need to ask you, Peter:
[**Will you please make a donation to our campaign today? Texas is a massive state, and the super PACs that want to buy this seat have war chests loaded with corporate money. Anything you can give will help.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251012-1-ak&t=4&akid=101%2E1347274%2EI2knOY)
[DONATE](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251012-1-ak&t=5&akid=101%2E1347274%2EI2knOY)
We’re building this grassroots movement together. Let’s make it one that we can be proud of.
James

Paid for by Talarico for Texas
Talarico for Texas
PO Box 14508
Austin, TX 78761
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update your contact information, [**you can submit this form.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/update-info/?t=6&akid=101%2E1347274%2EI2knOY) Looking for Team Talarico merch? [**Check out our online store!**](https://store.jamestalarico.com?utm_source=em_footer&utm_campaign=em_footer) This is a grassroots movement to take back Texas for working people. [**Please consider making a contribution to support our fight today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jt-em-launch?refcode=em_footer&t=7&refcode2=101_1347274_I2knOY&akid=101%2E1347274%2EI2knOY)
James is grateful to have you in our movement. We try to send only the most important updates and opportunities to participate via email, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.jamestalarico.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=8&akid=101%2E1347274%2EI2knOY).

Rob Bresnahan is vulnerable, and that makes PA-08 one of the top pickup opportunities in the country. If we flip this seat, we’re one step closer to taking back the House and putting power back in the hands of the people.

But Republicans know it too. They’ll spend whatever it takes to keep Bresnahan in office and hold onto their fragile majority. We can’t afford to fall behind.

clean_body: | | Hi Peter, Here’s the truth: Rob Bresnahan is one of the weakest Republicans in Congress — and flipping his seat is critical if we want to take back the House in 2026. But if we’re going to win, we need to act now. The clock is ticking, and every moment counts. = Rob Bresnahan has only been in Congress for a short time, but he’s already made his priorities crystal clear, and they don’t include working Pennsylvanians. He voted for Trump’s massive tax and spending bill, which threatens Medicaid and SNAP benefits for millions of Americans, including nearly 2 million Pennsylvanians who rely on SNAP to put food on the table. He’s backed Trump’s extreme agenda in lockstep, even when it means higher costs for everyday families. He’s pocketed more than $7 million in backroom stock trades since being elected, while Pennsylvania families struggle with rising costs. Instead of delivering solutions for Northeast Pennsylvania, he’s busy parroting MAGA talking points and protecting special interests. Rob Bresnahan is vulnerable, and that makes PA-08 one of the top pickup opportunities in the country. If we flip this seat, we’re one step closer to taking back the House and putting power back in the hands of the people. But Republicans know it too. They’ll spend whatever it takes to keep Bresnahan in office and hold onto their fragile majority. We can’t afford to fall behind. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = — Pennsylvania Democratic Party = | Follow us on , , , and **! name: Missing Signature Alert (protectvoting.org)
subject: Gov. J.B. Pritzker going to JAIL?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Please don’t leave this unanswered
| **_! ! !_**

**Trump just called for Illinois Gov. J.B. Pritzker to be IMPRISONED** for standing up to his National Guard takeover.

_This is authoritarianism, full stop._ But your signature on our letter is STILL missing, and Pritzker needs to know you have his back!

[**You only have until MIDNIGHT to correct the record: Sign our letter thanking J.B. Pritzker for his outstanding bravery! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94676?t=6&akid=21471%2E878179%2EO9bqlh) | [**DONATE $3 TO SIGN THE LETTER »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94676?t=7&akid=21471%2E878179%2EO9bqlh)
---
Thank you,

_The Voter Protection Project_
**—BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE—**
**_BREAKING:_ Gov. J.B. Pritzker Calls for Trump’s REMOVAL Under 25th Amendment**

_He’s SO right:_
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94676?t=8&akid=21471%2E878179%2EO9bqlh)
[**We’re inviting our 500 most dedicated Democrats to sign our letter STANDING WITH J.B. Pritzker as Chicago comes under Trump’s control. Please sign by MIDNIGHT before your spot closes »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94676?t=9&akid=21471%2E878179%2EO9bqlh)
[**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94676?t=10&akid=21471%2E878179%2EO9bqlh)
---
TO: Governor J.B. Pritzker
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: I stand with you. Dear Governor Pritzker,

_THANK YOU for standing up to Donald Trump’s dangerous authoritarian escalation._

Without strong leaders like you, Trump will take over ANY city he pleases — ultimately declaring himself a DICTATOR!

**Thank goodness we have you leading the charge to FIGHT BACK!**

I’m doing everything in my power to protect Democrats like you who are brave enough to face Trump head-on and risk MAGA revenge. Our democracy depends on it.

[**I know you’re facing relentless attacks from Trump and his MAGA minions, so I’m signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to help Democrats keep fighting for justice and STOP TRUMP »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94676?t=11&akid=21471%2E878179%2EO9bqlh) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94676?t=12&akid=21471%2E878179%2EO9bqlh)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21471%2E878179%2EO9bqlh). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21471%2E878179%2EO9bqlh).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21471%2E878179%2EO9bqlh) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=21471%2E878179%2EO9bqlh). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=21471%2E878179%2EO9bqlh)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=21471%2E878179%2EO9bqlh)

subject: What is a Bitcoin ETF?
body:
Strip away the jargon and it's simple: a Bitcoin ETF (exchange-traded fund) is Wall Street's wrapper for owning bitcoin without touching the actual asset.

# [What is a Bitcoin ETF? ](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1526781&post_id=175477958&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1NDc3OTU4LCJpYXQiOjE3NjAzMDIyMDksImV4cCI6MTc2Mjg5NDIwOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE1MjY3ODEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.K0ROI_i4WDLg37y8uiq0Cr9dtuZImFRADn3Imd28JTc)
