| [](https://substack.com/redirect/310c0df8-ba5d-4430-b557-c1f8a7a1a418?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Photo by [Shubham Dhage](https://substack.com/redirect/5015698c-89eb-4626-bd0a-2f5af970d569?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on [Unsplash](https://substack.com/redirect/90ade425-dbe1-4f24-bb83-cd0ec0464836?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Strip away the jargon and it's simple: a Bitcoin ETF (exchange-traded fund) is Wall Street's wrapper for owning bitcoin without touching the actual asset. Instead of buying and holding coins yourself, you buy shares in a fund that says each share is backed by a specific amount of bitcoin held in cold storage with a qualified custodian. It trades on stock exchanges, sits neatly in your brokerage or IRA, and sends you a 1099 at tax time. Convenience is the product.
Why are they popular? Because traditional finance finally admitted what regular people figured out years ago: bitcoin isn't a fad. The ETF lowers the friction--no seed phrases, no hardware wallets, no exchanges to navigate. For pension funds, endowments, and retirement savers boxed in by compliance rules, the ETF is the only legal door they're allowed to use. And once the door opened, money walked through it.
Mechanically, a spot Bitcoin ETF works like this: authorized participants (you) deliver cash to the fund; the fund acquires bitcoin and stores it with an institutional custodian; the fund issues new shares that trade at market prices. If shares drift above or below the value of the underlying bitcoin price, arbitragers create or redeem to close the gap. You get intraday liquidity, tight spreads, and the comfort of a regulated wrapper. In short: it looks and feels like buying a stock.
Now for the rest of the story. An ETF is not self-custody. Shareholders own claims on bitcoin, not the bitcoin itself. You can't send ETF shares to a friend on a Saturday. You can't use them as peer-to-peer cash. If regulators freeze markets, your ETF can be halted. If a custodian fails, you're trusting insurance and legal paperwork to behave. And the fund charges management fees that chip away at returns. That's the trade: sovereignty exchanged for simplicity.
Here's how I handle it. I own shares of Fidelity's spot Bitcoin ETF (ticker FBTC). I rolled over a portion my company 401(k) into an IRA and bought FBTC because pulling the cash out would've triggered taxes _(and penalties if you are under 59 1/2 years old)_. A rollover kept the funds in a tax-advantaged account and gave me clean bitcoin price exposure. Is an ETF as good as holding BTC on a Bitkey device? No. Self-custody is the gold standard for sovereignty. But inside a retirement account, the ETF is the best tool for the job--no taxable event, straightforward compliance, and real exposure.
So when does a Bitcoin ETF make sense? If you're constrained by policy, operating inside retirement plans, or you simply won't secure private keys responsibly (Bitkey makes this simple), an ETF is a reasonable bridge. It gives you price exposure and fits inside the system as it exists today.
My bottom line: a Bitcoin ETF is training wheels for the old system to touch the new one. Use it when the tax code or account rules leave you no better option--as I did with FBTC. Understand the fees, the custody setup, and the limits. But don't confuse shares for sats. If you want the full promise of Bitcoin--censorship resistance, portability, and true self-sovereignty--learn to hold your own keys. That's not just an investment choice; it's an act of independence.

subject: “Control of the U.S. Senate could be decided in Jon Husted’s race”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
And he has a war chest of $2.6 million to keep the Senate in GOP hands
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117158085/575542658/-1674770188?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_EOM1RS_251012_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWI1YjliNC1hZWE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8igjEPycFw7jSaRBjFw6hxYeFHGN4z7P8ipvoEzuwkY=) Team,

Political pundits are saying control of the U.S. Senate could very well be decided in Jon Husted’s race right here in Ohio — and he’s already got _$2.6 million_ in the bank to make sure the GOP keeps their hold on this seat.

[**_If that’s all you need to hear, pitch in so we can elect Sherrod Brown and make sure this is Husted’s _only_ term >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117158086/575542659/-1674770188?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_EOM1RS_251012_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWI1YjliNC1hZWE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8igjEPycFw7jSaRBjFw6hxYeFHGN4z7P8ipvoEzuwkY=)

If Husted wins reelection, Ohio and the entire country will be dragged into four more years of MAGA control. Another four years of Husted rubber stamping every dangerous, out-of-touch MAGA policy.

**We need resources to stop Husted and his billionaire megadonors from buying this race.**

Husted was handed this position by Republican insiders because he’s always been willing to do the bidding of the wealthy elite — since he’s been in office, he’s handed out tax breaks to the wealthiest Americans, cut Ohioans’ Medicaid, and left working Ohioans behind every step of the way.

Now, those same billionaires who have bankrolled his entire career are lining up to do the same thing for his campaign, because they know he’ll keep delivering for them.

blue?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117158087/575542660/-1674770188?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_EOM1RS_251012_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWI1YjliNC1hZWE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8igjEPycFw7jSaRBjFw6hxYeFHGN4z7P8ipvoEzuwkY=) name: Michael Bennet
subject: [Health Care Focus Group] can you weigh in here?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
I believe every Coloradan has a right to universal access to health care – do you agree?
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117158158/575542905/-2054079050?code=jtk947-su-nd&refcode=jtk947-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjVjODkxZi1hZmE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zWR-6wGL7XLm20A0f8xhE5js5E5SQFt8Hq66K90U9RY=)
Hi, friend. I'm reaching out to ask if you'll be one of the 730 people I need to weigh in on a quick **_[health care focus group by midnight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117158159/575542906/-1995490618?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk947-su-nd&refcode=jtk947-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjVjODkxZi1hZmE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zWR-6wGL7XLm20A0f8xhE5js5E5SQFt8Hq66K90U9RY=&emci=f1145746-34a6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=165c891f-afa7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=1295540)_**
| | [Join the Focus Group](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117158160/575542907/-1995490618?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk947-su-nd&refcode=jtk947-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjVjODkxZi1hZmE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zWR-6wGL7XLm20A0f8xhE5js5E5SQFt8Hq66K90U9RY=&emci=f1145746-34a6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=165c891f-afa7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=1295540)
---
It should only take about 60 seconds or so – but before you click that link, I need to make this crystal clear:
**Every person who calls Colorado home has a right to health care, mental health care, and reproductive health care.**
When I had cancer, the operation that saved my life cost $53,000 – an amount that would bankrupt people without insurance.
**But President Trump and his Republican majorities would rather let a lifeline that allows millions of people to afford health insurance** expire – _and_ shut down the government over it – **than come to the table to keep coverage within reach of regular families.**
So now, my top priority in the Senate is holding the line to save Affordable Care Act tax credits and stop the GOP from doubling your premiums, or worse.
And it's why, as Colorado's governor, I will fight tooth and nail to protect our Medicaid funding, bring down premiums and prescription drug prices, and ensure everyone can get the care they need.
It's a disgrace that the leader of the richest country on Earth is content to let working families go bankrupt trying to pay for the essential care they need.**So it's imperative that we _fix_ it – starting here in Colorado.**
**_[Will you please let me know whether you agree by joining my health care focus group by 11:59 p.m.? As we work to increase access to quality health care in Colorado, I want to be sure I fully understand what you and your family need.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117158161/575542908/-1995490618?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk947-su-nd&refcode=jtk947-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjVjODkxZi1hZmE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zWR-6wGL7XLm20A0f8xhE5js5E5SQFt8Hq66K90U9RY=&emci=f1145746-34a6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=165c891f-afa7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=1295540)_**
| | [Join the Focus Group](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117158162/575542909/-1995490618?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk947-su-nd&refcode=jtk947-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjVjODkxZi1hZmE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zWR-6wGL7XLm20A0f8xhE5js5E5SQFt8Hq66K90U9RY=&emci=f1145746-34a6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=165c891f-afa7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=1295540)

Michael

clean_body: I believe every Coloradan has a right to universal access to health care – do you agree? | | | = Hi, friend. I'm reaching out to ask if you'll be one of the 730 people I need to weigh in on a quick | | It should only take about 60 seconds or so – but before you click that link, I need to make this crystal clear: Every person who calls Colorado home has a right to health care, mental health care, and reproductive health care. When I had cancer, the operation that saved my life cost $53,000 – an amount that would bankrupt people without insurance. But President Trump and his Republican majorities would rather let a lifeline that allows millions of people to afford health insurance expire – and shut down the government over it – than come to the table to keep coverage within reach of regular families. So now, my top priority in the Senate is holding the line to save Affordable Care Act tax credits and stop the GOP from doubling your premiums, or worse. And it's why, as Colorado's governor, I will fight tooth and nail to protect our Medicaid funding, bring down premiums and prescription drug prices, and ensure everyone can get the care they need. It's a disgrace that the leader of the richest country on Earth is content to let working families go bankrupt trying to pay for the essential care they need.So it's imperative that we fix it – starting here in Colorado. | | Thanks in advance for weighing in here – take care, Michael | Bennet for Governor PO Box 270117 Louisville, CO 80027 United States Paid for by Bennet for Governor. name: Dominic Rapini
subject: Christopher Columbus Wakes Up in 2025, Gets Canceled Before He Even Finds Parking
body:
A cautionary tale of WOKISM and Presentism

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f391f38a2135/when-we-vote-we-win-14765627?e=8763c56857)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | **“By discovering America, Columbus set in motion the development of our civilization... and he proved that the human spirit can stretch beyond any horizon.”** \- Ronald Reagan
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
**SATIRE OP-ED | Christopher Columbus Wakes Up in 2025, Gets Canceled Before He Even Finds Parking**
_By Dominic Rapini - American Businessman, Political Commentator, and proud American of Italian Descent_
In what can only be described as the most historically inconvenient miracle since Moses parted the Red Sea during rush hour, **Christopher Columbus has mysteriously reappeared in 2025** —bearded, confused, and wearing tights made of wool.
His first act? Attempting to “discover” America for the second time.
Unfortunately, he landed in Toronto.
“Behold, a vast and bountiful new land!” Columbus shouted, stepping out of a rented Toyota Corolla and planting a flag made from a Chick-fil-A napkin. “I shall call it... Columbusia!” He was immediately ticketed by a Canadian meter maid for parking in a bike lane and misgendering a fire hydrant.
**✦ The New World Meets the Old Man**
Columbus, still working under the assumption that the world is best navigated by celestial objects and faith in God, quickly found himself disoriented by smartphones, self-checkout lanes, and gluten-free communion wafers. Upon being handed an iPad, he asked, “Does this flatter the Earth or confirm it is round?”
His arrival was swiftly picked up by the U.S. media—**CNN described him as a “known colonizer,” MSNBC labeled him a “historical oppressor** with a nautical fetish,” and NPR praised his “emotional vulnerability” but warned listeners not to confuse him with the progressive kind of explorer, like Greta Thunberg.
Meanwhile, liberal activists on X (formerly known as “Ye Olde Twitter”) launched the trending hashtag: **#CancelColumbus.**
Within 12 hours, he was banned from Uber, DoorDash, Venmo, and two Renaissance Fairs.
**✦ Columbus Meets President Trump and VP Harris**
A confused but delighted Columbus was then invited to Mar-a-Lago, where President Trump shook his hand and declared him**“a total legend,** really a pioneer, big boats, huge vision—honestly, he’s the original MAGA.”
Columbus nodded politely, asked where the Queen was, and inquired if the “beautiful walls” Trump spoke of were designed to keep out the Turks or the Carthaginians.
Meanwhile,**Vice President Kamala Harris released a statement c** elebrating Columbus Day by saying:
_**“Exploration is when you explore. And when you explore, you find things, and what you find is what you discovered, and what you discover is something you didn’t know until you explored it.”**_
Columbus was reportedly “deeply moved” by **her “commitment to the metaphysical art of saying absolutely nothing while saying a great many things.”**
**✦ Indigenous Tribes Offer Crypto for Peace Treaty**
Upon finally meeting with leaders of a Native American tribal council in Arizona, Columbus removed his plumed hat, bowed solemnly, and offered shiny beads and Spanish doubloons.
The tribal chief responded, **“Cool, but do you accept Ethereum?”**
A ceremonial peace treaty was signed—digitally—on a Ledger Nano wallet, with full blockchain verification. “It’s like wampum,” Columbus muttered, “but with math.”
**✦ Historical Presentism: The Real Villain**
Immediately following his return, Columbus was booked for a segment on The View. He made it halfway through the green room before being assaulted by a drum circle, three sociology majors from Oberlin, and a former statue activist who tried to tape a BLM sticker to his forehead.
“Don’t you know what you did in 1492?!” screamed one protester.
“I wasn’t even born in this century,” Columbus protested. “I still don’t know what a TikTok is!”
Alas, the mob wasn’t interested in nuance. He was banned from Airbnb for being a “problematic historical presence,” and Snopes rated his life as “Mostly False.”
**✦ Executive Order #1492-B: Trump Saves History (Again)**
In a surprise press conference from his gold-plated golf cart, President Trump signed Executive Order #1492-B:**The Great Columbus Restoration Act,** declaring that all Columbus statues must be returned, Columbus Day must be federally celebrated, and all references to “Indigenous People’s Day” be replaced with “Intrepid Italian Explorer Appreciation Time.”
**“America needs explorers,” Trump said. “Not influencers.”**
Fox News called it “the greatest act of historical preservation since Indiana Jones punched a Nazi.” MSNBC called it “dangerous.” NPR offered a soft banjo arrangement in protest.
**✦ The Legacy Lives On**
So, what does it all mean? Columbus, once revered as a symbol of Western expansion and the man who—through grit, navigational genius, and blind optimism—connected two worlds, has become the scapegoat of an insecure age **allergic to excellence.**
Was he perfect? No. He sailed without GPS, judged the circumference of the Earth incorrectly, and probably thought TikTok was a maritime disease. But he was a man of vision. A man of courage. And unlike today’s critics—he actually did something.
**As Michael Knowles quipped, judging Columbus based on the smear campaign of a political rival is like saying, “We know everything about Trump now, thanks to Hillary’s tweets.” Historians agree:** Columbus was held to the highest standard of his time. **Presentism** —the woke art of applying 21st-century moral codes to 15th-century realities—is intellectual malpractice.

**Bring back the statues. Bring back the truth. And remember: without Columbus, none of us would be here to argue about Columbus.**
**#PoliticalCartoon #Satire #ColumbusDay #Trump #OPED #HistoryTwist**

clean_body: It's important. = 👋 To all of our supporters, We know you're receiving loads of emails and texts asking for money right now, but we kindly ask that you read this message from beginning to end. Here's the key point: Virginia has no limits on how much an individual can donate to a candidate. That means megadonors aligned with Donald Trump can commit millions of dollars to Winsome Earle-Sears for her campaign to spend on attack ads. And that's precisely what they've done. Unlike our opponent, our strategy to flip Virginia blue depends on the small donations of people like you. And when we say small donations, we mean it. This month, our average gift is around $40. It adds up fast when everybody who is in a position to give rises to the occasion. But now, with early voting underway, we need a surge of contributions before the weekend is over to keep airing ads, organizing on the ground, and reaching the pivotal voters of this election. = = = = = = = We appreciate your support! 💙 The Spanberger Campaign By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States

clean_body: | | Reilly Neill is running to be Montana's next U.S. Senator. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | It’s Reilly Neill. Daines doesn’t care whether the government stays shut down or not. Either way, he’ll be doing the same thing: ignoring his constituents while pocketing $$$ from big-money donors and special interests. That’s what got us in this mess, and I’m running to fire him. | | Daines voted to take away your healthcare and forced a shutdown to prevent his own constituents from having a chance at getting it back. Montanans deserve a Senator who will actually do their job. That means keeping the government running AND taking on the issues that matter, like access to healthcare and affordable housing. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | | | | | | Thank you, Reilly Neill * | Reilly Neill is a different kind of Democrat running a different kind of Senate campaign. # _Weekly Edition:_
**Here 's what I'm paying attention to this week:**
* RFK says circumcision linked to rise in autism
* CDC approves RFK's vaccine panel proposal
* GOP calls RFK to fire FDA officials over lethal abortion drug approval
* RFK speaks on Charlie Kirk's death

**Thank you for reading MAHA Weekly!**
* * *
* * *
# RFK says Tylenol use after circumcision linked to autism
HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. claimed during a Thursday Cabinet meeting that children circumcised early **[have"double the rate of autism,"](https://substack.com/redirect/34016cef-dea8-404a-8ea7-439f4fa7cbcc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** suggesting it's "highly likely because they were given Tylenol," coming two weeks after President Donald Trump warned acetaminophen is "not good" for pregnant women.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/34016cef-dea8-404a-8ea7-439f4fa7cbcc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Evidence cited** : Kennedy likely referenced a 2015 Danish study of 340,000 boys showing slightly higher autism rates among circumcised boys by age 10, though the study couldn't determine if Tylenol was involved and was later criticized as "flawed" with significant limitations, while a 2013 study found only weak correlation without establishing causation.

## Watch RFK present his theory:
[](https://substack.com/redirect/9c185fbb-e991-4355-9d6b-4428cb4712c8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Medical experts dispute claims** : Reproductive psychiatrist Dr. Sarah Oreck stated "there is no clear or conclusive evidence that the use of Tylenol during pregnancy causes autism," while neuroscientist Dr. Robert Melillo said the "messaging is terrible" and that research couldn't separate the medication from the illness being treated, comparing it to "blaming umbrellas for rain."
* **Other risk factors overlooked** : Experts emphasized that autism risk factors exist long before pregnancy, including parental obesity, high blood pressure, and diabetes, with Melillo noting these same factors drive increases in multiple conditions, not just autism, while early-life issues like oxygen deprivation and delivery trauma are more credible factors.

* * *

# CDC approves RFK Jr. vaccine panel proposals
The CDC adopted its advisory panel's vote **[to reduce Covid-19 vaccine recommendations](https://substack.com/redirect/92dd57a0-f963-4973-9eb2-4ff3648edb35?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and end the availability of a combination measles-chickenpox shot for young toddlers.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/92dd57a0-f963-4973-9eb2-4ff3648edb35?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## Here's what the CDC approved
* **CDC Restricts MMRV Combination:** The CDC now restricts the MMRV combination vaccine for toddlers 12-15 months old due to febrile seizure risks, requiring separate MMR and chickenpox shots instead, though the combined vaccine remains available for older children.
* **Downgrade Covid 19 Vaccine:** The CDC downgraded Covid-19 vaccine recommendations, eliminating universal vaccination guidance for adults 65+ in favor of "shared clinical decision-making" between patients and doctors. The committee advised that those 6 months to 64 years old discuss vaccination with doctors, particularly if they have underlying health conditions.
* **Vaccine 's Shipments: **The CDC's changes should unlock vaccine shipments through the Vaccines for Children program for low-income families, while the hepatitis B vaccine schedule remains under consideration, with anti-vaccine advocates seeking to delay the birth dose recommendation.

## My thoughts - Agency to parents
This is great news! The conversation is now back where it belongs--between parents and doctors. Parents can now feel they have more choices about how and when their children get vaccinated.
As a baby boomer parent, I remember feeling powerless and always questioning the amount of vaccines our children were required to get. We were told to trust the CDC and their recommendations. It was a mandate to get our children vaccinated before they entered the school system, so we just did it. Thanks to RFK Jr., future parents will have more choices.
* * *
# GOP calls RFK to fire FDA officials over lethal abortion drug approval
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f64f9b23-26e0-4757-bfc1-aa6ece57a943?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Thirteen House Republicans led by Rep. Mark Harris are **[calling on HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. to fire FDA officials](https://substack.com/redirect/f64f9b23-26e0-4757-bfc1-aa6ece57a943?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** who approved a generic version of mifepristone, a lethal abortion pill used in over 60% of abortions.
* **Claims of "rogue actors" undermining pro-life agenda**[:](https://substack.com/redirect/f64f9b23-26e0-4757-bfc1-aa6ece57a943?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) The lawmakers argue the FDA's approval of Evita Solutions' generic mifepristone contradicts the Trump administration's pro-life stance and suggest bureaucrats are working against administration policy.
* **How mifepristone works:** It works by stopping nutrients to the baby provided by the mother until it's death. A second medication is subsequently given to trigger contractions to complete the abortion. Harris stated that dismissing the officials behind this approval would signal the administration's continued commitment to its pro-life principles.
* **Limited legal discretion** : An HHS spokesman stated that federal law requires approval of generic drugs if they're demonstrated to be identical to brand-name versions, and that independent safety/efficacy evidence isn't required for generics, though HHS is reviewing mifepristone's reported adverse effects.

## My thoughts - questionable generic labels
One thing that I discovered from this article is the fact that generic drug makers can skip safety and efficacy testing by relying on the original brand-name drug's data. They only need to prove their version is equivalent to the original, and then the FDA must approve it. WHAT?!?! How does that even make sense?
Making a generic brand as a cheaper option for consumers means they use some different ingredients. It's raises the question that those different ingredients may have different reactions (side effects) than the brand-name version. I believe this could mean that because they don't have to provide independent proof by doing their own studies on safety and efficacy, the generic brand's warning labels may not be accurate for potentially different side effects from the brand-name version.
I'm all for less expensive medicine, but not at the risk of our health..

* * *
# Flashback: RFK Jr. speaks about Charlie Kirk's assassination
At the memorial services and prayer vigil for Charlie Kirk, HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. praised Charlie, calling him a "relentless and courageous crusader for free speech".
[](https://substack.com/redirect/5d23766c-ecda-4af3-92c8-692334e3298e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## Kennedy's heartfelt words
* **[A Bullet Silenced a Truth Teller:](https://substack.com/redirect/d69b7427-ccab-40dc-90f5-8606915bbcaf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Kennedy shared about his father, Robert F. Kennedy Sr., being assassinated in 1968 after winning the California Democratic primary; and how his uncle, President John F. Kennedy, was assassinated in 1963. He said "once again, a bullet has silenced the most eloquent truth teller of an era.
* **A Voice for Freedom:** Kennedy shared "My dear friend Charlie Kirk was our country's relentless and courageous crusader for free speech. We pray for Erika and the children. Charlie is already in paradise with the angels. We ask his prayers for our country,"
* **Honoring a Legend:** President Donald Trump confirmed Kirk's death and ordered U.S. flags flown at half-mast in his honor. In a Truth Social post, Trump called Kirk "great and legendary," praising his connection with America's youth and offering condolences to his family.

## My thoughts - Charlie's legacy lives on
I watched Kennedy's speech that day, and it was absolutely beautiful. I thought it was entirely appropriate for him to mention his father's and uncle's assassinations, since they too were killed by people who disagreed with what they stood for or had to say.
The outpouring of love and support for Charlie's family, for TPUSA, and the surge of campus chapter requests--now exceeding 120,000--confirm that Charlie's legacy, and everything he stood for and believed in, will never be silenced.

Kennedy Jr. claimed during a Thursday Cabinet meeting that children circumcised early have "double the rate of autism," suggesting it's "highly likely because they were given Tylenol..." | | | Oct 12| | | ∙| | Guest post ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | Weekly Edition: Here 's what I'm paying attention to this week: RFK says circumcision linked to rise in autism CDC approves RFK's vaccine panel proposal GOP calls RFK to fire FDA officials over lethal abortion drug approval RFK speaks on Charlie Kirk's death Thank you for reading MAHA Weekly! RFK says Tylenol use after circumcision linked to autism HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. claimed during a Thursday Cabinet meeting that children circumcised early suggesting it's "highly likely because they were given Tylenol," coming two weeks after President Donald Trump warned acetaminophen is "not good" for pregnant women. | | ---|---|--- Evidence cited : Kennedy likely referenced a 2015 Danish study of 340,000 boys showing slightly higher autism rates among circumcised boys by age 10, though the study couldn't determine if Tylenol was involved and was later criticized as "flawed" with significant limitations, while a 2013 study found only weak correlation without establishing causation. Watch RFK present his theory: Medical experts dispute claims : Reproductive psychiatrist Dr. Sarah Oreck stated "there is no clear or conclusive evidence that the use of Tylenol during pregnancy causes autism," while neuroscientist Dr. Robert Melillo said the "messaging is terrible" and that research couldn't separate the medication from the illness being treated, comparing it to "blaming umbrellas for rain." Other risk factors overlooked : Experts emphasized that autism risk factors exist long before pregnancy, including parental obesity, high blood pressure, and diabetes, with Melillo noting these same factors drive increases in multiple conditions, not just autism, while early-life issues like oxygen deprivation and delivery trauma are more credible factors. CDC approves RFK Jr. vaccine panel proposals The CDC adopted its advisory panel's vote and end the availability of a combination measles-chickenpox shot for young toddlers. | | ---|---|--- Here's what the CDC approved CDC Restricts MMRV Combination: The CDC now restricts the MMRV combination vaccine for toddlers 12-15 months old due to febrile seizure risks, requiring separate MMR and chickenpox shots instead, though the combined vaccine remains available for older children. Downgrade Covid 19 Vaccine: The CDC downgraded Covid-19 vaccine recommendations, eliminating universal vaccination guidance for adults 65+ in favor of "shared clinical decision-making" between patients and doctors. The committee advised that those 6 months to 64 years old discuss vaccination with doctors, particularly if they have underlying health conditions. Vaccine 's Shipments: The CDC's changes should unlock vaccine shipments through the Vaccines for Children program for low-income families, while the hepatitis B vaccine schedule remains under consideration, with anti-vaccine advocates seeking to delay the birth dose recommendation. My thoughts - Agency to parents This is great news! The conversation is now back where it belongs--between parents and doctors. Parents can now feel they have more choices about how and when their children get vaccinated. As a baby boomer parent, I remember feeling powerless and always questioning the amount of vaccines our children were required to get. We were told to trust the CDC and their recommendations. It was a mandate to get our children vaccinated before they entered the school system, so we just did it. Thanks to RFK Jr., future parents will have more choices. GOP calls RFK to fire FDA officials over lethal abortion drug approval | | ---|---|--- Thirteen House Republicans led by Rep. Mark Harris are who approved a generic version of mifepristone, a lethal abortion pill used in over 60% of abortions. Claims of "rogue actors" undermining pro-life agenda The lawmakers argue the FDA's approval of Evita Solutions' generic mifepristone contradicts the Trump administration's pro-life stance and suggest bureaucrats are working against administration policy. How mifepristone works: It works by stopping nutrients to the baby provided by the mother until it's death. A second medication is subsequently given to trigger contractions to complete the abortion. Harris stated that dismissing the officials behind this approval would signal the administration's continued commitment to its pro-life principles. Limited legal discretion : An HHS spokesman stated that federal law requires approval of generic drugs if they're demonstrated to be identical to brand-name versions, and that independent safety/efficacy evidence isn't required for generics, though HHS is reviewing mifepristone's reported adverse effects. My thoughts - questionable generic labels One thing that I discovered from this article is the fact that generic drug makers can skip safety and efficacy testing by relying on the original brand-name drug's data. They only need to prove their version is equivalent to the original, and then the FDA must approve it. WHAT?!?! How does that even make sense? Making a generic brand as a cheaper option for consumers means they use some different ingredients. It's raises the question that those different ingredients may have different reactions (side effects) than the brand-name version. I believe this could mean that because they don't have to provide independent proof by doing their own studies on safety and efficacy, the generic brand's warning labels may not be accurate for potentially different side effects from the brand-name version. **_Chuck Schumer_** emailed you.

**_Marc Elias_** emailed you.

We all emailed YOU because Trump's abuses of power are getting more and more nuts every day, and Republicans are just sitting back and letting him do it! **We HAVE to take back the Senate from those jokers ASAP, because _nothing_ \-- not a damn thing -- is gonna be OK again until we do.**

We all emailed YOU because Trump's abuses of power are getting more and more nuts every day, and Republicans are just sitting back and letting him do it! We HAVE to take back the Senate from those jokers ASAP, because nothing \-- not a damn thing -- is gonna be OK again until we do. But even though all of these Democratic all-stars warned you just how freakin' HUGE the stakes are, we're STILL short of our $50,000 midnight fundraising goal to answer their calls! I promise you, there's only one way to fight someone like Trump: By building an unbreakable coalition of Democrats ready to do whatever it takes to win. - We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | - | - | - | - Thanks for being with me. \- James - Derivative of - by JD Lasica. -. - The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please -. - to receive fewer emails. - to unsubscribe. | | Dear Fellow American,

Immigration has dominated American politics since President Trump entered the political arena.

This issue affects so many aspects of American life including the economy, crime prevention, and culture. All Americans must be well informed on immigration and how it affects citizens like you.

That's why my colleagues and I at The Heritage Foundation created our **Official Immigration Quiz.**

This quiz will test your knowledge of the history of American immigration and how immigration policy impacts our country to this day.

**You can take the Official Heritage Foundation Immigration Quiz by clicking the button below.**

[ Take the Quiz ](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/r9i60wbBD8KvaRg5UetHKLfPpdOmJlPdvQeKFk46dlQm_jw37HwKOPNiQ75xQJLyXzhI8Tky8RKaRCNX5AhdEyXoaEI7rKm1URrqOM2snxqrerxZtoBFstsRkQDETzCYUuKepSH2kg45L6fet0EBWxeDYx18zF96-2cKxs07geUHr2hVrX4WSfzEaIsIOicpE1ceRmsPO3mKhxJgyekPpgMsfLzMPw7uX9myWwfbTx8sFPIWNDjnQ6iyiCPuKKXpKjt65awIHwdyWRxP7vtzK5T09ovPxunPVWtqBD-Xpn6Nv3h_gxiyBPYT2ExcziFq3yam7AU6O4vXsisx9g-rODyOq-5n6mVAt4wLQvdOYxqvE4yFL1GOf8RqH5w6kqpkFfPWITiYbDhapGLiL1_JIzkfDDfFnS_M8DACDDtbxHsBzbVDRl70XToRGVbiI3qtkycE06mqcC4JdznhTLXRu5hVXAECZ3IyRzJ2KbBPvO3uApYLd78vfOK9EbYOXHahe6yt6l6IwbSpguNI707NFWdtSnVp-p-kJTY6ezdIgA4ImqLe0JkUEC1PjrR_5pl4EN1-B6gfbdC9b4cnt7O6LTb9amqs-K1tLnWRoZGb02noA0mCtcWw40JijwAwrQQRpM6aN-r5YyRmNcqZoLMVg06NRR2XX5TG0l1PBChJHDpgfv73dvSpccW6oJsc2xvIopmMnCJCnQqbkvOu7wxdvTjq6hKwstffA_1MNb4/wbkKcc5A-wxKDZGg7iw1yfAZYFu3KteL/13) Do you think you know the facts? **** Just another day in Congress... Four US Senators (or their families) made big bets on Artificial Intelligence stocks within days of non-public Senate hearings on AI deregulation. That’s not a coincidence, that’s corruption in plain sight. Three of them - Shelley Moore Capito, Jerry Moran, and John Fetterman - sit on the Commerce Committee which met with Google in May. Within a week, each disclosed up to $75,000 in Google stock purchases. The Fourth, John Boozman, bought shares in Google, Nvidia, Meta, and Amazon. body:
Moments like what’s happening in Louisiana are what the NDRC was built for.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117158597/575544613/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmOTIxZGNhLWI2YTctZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Lp0UuhmsG02gn9hJEXJC1gZ8c6seilnkRhne1-GLfSg=&emci=f9a4c43e-1da6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=3f921dca-b6a7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=8431045)

A lot’s going on in Louisiana right now, Peter.
* Louisiana is at the U.S. Supreme Court arguing to gut the Voting Rights Act — overturning a key provision that ensures the voices of voters of color are heard in the halls of democracy.

* Meanwhile, the Louisiana House Speaker asked state lawmakers to be available in case they call a special redistricting session in response to the court’s ruling — making Louisiana the latest state to potentially jump into Trump’s mid-decade redistricting scheme.

The _Louisiana v. Callais_ Supreme Court case will have far-reaching impacts that could catalyze the manufactured redistricting crisis we’re already seeing sweep states from Texas to Missouri and beyond. **Moments like this one are what the NDRC was built for. Together alongside the entire fair maps movement, we’re defending democracy from gerrymandering attempts in state legislatures, in the courts, and in the court of public opinion. ** [**You have the power to make sure we have the resources we need to fight back on all fronts. Chip in $30 or whatever you can. Every dollar you give means we can continue combining our grassroots organizing muscle and state-by-state approach to defend democracy in the 2026 midterms and beyond.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117158598/575544614/-80723829?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_LouisianaUpdate_email_20251012-NDRC-Tier1-LouisianaUpdate_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251012-NDRC-Tier1-LouisianaUpdate_&utm_campaign=LouisianaUpdate&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmOTIxZGNhLWI2YTctZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Lp0UuhmsG02gn9hJEXJC1gZ8c6seilnkRhne1-GLfSg=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

What’s happening in Louisiana is an illustration of why all of these fights are interconnected. It’s also a testament to why we can’t let up on any of them.
Take Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act — the part of the law that the _Louisiana v. Callais_ case takes direct aim at. In just the last two years, its enforcement has dismantled racially discriminatory maps in several states, including Alabama and Louisiana, and given Black voters in those states fair representation that has been denied to them for far too long. It’s a stunning and sobering thought to consider what our democracy would look like without the Voting Rights Act.
[**We have to be ready to respond to whatever happens in the courts and whatever state lawmakers decide to do next. Donate to power the NDRC’s work to protect our voting rights in this critical moment for democracy.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117158605/575544621/-80723829?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_LouisianaUpdate_email_20251012-NDRC-Tier1-LouisianaUpdate_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251012-NDRC-Tier1-LouisianaUpdate_&utm_campaign=LouisianaUpdate&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmOTIxZGNhLWI2YTctZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Lp0UuhmsG02gn9hJEXJC1gZ8c6seilnkRhne1-GLfSg=)

clean_body: Moments like what’s happening in Louisiana are what the NDRC was built for. | A lot’s going on in Louisiana right now, Peter. Louisiana is at the U.S. Supreme Court arguing to gut the Voting Rights Act — overturning a key provision that ensures the voices of voters of color are heard in the halls of democracy. Meanwhile, the Louisiana House Speaker asked state lawmakers to be available in case they call a special redistricting session in response to the court’s ruling — making Louisiana the latest state to potentially jump into Trump’s mid-decade redistricting scheme. The Louisiana v. Callais Supreme Court case will have far-reaching impacts that could catalyze the manufactured redistricting crisis we’re already seeing sweep states from Texas to Missouri and beyond. Moments like this one are what the NDRC was built for. Together alongside the entire fair maps movement, we’re defending democracy from gerrymandering attempts in state legislatures, in the courts, and in the court of public opinion. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = What’s happening in Louisiana is an illustration of why all of these fights are interconnected. It’s also a testament to why we can’t let up on any of them. Take Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act — the part of the law that the Louisiana v. Callais case takes direct aim at. In just the last two years, its enforcement has dismantled racially discriminatory maps in several states, including Alabama and Louisiana, and given Black voters in those states fair representation that has been denied to them for far too long. It’s a stunning and sobering thought to consider what our democracy would look like without the Voting Rights Act. = Thanks so much, The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Tim Holbert, American Veterans Center
subject: America’s most secret warriors are ready to tell their stories
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
-------------------------

[American Veterans Center]
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/f3ba57754ef748c2b9d283121a43081b-53e991a2a59445d48313229bda78d3b3/63]

Friend,

For more than 40 years, a small brotherhood of pilots has flown
America’s most dangerous missions. They are the legendary Night
Stalkers.

[Night Stalkers]
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/f3ba57754ef748c2b9d283121a43081b-53e991a2a59445d48313229bda78d3b3/63]

_Above: CW5 (R) Graham T. Stevens, one of the original Night Stalkers,
flying a Cobra in Vietnam before being assigned to the 160__th__
Special Operations Aviation Unit_

These men flew into the most dangerous missions of our lifetime...from
Mogadishu to Iraq to Afghanistan...often under cover of night, where
secrecy and precision meant life or death.

They carried our nation’s most elite special operations soldiers
into battle.

They risked _everything_.

AND NOW, FOR THE FIRST TIME, THESE WARRIORS ARE READY TO SIT DOWN AND
SHARE THEIR STORIES ON FILM.

But here’s the problem, Friend: if we don’t act in the next 30
days, we may lose this chance forever.

That means we have less than 30 days to raise the funds, assemble our
production team, and capture these stories.

FRIEND, WILL YOU MAKE A GIFT OF $25, $50, OR EVEN $100 TODAY TO HELP
US PRESERVE THE NIGHT STALKERS’ LEGACY FOR GENERATIONS TO COME?
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/f3ba57754ef748c2b9d283121a43081b-53e991a2a59445d48313229bda78d3b3/63]

YES! I WANT TO PRESERVE THE NIGHT STALKERS’ LEGACY
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/f3ba57754ef748c2b9d283121a43081b-53e991a2a59445d48313229bda78d3b3/63]

[Fred Arooji]
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/f3ba57754ef748c2b9d283121a43081b-53e991a2a59445d48313229bda78d3b3/63]

_Above: CW5 Fred Arooji training for special operations with the
160__th__ Special Operations Aviation Unit that would be known as the
Night Stalkers. _

As President of the American Veterans Center, I see it as our mission
to make sure America never forgets the brave men and women who
defended her.

That’s why AVC is committed to bringing veterans’ voices to life
— on film, on stage, and at national events — so Americans can
understand the cost of freedom and the character of those who paid
it.

Here’s what we’ve done recently to prove it:

WE JUST FILMED WORLD WAR II VETERANS FROM THE PACIFIC THEATER.

* Many of these veterans are in their 100s, and we managed to record
their firsthand accounts while they are still with us.

* This is material we’re preserving for museums, classrooms, and
future generations.

WE REVIVED AND NOW HOST THE NATIONAL MEMORIAL DAY PARADE in
Washington, D.C.

* This is the largest Memorial Day event of its kind, bringing the
country together each year to honor those who served.

AND YOU CAN WATCH THE THOUSANDS OF ORAL HISTORIES WE’VE CAPTURED ON
OUR YOUTUBE CHANNEL, where our more than ONE MILLION subscribers watch
America’s veterans share their stories of service and sacrifice.

Friend, when you give to AVC, you’re helping put cameras, crews, and
historians in the field to capture living memory — real people,
exact names, and precise details that textbooks can never reproduce.

_That’s why I’m so excited about the chance to record these
interviews with the elite pilots of the 160__th__ Special Operations
Aviation Regiment. _

AND I KNOW ONE THING FOR CERTAIN: WE CANNOT DO THIS WITHOUT YOU,
FRIEND.

CAN YOU CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT TO HELP US CAPTURE THE INCREDIBLE STORIES
OF THE NIGHT STALKERS IN THE NEXT 30 DAYS?
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/f3ba57754ef748c2b9d283121a43081b-53e991a2a59445d48313229bda78d3b3/63]

HELP CAPTURE THE NIGHT STALKERS’ STORIES TODAY
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/f3ba57754ef748c2b9d283121a43081b-53e991a2a59445d48313229bda78d3b3/63]

Friend, let me tell you about some of the pilots of the 160th, current
and retired:

* CW5 (R) PAUL PRICE, a Master Army Aviator and one of the first
special operations aviators to be assigned to the Night Stalkers after
the Iran hostage crisis. He developed air tactics that played a
critical role in Grenada and Kosovo.

* CW5 (R) MIKE GWINN, another “founding father” of the 160th who
flew 15,000 flight hours and supported Task Force Ranger in Somalia in
1993.

* CW5 FRED AROOJI, who participated in Operation Eagle Claw in Iran
in 1979 and later was one of the first special operations aviators to
test night vision goggles and teach the Army how to use them.

[CW5 (R) Paul Price and CW5 (R) Mike Gwinn]
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/f3ba57754ef748c2b9d283121a43081b-53e991a2a59445d48313229bda78d3b3/63]

_Above: CW5 (R) Paul Price and CW5 (R) Mike Gwinn at their inductions
into the Army Aviation Hall of Famie in 2018 and 2022,
respectively. _

Many of these pilots honed their skills in their bravery in Vietnam
before being assigned to Task Force 160 – and they’ll be
recounting that war, too.

FRIEND, YOUR SUPPORT MAKES IT POSSIBLE TO RECORD THEIR FIRSTHAND
ACCOUNTS BEFORE TIME RUNS OUT.

WILL YOU HELP US TAKE ADVANTAGE OF THIS ONCE-IN-A-LIFETIME OPPORTUNITY
WITH YOUR TAX-DEDUCTIBLE GIFT TODAY?
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/f3ba57754ef748c2b9d283121a43081b-53e991a2a59445d48313229bda78d3b3/63]

HELP CAPTURE THE NIGHT STALKERS’ STORIES TODAY
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/f3ba57754ef748c2b9d283121a43081b-53e991a2a59445d48313229bda78d3b3/63]

Here’s our plan, Friend, once we raise the funds we need to produce
these Hollywood-quality documentaries about the Night Stalkers:

* ASSEMBLE THE TEAM — cameras, historians, and production crew.
* TRAVEL TO MEET THE NIGHT STALKERS before the deadline passes.
* PRESERVE THEIR STORIES in a documentary that will inspire
generations.

Friend, when you give, you are helping ensure these warriors are
remembered for what they risked, what they sacrificed, and what they
accomplished.

IF WE SUCCEED, FUTURE GENERATIONS WILL KNOW WHO THE NIGHT STALKERS
WERE — AND WHY THEY MATTERED.

_If we fail, their voices may be lost to history._

We begin filming in less than 30 days. Every day that passes brings us
closer to losing their untold stories.

PLEASE, FRIEND, JOIN US IN THIS MISSION BEFORE TIME RUNS OUT.
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/f3ba57754ef748c2b9d283121a43081b-53e991a2a59445d48313229bda78d3b3/63]

Sincerely,

Tim Holbert
President
American Veterans Center

P.S. FRIEND, HERE’S THE FULL LIST OF VETERANS OF THE 160TH WHOSE
STORIES WE’RE HOPING TO RECORD IN LESS THAN 30 DAYS:

* COL(R) Bob Yuill
* CW5(R) GT Stevens
* CW5(R) Paul Price
* CW5(R) Mike Gwinn
* MSG(R) Russ Jordan
* LTC(R) Bob Johnson
* CW5(R) Charlie Weigandt
* CW5(R) Mike Shutlz
* COL(R) Ned Hubbard
* CW5 Fred Arooji

I’ll be sharing more about these remarkable warriors over the coming
weeks.

BUT TODAY, FRIEND, I ASK YOU TO ACT: HELP US RECORD THE NIGHT
STALKERS’ STORIES IN THEIR OWN WORDS BEFORE IT’S TOO LATE.
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/f3ba57754ef748c2b9d283121a43081b-53e991a2a59445d48313229bda78d3b3/63]

PRESERVE THE LEGACY OF THE NIGHT STALKERS
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/f3ba57754ef748c2b9d283121a43081b-53e991a2a59445d48313229bda78d3b3/63]

The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II
Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and
experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel
from World War II through today.

A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded
solely through generous contributions from people like you. All
contributions are tax-deductible.

© American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

DCDailyJournal.com

Click Here to Unsubscribe Or Report as Spam
[https://paramountcomm.app.optipub.com/messages/opt-outs/f3ba57754ef748c2b9d283121a43081b?op-notrack]

This email was directed to dpwillis67@gmail.com only | Our Privacy Policy can be
found by clicking here
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/f3ba57754ef748c2b9d283121a43081b-cf160291621f4bcb94effea8339163d8/63].

525-K East Market Street # 114
City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176

© Copyright DCDailyJournal.com All Rights Reserved.

name: Michael Bennet
subject: this email is a little different
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117158845/575545331/-895354081?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.12_Amy-McGrath-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_60OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWJkNzU1My1iOGE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=doE9LwI-dAqCnWniTfjdgX8eMaeXGOSpLlMGzoe3QSc=) Folks,

We're at an inflection point in our country's history.

Throughout my career as a Marine, I took an oath to defend the Constitution. That's still my North Star. And every day, we're watching the very principles America was founded on — basic liberties, the rule of law — come under direct attack. Republicans in power are using their authority to further empower and enrich themselves and their friends.

And as a result, people across Kentucky — and across the nation — are suffering.

Well, I refuse to sit back and watch this happen. That oath I took is ringing in my ears.

**I'm announcing that I'm running for U.S. Senate.** We need leaders who won't be bullied by an administration that destroys our institutions and betrays our country's foundations. I served as a Marine for 20 years — these guys don't scare me.

As you know, I've run for this seat once before. It was a tough election that didn't go our way. But in my line of work, you don't quit when you get knocked down. At a moment like this, each of us needs to do everything we can to get back up and fight for our country.

Just like you, I'm sick and tired of politicians who care only about themselves. And they're throwing hard-working people under the bus — all across the country, and especially here in Kentucky. These people are selfish cowards who wouldn't know a backbone if it hit them in the face.

That's why I'm running. Because we deserve leaders who aren't afraid to stand up for what they believe in, even when — especially when — times are tough. **That's what this country is worth to me, and I know that like Maggie Hassan, I'm not alone.**

Look, I know this race won't be easy. But here's the thing: Democrats can win — yes, even in red states — when we're brave enough to stand up for what we believe in. This is an open Senate seat — something Kentucky hasn't had in 15 years, thanks to Mitch McConnell.

And I intend to win it.

**But I can’t do it without a lot of help from people like you, so I need to ask directly. _[Will you split a donation between me and Maggie Hassan to kickstart this campaign and help us wage a real fight for the future of our democracy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117158846/575545332/-895354081?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.12_Amy-McGrath-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_60OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWJkNzU1My1iOGE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=doE9LwI-dAqCnWniTfjdgX8eMaeXGOSpLlMGzoe3QSc=)_** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Amy McGrath and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117158847/575545333/-895354081?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.12_Amy-McGrath-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_60OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWJkNzU1My1iOGE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=doE9LwI-dAqCnWniTfjdgX8eMaeXGOSpLlMGzoe3QSc=)

clean_body: = Folks, We're at an inflection point in our country's history. Throughout my career as a Marine, I took an oath to defend the Constitution. That's still my North Star. And every day, we're watching the very principles America was founded on — basic liberties, the rule of law — come under direct attack. Republicans in power are using their authority to further empower and enrich themselves and their friends. And as a result, people across Kentucky — and across the nation — are suffering. Well, I refuse to sit back and watch this happen. That oath I took is ringing in my ears. I'm announcing that I'm running for U.S. Senate. We need leaders who won't be bullied by an administration that destroys our institutions and betrays our country's foundations. I served as a Marine for 20 years — these guys don't scare me. As you know, I've run for this seat once before. It was a tough election that didn't go our way. But in my line of work, you don't quit when you get knocked down. At a moment like this, each of us needs to do everything we can to get back up and fight for our country. Just like you, I'm sick and tired of politicians who care only about themselves. And they're throwing hard-working people under the bus — all across the country, and especially here in Kentucky. These people are selfish cowards who wouldn't know a backbone if it hit them in the face. That's why I'm running. Because we deserve leaders who aren't afraid to stand up for what they believe in, even when — especially when — times are tough. That's what this country is worth to me, and I know that like Maggie Hassan, I'm not alone. Look, I know this race won't be easy. But here's the thing: Democrats can win — yes, even in red states — when we're brave enough to stand up for what we believe in. This is an open Senate seat — something Kentucky hasn't had in 15 years, thanks to Mitch McConnell. And I intend to win it. But I can’t do it without a lot of help from people like you, so I need to ask directly. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Amy McGrath and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = For that and for everything to come in this campaign, thank you. Amy If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. [Give Me 25% Off!](https://substack.com/redirect/e3b88c9c-362b-4a09-ab39-0cf436c64a68?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Mike Johnson, the current possessor of the House Speaker's gavel and wielder of sanctimonious bromides, stands before the Congress and the American people not as a leader, but a sermon in a suit--a damp Sunday homily given human form.
The Louisiana Republican is less a politician than a walking evangelical comic book.
Spontaneously muttering scripture with all the warmth of a malfunctioning televangelist. And the political dexterity of a man trying to juggle live snakes in a lavatory.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2bdbb2e2-8782-41e8-9c1b-28b11521d61d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Two years ago, the Republicans hoisted this pious mannequin into a position of legislative power. A move akin to putting a Boy Scout in charge of an illicit marijuana dispensary.
Johnson's greatest qualifications appear to be his flair for selectively quoting Leviticus on cable news and his skills in [kissing Trump's gelatinous ass while the nation's constitution, economy, and sanity crumble](https://substack.com/redirect/2bdbb2e2-8782-41e8-9c1b-28b11521d61d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/95f4c30f-d333-4348-a33f-d756f52e7fda?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Speaker Johnson is a man who governs not with reason, nor with the dull but necessary calculus of statecraft.
But the fervor of a tent revivalist [who's convinced a federal budget that further enriches billionaires is the Book of Revelation](https://substack.com/redirect/95f4c30f-d333-4348-a33f-d756f52e7fda?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and that every compromise and move away from doctrinaire conservatism is a pact with Beelzebub.
This would be laughable if it weren't so pathetic and catastrophic.
But every now and then, from the deep pews of American life, a voice rises--n[ot from the think tanks, nor from the ivory towers, but from the commons](https://substack.com/redirect/2bdbb2e2-8782-41e8-9c1b-28b11521d61d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Including the open phone lines on _C-SPAN_.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2bdbb2e2-8782-41e8-9c1b-28b11521d61d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Johnson recently appeared on the channel's _Washington Journal_ program and [proclaimed "everyone is smiling" in cities where Trump has deployed troops](https://substack.com/redirect/d42e3224-2f54-4f78-80ed-3e7607bf50b3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Enter a caller named "Sam from Colorado."
* * *
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.8yswapCUPxPTUjxA53Q5D-yZNexTJOINVbFN4I8NsXM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=175749468)
* * *
Sam eviscerated Johnson's piety with more precision than a hundred op-eds and a thousand Sunday public-affairs-show panels.
Sam declared that Johnson's comments "feel dystopian and insane."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d42e3224-2f54-4f78-80ed-3e7607bf50b3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Then, Sam pivoted from Johnson's bizarre description of federal troop deployments to the government shutdown.
Johnson keeps accusing democrats of demanding illegal immigrants get health care. Sam declared to Johnson, "[as you sit here and lie about this... will you bring a one-year extension of the Obamacare tax subsidies to the floor](https://substack.com/redirect/2bdbb2e2-8782-41e8-9c1b-28b11521d61d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)?" Johnson would not answer the question.
Still, Sam from Colorado had made Johnson squirm. And he had exposed an uncomfortable truth.
[On policy, economics, and governance, Johnson is nothing more than an absolute farce](https://substack.com/redirect/95f4c30f-d333-4348-a33f-d756f52e7fda?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
But there is an even juicier chapter to the fraud that is Mike Johnson. The personal stuff.
There has long been a suggestion whispered in Capitol Hill hallways, typed furiously on internet blogs, and passed around on social media like a bong in the backroom of a frat party, that Mr. Johnson has been spotted not merely wandering from his hetero-holy dogma.
But (allegedly) cruising on **Grindr**.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/95f4c30f-d333-4348-a33f-d756f52e7fda?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Grindr is a gay hook-up app. A den of digital sin (per the likes of Johnson), a marketplace not for loaves and fish but for torsos and suggestive emojis.
If the Grindr allegations are true, it is not the sexuality or the acts that damn Johnson, but the hypocrisy--a sin so common among the GOP in Washington, D.C. that it should be engraved above every Republican office door.
Let me be clear: there is no shame in being gay, closeted or otherwise. The shame lies in wielding moral cudgels against the very people whose lives one privately mimics.
This is the eternal sickness of the conservative moralists.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2bdbb2e2-8782-41e8-9c1b-28b11521d61d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.8yswapCUPxPTUjxA53Q5D-yZNexTJOINVbFN4I8NsXM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=175749468)
* * *
Whether the claims about Johnson are true or false, the mere existence of the allegations and the degree to which they keep circulating speak volumes about the Speaker.
Johnson has publicly championed anti‐LGBTQ policies, defended "family values," supported conversion‐therapy‐adjacent rhetoric, and otherwise positioned himself as a bulwark against what he calls "gender ideology" or "homosexual normalization."
In public, he decries what he calls the decay of morals. In private, the whispers suggest he may be straying from his own script or at least did before he became Speaker. "Hypocrisy on steroids," as one critic told the Hill.
Johnson, like so many self-appointed apostles before him, may turn out to be the latest in a long line of preachers caught by a trap that they set. Another pious rooster found roosting in the wrong henhouse.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1242af13-0973-48ed-b3eb-459bd1452d7e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
But again, the real tragedy is not the personal contradictions of Mike Johnson.
It is that a nation so proud of its institutions, so allegedly allergic to tyranny and ignorance, [continues to allow such corrupt, jelly-spined, conservative fanatics to dress up their repression and lies](https://substack.com/redirect/95f4c30f-d333-4348-a33f-d756f52e7fda?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as leadership.
Johnson is a pulpit parasite who mistakes bigotry for conviction, cowardice for faith, and political demonization for democracy.
In the end, our republic will survive, not because of its so-called leaders like Johnson and Trump, _but in spite of them_.
Our [American experiment will survive because of the countless Sams](https://substack.com/redirect/1242af13-0973-48ed-b3eb-459bd1452d7e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--the irreverent, un-bought, un-bossed, cantankerous citizens who call a fraud a fraud on C-SPAN and a Grindr profile a Grindr profile.
So here's to C-SPAN's "Sam from Colorado."
And here's to every American who refuses to be governed by men of such ill-intent, who quote the Bible in public. And swipe right in private.

body:
Protect children, not dream about killing them...Important update for Virginia voters — details inside.| | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=fa61dd29c03045e2a1c258e615146a45&_e=MxhENzOEo-sya5mqLM0BQBsuuwwdULoO7Hkg9IzX5gOcABGdcwirOCzbNInSRTMLbZr53ZspcdIftuKH7wJ9KyabHbQ-yIVxfMmWvznNc5ob5gGuN1_MSqzUrKGs6WfJqgT4t76TtzdiArTH_ZXORk_a6dBraLA9SdciDM2nD3I3KomaENqITOaqcke9F4o2F78kpYBV4suUvJ6fQ7mfJDmtAxQPlXzsC7wkUHUDzVf-cvyPI8TpokES6YXIl4FLghVjAWbYWCdE7hKCgiSkhIECoRSMo9JBZuHBSyODK_JCfFIa46pYRkcrydw6cHboOGSkiiCZCZu2TIxbz-pI0HHeAnVIfm4jUTLZk5y6IlUuEPJhs94mU9qD583RbyIHD8GwTQVfbSI_rufrfpWTEyFUa_oaLbzDwB604Br2OGSi6TPGbfuOHqBO0RPkomMpVgkfHzzpAcGcGt2doYjGc-ABa9g7KZIhocKFhjtmdBQuBdCqrk5pe00J6DoVOPf_H0EtSdf_1p9fhntpBvYOMh3YCyHTGJs1uoamVev6CO5FexYUzQQ4pYZwhLw3e-wXNMUdvPeha-sV9Ude6-ebZ8vOkaj7ReJ5lZ26qYX9tV0Qx_FK00Oliat2NS5xRCyKX8vd8FxtdRWuvHKVlCO7I8EvSP8RNdOWtsHHH2OOhmXJOYSO9nimMx2K1F57qEy0bwNykmZf4yNXu3dg-5rAP7I9_VtGjoL0fj6nDdSOA7qZDvDU81l0PJUvLc9qkeRXj28snodYRqfXBzBYUsY3zyJanGddEA4b9zCID0aNjizLxYtb7HBeNbVSSyiSj6zm)
---
Friend, We have **three weeks left** to stop **the most dangerous candidate** in modern Virginia history.
---
* Jay Jones fantasizes about **executing his political opponents** and **watching their children die in their mothers' arms.**

* He has a **reckless driving conviction** and used his influence to **escape jail time.**
* He has a **horrendous soft-on-crime record** that puts Virginia families **at risk.**

---
[**DON'T LET THEM COVER THIS UP**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=fa61dd29c03045e2a1c258e615146a45&_e=MxhENzOEo-sya5mqLM0BQBsuuwwdULoO7Hkg9IzX5gOcABGdcwirOCzbNInSRTMLbZr53ZspcdIftuKH7wJ9KyabHbQ-yIVxfMmWvznNc5ob5gGuN1_MSqzUrKGs6WfJqgT4t76TtzdiArTH_ZXORk_a6dBraLA9SdciDM2nD3I3KomaENqITOaqcke9F4o2F78kpYBV4suUvJ6fQ7mfJDmtAxQPlXzsC7wkUHUDzVf-cvyPI8TpokES6YXIl4FLghVjAWbYWCdE7hKCgiSkhIECoRSMo9JBZuHBSyODK_LOtswjQivvLgaadrF5XFAH8A0vMWmMQcHpEUMpVuEqNmnx3swRHvvu1yEwcC_NEOhMZTaA_RKb5VQS6AWWQj-rST5r1YCfj-HNTJ9n8YVxx0mZyTEbz9mSzlOYW3RPLLooNwf6jkLU84tLMxrCrZcBHALdZ0lgwV9cZeTnGnVvVQiMs4Ma3qvENpTPZkkz-oyWCP-K7LWfM0PNBYMVKsop1WN5g_PNWn1KJlLHmmV-VgYM8jxy5dbi1-i4b80MJoFb6Bl2IqojqqOQNhhi7r3VsmiIa0CQqbqaQeCoJwOFKV7SXo1e9PRr1__1SXFTHjteWMuZKCTAs2SlbKn8y8uW7-f5oGlaVeiaVxTQnVHcD3koQiusbFkAW96U2RdAcM-0Llh9ZidJhuK4ipQaJlrq_Y8VAvZmo_9kHWlsJctteNOKfj_nEF_CnVb7ub1OrohlGHWUylcMe3GkiEEeMe3CiZHRdyy0PBgcbwWg5vnlKGXeg5uN7BgdzRZh5VUlE7OB7UaiMKo0lL43_ybW0vnI)
---
**But here's the problem: Most Virginia voters still don't know any of this.**

The mainstream media won't touch this story. Democrats are desperate to cover it up until _**AFTER**_ Election Day. They're betting Virginia families will vote for Jones before learning he's a dangerous, unfit, disqualified career politician.

**We _CANNOT_ let that happen.**
---

name: Peter Ohtaki
subject: Don’t reward failed policies with a monopoly
body:
Don’t reward failed policies with a monopoly! Peter Ohtaki — October 12, 2025 As you consider Proposition 50, ask yourself, is California better off today then it was over a decade ago? Since 2014 the | | | [](https://g3j1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68ec2be38c94227df5d4d889&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.mainstreamrevolution.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D68ec170002dce93009bc9636%26ss_email_id%3D68ec2be38c94227df5d4d889%26ss_campaign_name%3DDon%25E2%2580%2599t%2Breward%2Bfailed%2Bpolicies%2Bwith%2Ba%2Bmonopoly%2B%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-10-12T22%253A30%253A14Z&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_68ec170002dce93009bc9636&l=en-US&s=WwgA7rIN2oL-dz5boypCWkJex5Q%3D)
---
|
## Don’t reward failed policies with a monopoly!
---
Peter Ohtaki — October 12, 2025
---
As you consider Proposition 50, ask yourself, _**is California better off today then it was over a decade ago?**_ Since 2014 the Democratic party has held both the Governor's office and a **super-majority** in our state legislature - i.e. a **one-party state**. So, does it make any sense to reward the ruling party that has overseen our state's decline with even more power?
#### If you’re moderate, independent or conservative, you’ll lose your voice in Congress if Prop 50 passes
Prop 50 will reduce the number of Republican seats in Congress from California **from nine (17%) to four** **( <8%)** of the state’s 52 Congressional districts in the upcoming **2026, 2028 and 2032 elections**. Heavily gerrymandered District 2 will now stretch 395 miles from the Oregon border to the Golden Gate Bridge, as moderate and conservative voters in Redding and Eureka are overwhelmed and disenfranchised with liberal Marin County!
#### **NO on Prop 50**. Their failed policies have resulted in:
* **“Doom Loop” of crime, drugs and homelessness** in our great California cities
* **Highest gas prices** **in the nation** (SB-1 raised gas taxes to $1.40/gallon)
* **Highest unemployment rate 5.5% in the nation** in August 2025 ([BLS](https://g3j1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68ec2be38c94227df5d4d889&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bls.gov%2Fweb%2Flaus%2Flaumstrk.htm&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_68ec170002dce93009bc9636&l=en-US&s=PaiydZIhVTw9eo8FkQ0P4-ezGrU%3D))
* **Ranked 37th in K-12 public education** by _[U.S. News& World Report](https://g3j1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68ec2be38c94227df5d4d889&u=https%3A%2F%2Fgranitebaytoday.org%2Franked-37-out-of-50-pre-k-12-education-in-california-graded-low%2F%23%3A%7E%3Atext%3DUS%2520News%2520and%2520World%2520Report%2Cnot%2520comparing%2520apples%2520to%2520oranges.&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_68ec170002dce93009bc9636&l=en-US&s=XpfR7IKXitPl3jlBc3ND7ShTAcI%3D)_
* **Highest taxes in the nation**(state, sales, and property taxes)
* **Highest utility rates in the nation**

---
|
---
| San Jose jewelry store smash & grab (_left_); San Francisco homeless encampment (_right_)
---
* **Exodus of major employers from California** including Oracle, Palantir, In-N-Out Burger, Tesla, Jamba Juice, Chevron, Charles Schwab, McKesson, Lockheed, Toyota, and Bank of America, according to the [California](https://g3j1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68ec2be38c94227df5d4d889&u=https%3A%2F%2Fcaliforniapolicycenter.org%2Fthe-california-book-of-exodus%2F&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_68ec170002dce93009bc9636&l=en-US&s=Hios5vhAXyFh1R9LGQG4rQ0RkFw%3D)[ Policy Center](https://g3j1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68ec2be38c94227df5d4d889&u=https%3A%2F%2Fcaliforniapolicycenter.org%2F&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_68ec170002dce93009bc9636&l=en-US&s=mrZWzLF_ywWkA7W0Dhv7gRKZ308%3D). **Over 120 companies moved to Texas**.
* **State** **government over-spending** resulting in a **$20 billion deficit**
* **Law prohibits school districts** **from informing parents** if their elementary school-aged children change gender identity
* The state [banned single family zoning under SB9](https://g3j1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68ec2be38c94227df5d4d889&u=https%3A%2F%2Fladybug-sailfish-2ss9.squarespace.com%2Fblog%2F2024%2Fhousing%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D68ec170002dce93009bc9636%26ss_email_id%3D68ec2be38c94227df5d4d889%26ss_campaign_name%3DDon%25E2%2580%2599t%2Breward%2Bfailed%2Bpolicies%2Bwith%2Ba%2Bmonopoly%2B%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-10-12T22%253A30%253A14Z&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_68ec170002dce93009bc9636&l=en-US&s=pTTTIfhcAz7imAV0hw4SOaRZFo4%3D) threatens the American Dream of a house in the suburbs
* **High-speed rail to nowhere** after cost overruns and billions of tax dollars spent
* **California lost half-million people between 2020-2022**

#### Don’t reward incompetence with a **one-party political monopoly**!
* _Get**No on Prop 50 yard signs** from [SMGOP](mailto:info@smgop.org?subject=No%20on%20Prop%2050%20yard%20signs&body=I'd%20like%20a%20No%20on%20Prop%2050%20yard%20sign%20-%20how%20can%20I%20get%20some%3F) or [SVGOP](https://g3j1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68ec2be38c94227df5d4d889&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsvgop.com%2Fget-involved%23volunteer-today&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_68ec170002dce93009bc9636&l=en-US&s=kxWXDE6mxqxK3X9eUhtzs2KgwW0%3D) as ballots are already out_
* _Join_ Congressional candidate Peter Coe Verbica this Wednesday 6pm - rsvp [peter.verbica@gmail.com](mailto:peter.verbica@gmail.com?subject=RSVP)
* Donate to [SMGOP](https://g3j1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68ec2be38c94227df5d4d889&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsmgop.org%2Fdonate&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_68ec170002dce93009bc9636&l=en-US&s=-z6wqdEs6RNfLOB8knPLe76s8N0%3D) or [SVGOP](https://g3j1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68ec2be38c94227df5d4d889&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.anedot.com%2Fsantaclaragop%2Findividualmemberships&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_68ec170002dce93009bc9636&l=en-US&s=VbwbidVjF1bZe0UOilJ5xdAlBL0%3D) to fund GOTV (Get out the Vote) efforts
* _Email your friends and neighbors to vote No on Prop 50 to increase**voter turn-out**_

name: Haley Stevens
subject: This isn’t a surprise
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Trump knows how important MI is to the Senate

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1055%2E49239%2EljsfXf)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6670?t=2&akid=1055%2E49239%2EljsfXf)
---
null, it’s Haley Stevens.
It’s official: **Donald Trump has endorsed my opponent, MAGA Republican Mike Rogers, in Michigan’s battleground Senate race.**
This isn’t a surprise – Rogers has spent years kissing up to Trump. MAGA megadonors even spent nearly $80 million last year trying to buy a Senate seat for Rogers. And now with Trump’s backing, we know what’s coming: a flood of GOP dark money and billionaire-funded attacks.
**We can fight back, but I need your help.** The deadline to hit our critical $100,000 mid-month fundraising goal is around the corner, and we need the resources: _[**Will you rush $5 to help me compete against Rogers’ war chest and keep Michigan blue?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6671?t=3&akid=1055%2E49239%2EljsfXf)_
| | [Donate](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6672?t=4&akid=1055%2E49239%2EljsfXf)
---
null, keeping Mike Rogers out of the Senate isn’t just about our race in Michigan. It’s about flipping the Senate blue and stopping another MAGA loyalist from rubber-stamping Trump’s chaos agenda: gutting Medicaid, raising prices with reckless tariffs, and forcing working families to pay for tax cuts for billionaires.
I’ve spent my career fighting for Michigan – from helping save 200,000 auto jobs during the Great Recession to flipping a red House seat blue and delivering real results for working people. I’m in this race because Michiganders deserve a senator who fights for them, not someone who takes orders from Donald Trump.
**Here's the truth: Polling shows****I’m the Democrat with the best chance to beat Rogers.** GOP operatives even told _The Hill_ __ that __ I’m their **_toughest_** general election opponent. But to keep this lead – and win – I cannot miss this $100,000 fundraising goal.
**[I’m personally asking, null: Will you chip in $5 to help us reach our goal, keep Michigan blue, and defeat Trump’s handpicked candidate?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6671?t=5&akid=1055%2E49239%2EljsfXf)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6671?t=6&akid=1055%2E49239%2EljsfXf)
---

---

---
Thanks for standing with me.

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6675?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=10&akid=1055%2E49239%2EljsfXf) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6670?t=11&akid=1055%2E49239%2EljsfXf)

Thank you,
Haley
