Peter,
While Black Hawk helicopters circle Portland, ICE is going overboard with tear gassing protesters. That gas is so thick, it's floating into nearby apartments, impacting people who are not even participating in the protests. Let's be clear. There's no justification for using "riot control" tactics and devices against peaceful protesters: dancing frogs and unicorns and elderly couples with walkers and signs. Things are so peaceful, one couple even got married at the protest - exchanging vows as the crowd blew bubbles to celebrate! I'm not glossing over Portland's real issues. I grew up there, and the city is just across the I-5 bridge from our district. Although homicide rates have dropped 41% so far this year, my former hometown does suffer from higher than average crime rates as well as homelessness and addiction. But if Donald Trump actually wanted to help the people of Portland deal with its challenges, there are a lot better ways he could spend the $10 million it is estimated to cost to deploy Oregon's National Guard. Like programs to treat substance use, emergency housing assistance, or education and job programs, just to name a few. The fact is, militarized ICE agents and federalized troops won't do anything for Portland's real challenges, but it has brought unnecessary chaos and trauma. And where is my opponent, Marie Gluesenkamp Perez? She's had NOTHING to say about what Trump is doing right here in our own backyard, the city where she and her husband own and operate their family business. Our founders created a system of checks and balances. It is Congress' job to stop this madness, and Marie has abdicated her duty. [**Send me to Congress where I will stand every day against this full blown police state that grows every day that Marie stays silent.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUA2HARVSLfZA30bw2knXCWSt3LtNXmLqAmrAeD5JW7d9fUQv8XdFS337CIekO-tCJBWci6rO4ppYRGPlgoaERCKusBT1FC4jbYkbFcAKEFRlheVvVo5Y6-CuaGST337JowwBESPdGeFl0bAyVz7hYY_OOZh9tnz_179NA1GqwPzEFqEjtU6AuK02Hi03tfAs6xMbIb3DCTLL_qhMlsCSfLZ0EmMR8QPb5pdOOTqKFO4fjwj7e5lyH-1293umSWIANt4mEvRFOExIrf-2vsGmEaOaNOqzJXH6D7A7HEtYILqTvTolLHPSXlGSGPTjVJaUF0/4ko/oWLH6bbiQb-R7jlfi3i6hw/h1/h001.r75ky5hVDIB60jn1pJ-yzjRiup-iX_dAkzvqkMD-c2s) Trump and MAGA are bringing chaos and violence to Portland while Marie remains silent on this issue. She refused to condemn Trump's illegal DC National Guard deployments and even implied they may have been justified. While TX Gov. Greg Abbott illegally sends the Texas National Guard to follow whatever orders Trump gives them, the General of the Oregon National Guard has made it clear that, if deployed, his troops will be ordered to protect protesters, not ICE. That is how you lead with moral courage in a crisis. [**Peter, we can 't wait for the light bulb to go off for Marie or any representative who isn't sounding the alarm and doing all they can to push back against this police state.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUA2HARVSLfZA30bw2knXCWSt3LtNXmLqAmrAeD5JW7d9fUQv8XdFS337CIekO-tCJAQZFTeUN7NIJo6OZT_jKkDqWMOPoLC3D8Ndb93dhGAlZg_lUPwGhoylMR9NRPVYMJVex_dywtI-SGOe9Lb4fBMsPfmKHUj1rtEQ7v_T90H0Ro7qpUGWt-GdT9rDiPCix6iK_xnfQ8zCE1L_lPrdZPOPVvOA5CqjPSKrFCYaM_05hdMMaPRYTpeHvxJBgXWsSgkmonsQwN-HnlwF262QejXXmg2NA7gxoJU0aFnZZh9YIOZOiAPMQ7q1Zs10K45HpU/4ko/oWLH6bbiQb-R7jlfi3i6hw/h2/h001.2hCYBr1kJCj-C4_Ky8wwX31qyyFiqB807fpBPP3Qbog) I am fighting with all my might to win this seat, and I need you with me today, to grow this campaign, and make sure everyone here in WA-03 knows that I'm ready to stand up to Trump and shut this whole circus down. | Dear Friend —
---
This week, True the Vote launched one of the most comprehensive transparency initiatives in our history.
We’ve sent **public records requests to every state** and the **200 largest counties in America** , asking one question that every citizen deserves to know the answer to:
| | _What actions have you taken — or do you plan to take — to comply with President Trump’s Executive Order 14248, “Preserving and Protecting the Integrity of American Elections”?_
---

[read EO 14248 here](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.UJcOIEsxQ3qr5lEWJDDC4n6aWBcMC8ry3MP8bGZ9oijmVt2vekhx2U6rXIw6jZI57qBqA-jFLzgM45PQlW10Vk4zZNxKkE2r0wSTkx8cOT5c6B83vqhFGjZVVWfVM3pIQYP9OKnaUWSiC5jkWdO4aMEDZ0k-Bw00e7ZOJVXxXTAscv42Mv12I1MH6dzPgBi7GdN9IZoUJtD5CjLJSG6TqFzXWFL-WGsBtKIzsJYyhMpLHBYKhm2qaQRpU8I6SMrhgfTW1596j1esabwUHF8b788qMIzchliQ5_nvaf6sSo2EnbmDnlPcLKDnzJ9RL95U9TRS1oC-ciE0u1KblFZH2DzzC9H6E8YWdNNLkEY5eE1FA5lZDCMVv7AGirtPXOe4IOPT0fMmCTcb87H-TCdSqw/4ko/JcM9XlhNTmOGnxJ_tb_MKw/h2/h001.-2EUQ0Fa0V9-skE3iHeRSfobJCzMBkomtdCtzqeRnGA)
The [Executive Order ](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.UJcOIEsxQ3qr5lEWJDDC4n6aWBcMC8ry3MP8bGZ9oii3qX2xiakaXZVvJAzAtK_Z/4ko/JcM9XlhNTmOGnxJ_tb_MKw/h3/h001.0eNJOk3SejY6lozNdA0nOD2Gsx9IzMOD9KtcwGzMedo)directs states to strengthen election systems through improved voter-roll accuracy, verification of citizenship, and tighter ballot-handling rules. Some parts of the EO are being challenged in court — but every election official should still be working to secure the process.
All responses will be posted publicly at **[iv3.us](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.sV4MFbzBllccGzy2svLCokN9gYO8jdh-gSJJK-hMZ8MuwQarFK8uveiTwuNNpIl1BO0hLCdJFOwl4U61NkEK7JakHP5I8pOzXqkPA7Qry7V_niX8Sokmpbda6jxOniwVRoqexmi3LxoJNM_G7r7aWOsJOKlj4E0FLbjG5Wi8I57mj76vFy8HDp0m7KKvt_UOCmVJdroOS0s_qlacffM9EMnYusXV03I24yrmQy1_oafWZ7PJq6a3t4w4llwolQcA/4ko/JcM9XlhNTmOGnxJ_tb_MKw/h4/h001.O5EupRbou45g_Oocv-7Okkdo3kYNnIV-QpxgM3NjxL4)** and will also be featured in this newsletter, so _you_ can follow along and see what your state and county are doing. We expect responses to start trickling in in about a week. If you use IV3, you’ve likely been waiting for us to restart the project ... and we’ve been waiting to see what states are going to do with their voter rolls post the Executive Order. Hopefully, we’ll have answers soon. Elections belong to the people; transparency is how we keep it that way.
[You can see our FOIA requests here ](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bK9A1rb--4z-MRHHKHFTQfLN4ZO8XgEp0M_RhgonyCxxq-LM33kWJRifyxFa71sEfagS5nXfVUe0AsBDCC1KPyofkn9SCTkNeIaznCceST3ZVmLluvwPNGfBYhlkN09aK_-BxkS53nyUGOrqAFTRtHlBf3l9ugmTCh6AwkC3JzMe71s7IDIfAPqmlqoT0qeDNnQG0G_WdjW0anmNOu-lqG23yqYcr_rKuGX8wbgKiT1geXW4wRXon6NV2BMzKwCQsXQdF-iGvB8jhrzCKMKnZPOUWZAqy4_Eey2hNNAlwY-v7yDh1DRCHF-lXjV2WqmFItqi2O2kcqBegwnIrjEJ5Q/4ko/JcM9XlhNTmOGnxJ_tb_MKw/h5/h001.ZzMoezw3wXrGvZiotQ4dXLk6VL1H_8wiW55skYxgQZc)

### ⚠️ **Maine Ballots Found in an Amazon Box: Chain-of-Custody at Risk**
Authorities in Maine are investigating a serious breach: a resident opened an Amazon delivery and found[ ](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.Grs4UHqmlwZE0ZbdGcvXvPsEimWT5IkMRyHOtc-cKXkOAEF9tCu4TWfRC6yjzYVrAglINfb9WJQaqkuAoDHwMBsM2eoLlBWAtLQSICRwUmArtyXF8wS5xSf3n3pq95R-132pJudc-7VioshvvTMr__dJdUbEs84Tpvy3Ntd7aWBCc2cemzPJzZyM9uW20hXh1oQhybpwKZT-Ze-oTySsdEvBc5bzgqx3JbPNl_upoVWdmgr-zY6uhxm92TBX2aL7PsiYz38OZ8qt2tN85s4zlYis6L16Tdt0G_wIZBXAEaI2vjnZMSl1CZfhCtdNta0-csoj8qHyb7ns4yiGWJw2uH9nHPqWuWM2uhdUSM2OkJM/4ko/JcM9XlhNTmOGnxJ_tb_MKw/h6/h001.HATBjTVCKFeCWysFhhTUkoUWpCEf1vaaFafQV9nmrRM)[**bundles of blank absentee ballots**](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.Grs4UHqmlwZE0ZbdGcvXvPsEimWT5IkMRyHOtc-cKXkOAEF9tCu4TWfRC6yjzYVrAglINfb9WJQaqkuAoDHwMBsM2eoLlBWAtLQSICRwUmArtyXF8wS5xSf3n3pq95R-132pJudc-7VioshvvTMr__dJdUbEs84Tpvy3Ntd7aWBCc2cemzPJzZyM9uW20hXh1oQhybpwKZT-Ze-oTySsdEvBc5bzgqx3JbPNl_upoVWdmgr-zY6uhxm92TBX2aL7PsiYz38OZ8qt2tN85s4zlYis6L16Tdt0G_wIZBXAEaK5cDArbn6A97pcaLYF06Mlr8sH5U7hJv1ScUszwPWM22agMdeBICe6pT8rZEDcDcY/4ko/JcM9XlhNTmOGnxJ_tb_MKw/h7/h001.RWVGW7T8-3zpEzKGp1qbTWsIoRGmj9oDIoR3pYE6BMQ). The state’s election crimes unit, the FBI, and Amazon are investigating. Amazon says the package appeared to be **tampered with outside** its system.
This is exactly why **chain-of-custody matters**. Ballots aren’t just paper; they’re the voice of the people. When they can be intercepted, diverted, or repackaged, the entire process is compromised. [True the Vote is pressing for answers ](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bK9A1rb--4z-MRHHKHFTQfLN4ZO8XgEp0M_RhgonyCxCtDoHR2INF2zRv2LH1CRCLI3Mc6PQKf5I7phzma_A4eaiGn7B8uCj6rV-HxbFZgvBzyGFQ--0VUtSPFWegHyIQpMl887LFTwkFzD8n_HjP5bxqW124pofiJhTL4jtSwFkpQwEnOG84_LBAAMdC77UrcK0S5DWIzKf0Hk63SMLWUHa2-m-ZTqjhT90XXD-t-mLQuWJTOdjiYMvD366PFLVO3ydn-fVbHyBP1bnx0qJKrpjcBO8UaXJ2e3357Ti2LNmGiPlOZrRYwtx2nETaFEr3YNayglW7FA_uxIIL4D8RA/4ko/JcM9XlhNTmOGnxJ_tb_MKw/h8/h001.Ez678bE00ASnD0fpsuD0qpwM89IAUgTmj-mBWUMuvUM)— and we’ll post every development, so you can see what’s being done in Maine to secure your vote.

### 🗳 **Dominion Sold: Lessons from the 2020 Nightmare**
Axios reports that **[Dominion Voting Systems has been sold to a Missouri-based company called Liberty Vote](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.UJcOIEsxQ3qr5lEWJDDC4nZ5O7a4zmuhLjqq2eihkrHN31Uh6kpp99JiGRxKyAxgGXw1SnBC_KUp0ugv3c2BSbu_GImNjoJxaLhOL_hFcSfrkkth8uqJYgfVBoabZu1usbMneZ3knqV9Bb8tUdSrV-eV1DMgj_Q7SquNIgls-JQJreoQl7706GZFHQ_WwUQhe4KBX5psrwhJUvd6mElXvU1dOqHl2NKXK5jCih7a5SjSjfbyS-vMXbirbyx2RswDto88TY6a3cQfdlt6oGaq6dRWV6z0JCUHjgfqqjwCMioXFPdfm3dQFqpCYm-NQOe84OXB6AdjHPGYutATkZBm9A/4ko/JcM9XlhNTmOGnxJ_tb_MKw/h9/h001.42DeLZFRA9xOZ3KjCPVrloGwqhoR-UsoSpqEk3Taq2s)**[ ,](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.UJcOIEsxQ3qr5lEWJDDC4nZ5O7a4zmuhLjqq2eihkrHN31Uh6kpp99JiGRxKyAxgGXw1SnBC_KUp0ugv3c2BSbu_GImNjoJxaLhOL_hFcSfrkkth8uqJYgfVBoabZu1usbMneZ3knqV9Bb8tUdSrV-eV1DMgj_Q7SquNIgls-JQJreoQl7706GZFHQ_WwUQhe4KBX5psrwhJUvd6mElXvU1dOqHl2NKXK5jCih7a5SjSjfbyS-vMXbirbyx2RswDU_10bLc5LnEYAmlJX3eD2VH3b4svliV0ebTimAUSgS7rvpYNY3-X3KKh7SXp1lqZvF1OOkN-LjRUciCWZGp5GQ/4ko/JcM9XlhNTmOGnxJ_tb_MKw/h10/h001.4tc0BekmQt9pfi89rp1Rlk333GFFg5zyoORf5jHUXoE) led by Scott Leiendecker, a former Republican election official. The new owners say they’ll rebuild or retire Dominion’s existing machines and focus on **paper-based, auditable systems**.
It’s welcome news — but we haven’t forgotten what came before.
In 2020, questions about Dominion’s software, contracts, and data flows were met not with transparency, but with **lawsuits, media censorship, and intimidation**. Americans were told to “trust the system,” yet denied meaningful access to the very data that could restore that trust.
That stonewalling fueled public mistrust and tore at the fabric of our republic.
Now, as Dominion changes hands, True the Vote will be watching closely. Will Liberty Vote live up to its name? Will it open the books, allow audits, and finally let Americans verify what happens inside the machines that count their votes? Time will tell.
|

### ⚖️ **SCOTUS: Fighting to End Weeks-Long Ballot Counting**
This week, the U.S. Supreme Court heard [_Bost v. Illinois State Board of Elections_](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.UJcOIEsxQ3qr5lEWJDDC4m0n_RVTRCcpJVQsR9B5IcOqSJUToR5Xs7PEvYnqwYXcuS3qTiuaE0lKJavDZF-0mS7t-McNBc5x96r5qvTDcuAfHOYd14I9oHwoePyY2wRgYn0myTkdqn0R-Zp31ssWe3iODXlw2AN9_cRvZHBgkG_jEAZe_xCi1w_fKJXcryuyHX1PgwPwmGzS3EP92iEkZGHOYAxZWr-FF_thR2OuCvzAoEWC6-_SW7lxiCLZdac-XoKOrHFtTn7wYmfYFiBOVpAO2gbictscWu0qOMIT1wJd98ncSFwewwVhxyxr6ovn/4ko/JcM9XlhNTmOGnxJ_tb_MKw/h11/h001.RyOQqv3xM77ir2oBBiqpURFFBv_gSfp1YWN2mnZDt00) — a case that could reshape how America treats ballots that arrive days (or even weeks) after Election Day. Under Illinois law, vote-by-mail ballots postmarked by Election Day may still be counted up to 14 days later. Rep. Mike Bost, joined by two presidential electors and backed by Judicial Watch, challenged that practice.
Lower courts rejected the challenge, saying the plaintiffs lacked standing to sue, even though expanded ballot deadlines implicate the very integrity of elections. The question before SCOTUS: can federal candidates challenge state election rules when those rules change _when_ or _how long_ postmarked ballots may be counted?
This isn’t a technical procedural fight. If the Court says _no_ standing, states could effectively extend their own Election Day without checks. If the Court says _yes_ , it opens the door for challenges to all extended counting regimes.
Our view is clear: **elections must conclude when the polls close**. Allowing late-counted ballots undermines certainty, prompt results, and public trust. Kudos to Judicial Watch for their representation of the Plaintiff — great work!
We’re watching this case closely and will keep you posted as it develops.
|

### **Together, We Keep the Watch**
Election integrity is the heartbeat of a free nation. Through these FOIA requests, investigations, our ongoing advocacy, and your support, we’re building a permanent, citizen-driven record of truth.
But this mission only works when _you_ are part of it.
👉 **Here’s how you can help:**
* Visit **[iv3.us](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.sV4MFbzBllccGzy2svLCokN9gYO8jdh-gSJJK-hMZ8MuwQarFK8uveiTwuNNpIl1BO0hLCdJFOwl4U61NkEK7JakHP5I8pOzXqkPA7Qry7V_niX8Sokmpbda6jxOniwVRoqexmi3LxoJNM_G7r7aWOsJOKlj4E0FLbjG5Wi8I57mj76vFy8HDp0m7KKvt_UOUs1dkfROdO0FpLHzlveRVu_WS5jB_DfgIXxiIIkY63Gv8BHMWuB9wuPIjxugSMkq/4ko/JcM9XlhNTmOGnxJ_tb_MKw/h12/h001.a-37EB32yaDDxX2kunyOCEJKY54U_2tS-Ufz7f9irio)** to follow every FOIA response as it arrives.
* **Share** this newsletter with friends who care about honest elections.
* **Give if you can** — not out of charity, but partnership. [This is your movement](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.QpSyXf61MHmBXCNRmciJj3PUgb36uh_VYyzARbBoy8V4IIXfwPI29p_RsGNgUB1TiiaogtipJdX9Vif9CG-1g7USR7d76zxeGo1dHQubv6NL4XjQ5SnDsDLcFSO6CiEzLn5GGVT1OnXiu_PWfpvssifstt9ZbQdZwEi8BgZRctLHWm91RNBYJBnOeIHiq0NVqGCb4WSOme4kGXWfITiLvtktmaqB0qi4hKM8eiSXeIqTtR6PIwCTh71zkdyi6QaiHPaGsk_JBw00H-8NtXrpOA/4ko/JcM9XlhNTmOGnxJ_tb_MKw/h13/h001.pqH0iCUebIcmSVlWryhK3pWMggCA7pIKXTHam1eKTTo), your country, your vote. Help us keep watch.
* **Stay engaged** — because your vigilance is the cornerstone of liberty.

|
---
### **These Are the Days**
These are difficult and dangerous days. But they are also days of decision — the kind that define who we are as a people.
Freedom doesn’t defend itself. It requires citizens who are awake, informed, and unwilling to surrender the responsibility that comes with self-government. Every generation must take up that burden anew — to question, to watch, to act, to stand.
Our time is now. DO NOT GROW WEARY.
| | _**“Let us not become weary in doing good, for at the proper time we will reap a harvest if we do not give up.”**_
---

— Galatians 6:9
We can not give up. The systems of power will always resist scrutiny. But America was never meant to run on power; it was meant to run on **consent** — the consent of an engaged, self-governing people who demand truth and transparency from those who serve them.
So stay watchful. Stay involved. Speak up. Encourage others to do the same. The future of this Republic doesn’t rest in Washington — it rests in **us**.
Keep the faith. Hold the line. Never quit. Ephesians 6 FTW!
**Ever onward,**
|

clean_body: Pray. Serve. Vote | | | | October 12, 2025 | | | Dear Friend — This week, True the Vote launched one of the most comprehensive transparency initiatives in our history. We’ve sent public records requests to every state and the 200 largest counties in America , asking one question that every citizen deserves to know the answer to: | | What actions have you taken — or do you plan to take — to comply with President Trump’s Executive Order 14248, “Preserving and Protecting the Integrity of American Elections”? The states to strengthen election systems through improved voter-roll accuracy, verification of citizenship, and tighter ballot-handling rules. Some parts of the EO are being challenged in court — but every election official should still be working to secure the process. All responses will be posted publicly at and will also be featured in this newsletter, so you can follow along and see what your state and county are doing. We expect responses to start trickling in in about a week. If you use IV3, you’ve likely been waiting for us to restart the project ... and we’ve been waiting to see what states are going to do with their voter rolls post the Executive Order. Hopefully, we’ll have answers soon. Elections belong to the people; transparency is how we keep it that way. | ⚠️ Maine Ballots Found in an Amazon Box: Chain-of-Custody at Risk Authorities in Maine are investigating a serious breach: a resident opened an Amazon delivery and found. The state’s election crimes unit, the FBI, and Amazon are investigating. Amazon says the package appeared to be tampered with outside its system. This is exactly why chain-of-custody matters. Ballots aren’t just paper; they’re the voice of the people. When they can be intercepted, diverted, or repackaged, the entire process is compromised. — and we’ll post every development, so you can see what’s being done in Maine to secure your vote. | 🗳 Dominion Sold: Lessons from the 2020 Nightmare Axios reports that led by Scott Leiendecker, a former Republican election official. The new owners say they’ll rebuild or retire Dominion’s existing machines and focus on paper-based, auditable systems. It’s welcome news — but we haven’t forgotten what came before. In 2020, questions about Dominion’s software, contracts, and data flows were met not with transparency, but with lawsuits, media censorship, and intimidation. Americans were told to “trust the system,” yet denied meaningful access to the very data that could restore that trust. That stonewalling fueled public mistrust and tore at the fabric of our republic. Now, as Dominion changes hands, True the Vote will be watching closely. Will Liberty Vote live up to its name? Will it open the books, allow audits, and finally let Americans verify what happens inside the machines that count their votes? Time will tell. | ⚖️ SCOTUS: Fighting to End Weeks-Long Ballot Counting This week, the U.S. Supreme Court heard — a case that could reshape how America treats ballots that arrive days (or even weeks) after Election Day. Under Illinois law, vote-by-mail ballots postmarked by Election Day may still be counted up to 14 days later. Rep. Mike Bost, joined by two presidential electors and backed by Judicial Watch, challenged that practice. Lower courts rejected the challenge, saying the plaintiffs lacked standing to sue, even though expanded ballot deadlines implicate the very integrity of elections. The question before SCOTUS: can federal candidates challenge state election rules when those rules change when or how long postmarked ballots may be counted? This isn’t a technical procedural fight. If the Court says no standing, states could effectively extend their own Election Day without checks. If the Court says yes , it opens the door for challenges to all extended counting regimes. Our view is clear: elections must conclude when the polls close. Allowing late-counted ballots undermines certainty, prompt results, and public trust. Kudos to Judicial Watch for their representation of the Plaintiff — great work! We’re watching this case closely and will keep you posted as it develops. | Together, We Keep the Watch Election integrity is the heartbeat of a free nation. Through these FOIA requests, investigations, our ongoing advocacy, and your support, we’re building a permanent, citizen-driven record of truth. But this mission only works when you are part of it. 👉 Here’s how you can help: Visit to follow every FOIA response as it arrives. Share this newsletter with friends who care about honest elections. Give if you can — not out of charity, but partnership. , your country, your vote. Help us keep watch. Stay engaged — because your vigilance is the cornerstone of liberty. | These Are the Days These are difficult and dangerous days. But they are also days of decision — the kind that define who we are as a people. Freedom doesn’t defend itself. It requires citizens who are awake, informed, and unwilling to surrender the responsibility that comes with self-government. Every generation must take up that burden anew — to question, to watch, to act, to stand. Our time is now. DO NOT GROW WEARY. | | “Let us not become weary in doing good, for at the proper time we will reap a harvest if we do not give up.” — Galatians 6:9 We can not give up. The systems of power will always resist scrutiny. But America was never meant to run on power; it was meant to run on consent — the consent of an engaged, self-governing people who demand truth and transparency from those who serve them. So stay watchful. Stay involved. Speak up. Encourage others to do the same. The future of this Republic doesn’t rest in Washington — it rests in us. Keep the faith. Hold the line. Never quit. Ephesians 6 FTW! Ever onward, | | 1 | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- | | Update your email preferences or unsubscribe (C) 2025 True the Vote 3120 Southwest Frwy Ste 101, PMB 19128 Houston, Texas 77098-4520, United States of America

| | Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read. Our democracy is being put to the test like never before. **There’s no sugarcoating it: I’m writing to you because the Trump administration just tried to seize control of Oregon’s voter registration data.**
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117159905/575548916/-569431239?refcode=251012em-data-pet-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjNmNGQ2NS1jMGE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lY9tVciqQ3qYWFekP-Mo_bPZKSVszmjqjQsNpnwbS0Q=)

They demanded voters’ personal identifying information that has no legitimate role in federal election oversight. Data that can be manipulated to undermine trust in our elections and go after opponents. **This demand has nothing to do with compliance and everything to do with power.** By hoarding personal data, Trump’s DOJ could spin false claims of voter fraud or even build a national voter database to target Americans. **I said no. As Oregon’s Secretary of State, I rejected their request in the strongest possible terms.** But I need your help to show that the people of Oregon stand with me. **[That’s why I’m asking you personally: Will you add your name to our petition opposing Trump’s voter data grab?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117159906/575548917/-120029677?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjNmNGQ2NS1jMGE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lY9tVciqQ3qYWFekP-Mo_bPZKSVszmjqjQsNpnwbS0Q=&emci=c3c3c35d-c0a7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=663f4d65-c0a7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=30662126)**

Thanks to Donald Trump’s unprecedented quest for power, our personal privacy is at risk. Trust in our elections is at risk. And our constitutional authority to run state elections is at risk. **[We can stop this — but only if we speak up together. Sign the petition today to tell the Trump administration: Oregon’s voter data is not theirs to take.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117159908/575548919/-120029677?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjNmNGQ2NS1jMGE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lY9tVciqQ3qYWFekP-Mo_bPZKSVszmjqjQsNpnwbS0Q=&emci=c3c3c35d-c0a7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=663f4d65-c0a7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=30662126)** Thank you for standing strong for democracy, Tobias Read

name: Team Schrier
subject: The misinformation is getting out of hand.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
**_MyNorthwest:_ WA congresswoman leads Democratic doctors' push to probe Trump admin Tylenol claims**

_"The Democratic Doctors Caucus sent a letter to the Energy and Commerce and Oversight and Government Reform Committees on Monday, urging immediate investigation into the Trump administration's report, according to a news release from Schrier's office."_ Peter,

When public health decisions are driven by politics instead of science, it's all of us who pay the price.

That's why Kim is speaking out against the reckless and misleading claims coming from Donald Trump and HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. about Tylenol, vaccines, and autism.

After the administration wrongly linked common medications and vaccines to autism, Kim joined other doctors in Congress in signing a letter demanding answers. They're calling top health officials to testify before Congress and explain the science behind these claims.

Kim and her fellow doctors in Congress are demanding accountability. Instead of chasing attention with unproven theories, **our leaders should be working with the experts and researchers who've spent decades studying autism and the many complex factors behind it.**

As a pediatrician, Kim knows _exactly_ how dangerous it is when misinformation replaces medicine. Parents deserve clarity, honesty, and leadership rooted in fact, not fear and not fiction. And the American people deserve decisions guided by research, not political convenience.

[**That’s why Kim will always stand up for science, truth, and transparency. Add your name to stand with Kim and her fellow healthcare professionals to demand that our leaders use science,_not conspiracy,_ to guide their decisions.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117160089/575549479/-1231783862?ms=em25_251011_tylpet_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&refcode=em25_251011_tylpet_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&source=em25_251011_tylpet_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_251011_tylpet_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=o+daMCpEJmE0ddnAfM6qqGzSzyUEU5nhGJ8+WnC1DE9X30dGYVDTJKgXuUj+1tt+Q5O8gAWwsEt465KEwDUIQQBRuBYtHhG0JkENJ9/XgQKeibddh+Wh3HuJbgqv6E+RQhQ/JUCegSfQxlDCO2PlSzbcfiUq4mzMi3rRmH6BdVM=&refcode2=20ff54a3-c4a7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGZmNTRhMy1jNGE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HRsvupQDFGK8ejtXIMc1kkUA2GDCUHLa_g6ZHNvfdKE=&emci=db80b953-fca5-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=20ff54a3-c4a7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=15820338) [SIGN ON →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117160090/575549480/-1231783862?ms=em25_251011_tylpet_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&refcode=em25_251011_tylpet_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&source=em25_251011_tylpet_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_251011_tylpet_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=o+daMCpEJmE0ddnAfM6qqGzSzyUEU5nhGJ8+WnC1DE9X30dGYVDTJKgXuUj+1tt+Q5O8gAWwsEt465KEwDUIQQBRuBYtHhG0JkENJ9/XgQKeibddh+Wh3HuJbgqv6E+RQhQ/JUCegSfQxlDCO2PlSzbcfiUq4mzMi3rRmH6BdVM=&refcode2=20ff54a3-c4a7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGZmNTRhMy1jNGE3LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HRsvupQDFGK8ejtXIMc1kkUA2GDCUHLa_g6ZHNvfdKE=&emci=db80b953-fca5-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=20ff54a3-c4a7-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=15820338) Thank you,

As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been and what issues I’ve tackled in the past week. # [District Round‐up 10.12.25](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=http%3A%2F%2Fbethfarnhamforcongress.com%2F2025%2F10%2F12%2Fdistrict-round-up-10-12-25%2F%3Fjetpack_skip_subscription_popup&sr=0&signature=ee140cca45f6963213f7e91a7fa45267&blog_id=213069660&user=248418217&_&_z=z)
| By **Elizabeth Farnham** on October 12, 2025
---
Dear Neighbor,
Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been and what issues I’ve tackled in the past week. Criss-crossing the counties of Adams, Franklin, Fulton, Bedford, Cambria, Blair, Huntingdon, Mifflin, Juniata, Perry, Cumberland, and Somerset gives me great opportunities to meet with voters, hear what is on your hearts and minds, and the chance to voice my fight for Everyday Americans. If you would like to contribute to my campaign, please donate here: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beth-fa,rnham-for-congress-1](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=923d931a4df7e41c0bacff1a9298ab3c55b3697c8bec27afadba7ae7819dd104&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5223&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=d8495b004609dcca31660ab4b910607d&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JldGgtZmFybmhhbS1mb3ItY29uZ3Jlc3MtMQ=&email_id=25c3e332692cecaad74eb372a5a6c720)
Many thanks to the Perry County Times who published the following write-up of my attendance at the Perry County Democratic Committee picnic on September 28th.
On Wednesday, I wrote:
Why haven't the Epstein files been released?
[](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=abbca9847676bcc1719e424d18d1872fd6f7720c6c09b81d33b89f6d97028261&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5223&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=48496fe078cb388e393943971f60092f&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url&email_id=25c3e332692cecaad74eb372a5a6c720)Because Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson, won't swear in Adelita Grijalva, the Democratic representative-elect of Arizona's 7th Congressional District.
Well, the House isn't in session, you might offer.
But Speaker Johnson can hold a "pro forma" session to swear her in just like he did when he swore in two other newly-elected House members this year.
The difference?
Those two House members were REPUBLICANS.
You see, Speaker Johnson doesn't care about seating elected members of Congress if they're Democrats.
He doesn't even care about the words his office gave before - that he would swear her in on October 7th.
What he might actually care about is that, once sworn in, hers will be the required 218th signature on the discharge petition to force a vote to the House floor legislation regarding the release the Epstein files.
If there is a House floor vote, then it will be very clear which US House legislators side with sex-trafficking pedofiles and which ones don't.
Meanwhile, US Attorney General, Pam Bondi, deflected questions about the sitting US President's connections to Epstein in a contentious Senate hearing yesterday.
But the Epstein files are just child's play when we consider her ruthlessness in trying to justify murdering alleged Venezuelan drug cartel boats based on no actual evidence.
Additionally, Bondi has not legally justified in any way the deployment of the National Guard troops to Democratically-led cities like Chicago.
Lastly, former FBI Director, James Comey,'s lawyer appeared with Comey in federal court yesterday, seeking quick dismissal of the case to which Comey pled "not guilty" describing the accusations as "vindictive" and "selective" prosecution because frankly, hers isn't a real case against him.
In other words, it's just another week, another round of unjustified murder, protecting pedofiles, attempting to incite violence, and targeting political foes by the Trump adminstration.
Our country doesn't have to be this way. We have a path to sanity, integrity, restored trust with our allies, and strengthened national security. But that path is voting out Republicans and voting Democrats, like me, Beth Farnham, into Congress.
Photo of Beth with Franklin County artist Andrea Finch at the Liberty Bell unveiling at the Franklin County Visitors Bureau to kick off 250 years of America. (Sept.20th)
On October 18th, cities and towns across the USA and beyond will hold No Kings rallies because we are currently suffering a Constitutional crisis.
Like a king, the sitting US President is abusing the power of the Executive Office to prosecute his political foes. Yesterday, it was former FBI director, James Comey. Today, it's New York Attorney General, Leticia James.
While James denied the charges of one count of bank fraud and one count of making a false statement to a financial institution as "baseless" and characterized the president's actions as a "grave violation of our Constitutional order," he, and US Attorney for the Eastern District of Virginia, Lindsey Halligan, are just plowing ahead.
Of course, it can hardly be a surprise that a convicted felon who, along with his company, was sued by James for inflating the value of some of his properties, lost more than $450 million in the civil business fraud case until the financial penalty was later thrown out on appeal.
It's shockingly horrible that Trump is doing this, but the Revolutionary Founders recognized that sometimes the wrong people are in office, for whatever reason, and so they gave us the ability to correct this problem through the Articles of Impeachment.
However, we're not seeing much traction from the Republicans who control Congress on any of the Articles of Impeachment that have previously been introduced.
This is because what is far worse than Trump's violations of the US Constitution is that those who were voted into office to represent us are just fine with Donald J. Trump destroying the sanctity of our living US Constitution.
Our own US Representative, multimillionaire John Joyce, through his silent condonement of Trump's crimes, can't break his oath to the US Constitution fast enough to permit Trump to ruin our country.
Trump has accused Democratic-led cities to be "the enemy within," but it is Donald Trump himself who is our domestic enemy whom those oath breakers stubbornly refuse to admit.
Joyce's sycophancy is so outrageous, I wouldn't be surprised if he's already prostrated himself at Trump's gnarly feet.
But the rest of us, The People, do not accept Trump's abuse of power. We stand powerfully against it and will demonstrate our collective might peacefully on October 18th. Please join us at any of the demonstrations listed on the link below.
As a wise man once stated in Gettysburg, our government has always been of The People, by The People, and for The People.
So when the time comes, vote out that smelly king and his cronies, vote for me, Beth Farnham, and when you do, you show the world that we [#ChooseDemocracy](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=8a52dd7873fd801f013c27866cdc07002695c28f1c895cf5fbbb5cd08054a67f&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5223&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=2e51a94724c9aec77c19baa149d6e76a&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=25c3e332692cecaad74eb372a5a6c720) .
[https://www.nokings.org](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=e122b8237a07bfd204f4ba27776f2c5a75de44e48258308a8ea80ac849488eda&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5223&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=97496c92da3467c9b79ccc542a0042a5&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubm9raW5ncy5vcmc&email_id=25c3e332692cecaad74eb372a5a6c720)
On Friday night, I appreciated the opportunity to march on the Altoona Pride parade, sponsored by PSU. I was glad to march for LGBTQ+ equality and against bigotry.
Later, thanks to the [Cambria County Democratic Party](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=0c637808dbcf0d50993ed23f13de5f516f1ede9c193f0cad8e70fab93079bac5&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5223&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=65a71e4b0e2cd36e485724116a6eb1ab&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=25c3e332692cecaad74eb372a5a6c720) I spoke at their John P. Murtha dinner. I may not have brought joy regarding this constitutional crisis and Trump's prediction for violence, but I brought solutions.
If you’re like me, you love this country as much as I do and work to make a positive difference. In the midst of this Constitutional Crisis, please consider reaching out to your local Democratic committees or Democratic candidates so that we can strengthen our Democracy instead of letting it slide into fascism.
We don’t just #ChooseDemocracy, we choose Pennsylvania, we choose The United States of America, we choose Humanity and I am deeply glad to work along side you.
Sincerely,
Beth

As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been and what issues I’ve tackled in the past week. Criss-crossing the counties of Adams, Franklin, Fulton, Bedford, Cambria, Blair, Huntingdon, Mifflin, Juniata, Perry, Cumberland, and Somerset gives me great opportunities to meet with voters, hear what is on your hearts and minds, and the chance to voice my fight for Everyday Americans. If you would like to contribute to my campaign, please donate here: Many thanks to the Perry County Times who published the following write-up of my attendance at the Perry County Democratic Committee picnic on September 28th. On Wednesday, I wrote: Why haven't the Epstein files been released? Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson, won't swear in Adelita Grijalva, the Democratic representative-elect of Arizona's 7th Congressional District. Well, the House isn't in session, you might offer. But Speaker Johnson can hold a "pro forma" session to swear her in just like he did when he swore in two other newly-elected House members this year. The difference? Those two House members were REPUBLICANS. You see, Speaker Johnson doesn't care about seating elected members of Congress if they're Democrats. He doesn't even care about the words his office gave before - that he would swear her in on October 7th. What he might actually care about is that, once sworn in, hers will be the required 218th signature on the discharge petition to force a vote to the House floor legislation regarding the release the Epstein files. If there is a House floor vote, then it will be very clear which US House legislators side with sex-trafficking pedofiles and which ones don't. Meanwhile, US Attorney General, Pam Bondi, deflected questions about the sitting US President's connections to Epstein in a contentious Senate hearing yesterday. But the Epstein files are just child's play when we consider her ruthlessness in trying to justify murdering alleged Venezuelan drug cartel boats based on no actual evidence. Additionally, Bondi has not legally justified in any way the deployment of the National Guard troops to Democratically-led cities like Chicago. Lastly, former FBI Director, James Comey,'s lawyer appeared with Comey in federal court yesterday, seeking quick dismissal of the case to which Comey pled "not guilty" describing the accusations as "vindictive" and "selective" prosecution because frankly, hers isn't a real case against him. In other words, it's just another week, another round of unjustified murder, protecting pedofiles, attempting to incite violence, and targeting political foes by the Trump adminstration. Our country doesn't have to be this way. We have a path to sanity, integrity, restored trust with our allies, and strengthened national security. But that path is voting out Republicans and voting Democrats, like me, Beth Farnham, into Congress. Photo of Beth with Franklin County artist Andrea Finch at the Liberty Bell unveiling at the Franklin County Visitors Bureau to kick off 250 years of America. (Sept.20th) On October 18th, cities and towns across the USA and beyond will hold No Kings rallies because we are currently suffering a Constitutional crisis. Like a king, the sitting US President is abusing the power of the Executive Office to prosecute his political foes. Yesterday, it was former FBI director, James Comey. Today, it's New York Attorney General, Leticia James. While James denied the charges of one count of bank fraud and one count of making a false statement to a financial institution as "baseless" and characterized the president's actions as a "grave violation of our Constitutional order," he, and US Attorney for the Eastern District of Virginia, Lindsey Halligan, are just plowing ahead. Of course, it can hardly be a surprise that a convicted felon who, along with his company, was sued by James for inflating the value of some of his properties, lost more than $450 million in the civil business fraud case until the financial penalty was later thrown out on appeal. It's shockingly horrible that Trump is doing this, but the Revolutionary Founders recognized that sometimes the wrong people are in office, for whatever reason, and so they gave us the ability to correct this problem through the Articles of Impeachment. However, we're not seeing much traction from the Republicans who control Congress on any of the Articles of Impeachment that have previously been introduced. This is because what is far worse than Trump's violations of the US Constitution is that those who were voted into office to represent us are just fine with Donald J. Trump destroying the sanctity of our living US Constitution. Our own US Representative, multimillionaire John Joyce, through his silent condonement of Trump's crimes, can't break his oath to the US Constitution fast enough to permit Trump to ruin our country. Trump has accused Democratic-led cities to be "the enemy within," but it is Donald Trump himself who is our domestic enemy whom those oath breakers stubbornly refuse to admit. Joyce's sycophancy is so outrageous, I wouldn't be surprised if he's already prostrated himself at Trump's gnarly feet. But the rest of us, The People, do not accept Trump's abuse of power. We stand powerfully against it and will demonstrate our collective might peacefully on October 18th. Please join us at any of the demonstrations listed on the link below. As a wise man once stated in Gettysburg, our government has always been of The People, by The People, and for The People. So when the time comes, vote out that smelly king and his cronies, vote for me, Beth Farnham, and when you do, you show the world that we . On Friday night, I appreciated the opportunity to march on the Altoona Pride parade, sponsored by PSU. I was glad to march for LGBTQ+ equality and against bigotry. Later, thanks to the I spoke at their John P. Murtha dinner. I may not have brought joy regarding this constitutional crisis and Trump's prediction for violence, but I brought solutions. If you’re like me, you love this country as much as I do and work to make a positive difference. In the midst of this Constitutional Crisis, please consider reaching out to your local Democratic committees or Democratic candidates so that we can strengthen our Democracy instead of letting it slide into fascism. We don’t just #ChooseDemocracy, we choose Pennsylvania, we choose The United States of America, we choose Humanity and I am deeply glad to work along side you. Sincerely, Beth | | | | | Beth Farnham for Congress © 2025. or . | | | | Get the Jetpack app Subscribe, bookmark, and get real‐time notifications - all from one app! | | | | ---|--- | | | | Automattic, Inc. 60 29th St. #343, San Francisco, CA 94110 |

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: If stopping Donald Trump from rigging the next election is worth $3 to you, and if you can afford to give it, I am asking you to contribute that in response to this emails
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yes on 50, The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee
body:
Here is goes...

We have sent a number of fundraising emails to help us pass the Election Rigging Response Act. More than I would have hoped ... believe me. So I thought it important to take a moment to explain why these requests -- including this one -- are so important.
Here is the truth:
This campaign is going to cost around $100 million to win. It's a staggering amount of money, but when you consider the impact of the outcome, it makes sense.
We are talking about flipping 5 House seats in California, and making three previously competitive Democratic seats a bit more safe.
When you think about what these House seats cost to win and defend it over the next three cycles through 2030, it makes sense. Plus, we are talking about control of the House... that's a big deal!
And there is no greater source of donations to our campaign than emails like this one. None.
Now, we're not going to raise $100 million or even $1 million from a single email -- so it takes sending a number of them over the campaign to reach the goals we need in order to fund a winning campaign.
The hope is that when people can give, they will. And there is no more important time to give than today. Right now. In response to THIS email.
Voting is underway. As you read this, people are filling out ballots and returning them. Meanwhile, polls show us at just below, or just above 50%. In other words, this election is CLOSE all with our final fundraising deadline of the campaign in less than one week.
And if we're going to persuade the voters we need, and turnout out the voters we know support us, we need the resources. And it goes back to why the response to these emails -- and hopefully your response today -- is so important.
[**So if stopping Donald Trump from rigging the next election is worth $3 to you, and if you can afford to give it, I am asking you to contribute that in response to this email and using this link.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em251012&refcode2=2655_4767699_i7-q-v&akid=2655%2E4767699%2Ei7-q-v)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

Thank you for reading. And hopefully, thank you for donating. We'll be tracking the response to this email through the day.
Gavin Newsom
